plants.name: Peashooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>How can a single plant grow and shoot so many peas so quickly? Peashooter says, "Hard work, commitment, and a healthy, well-balanced breakfast of sunlight and high-fiber carbon dioxide make it all possible."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Peashooters be your first line of defense. They shoot peas at attacking zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color></size>

plants.name: Sunflower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sunflower can't resist bouncing to th' beat. Which beat be that? Why, th' life-giving jazzy rhythm of th' Earth itself, thumping at a frequency only Sunflower can hear. Blow me down!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sunflowers be essential for ye to produce extra sun. Try planting as many as ye can!

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>First production be 4~7s after planting.</color></size>

plants.name: Cherry Bomb
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I wanna explode," says Cherry #1. "No, let's detonate instead!" says his brother, Cherry #2. After intense consultation, they agree to explodonate. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Bombs can blow up all zombies in an area. Blow me down! They have a short fuse so plant them near zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>3×3 (A circle with a radius of 1.375 tiles)</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>150</color>
Recharge:<color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Wall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"People wonder how I feel about getting constantly chewed on by zombies," says Wall-nut. "What they don't realize be that with me limited senses, all I can feel be a kind of tingling, like a relaxing back rub."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wall-nuts have hard shells which protect your other plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Wall-nut and subsequent fusions prevent splash damage from explosive cherries at difficulty 4 or lower. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color></size>

plants.name: Potato Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some folks say Potato Mine be lazy, that he leaves everything to th' last minute. Potato Mine says nothing. He's too busy thinking about his investment strategy.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Potato Mines pack a powerful punch, but they need a while to arm themselves. Ye should plant them ahead of zombies. They will explode on contact. Thar she blows!

<color=black>Arming Time:</color><color=#8B0000>15~17s</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single tile (A circle with a radius of 0.68 tiles)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Blisterin' barnacles!<color=#8B0000>25</color>
Recharge: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>30s</color></size>

plants.name: Chomper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chomper almost got a gig doing stunts for "The Little Shop of Horrors" but it fell through when his agent demanded too much on th' front end. Chomper's not resentful, though. He says it's just part of th' business.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Chompers can devour a zombie whole, but they be vulnerable while chewing. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>30s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals 40 damage each bite to zombies that be immune to being devoured. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color></size>

plants.name: Puff-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I only recently became aware of th' existence of zombies," says Puff-shroom. Blisterin' barnacles! Blow me down! "Like many fungi, I'd just assumed they were fairy tales or movie monsters. This whole experience has been a huge eye-opener for me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Puff-shrooms be cheap, but can only fire a short distance.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>2.5 tiles ahead</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Can stack up to three times in a single tile. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Puff-shroom fusions can only be created by planting th' other ingredient on Puff-shroom(s), and this will also attempt to fuse with other plants on th' same tile (Pots, Pumpkins).
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color>
<color=black>Spreading: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#8B0000>Plant Fume-shroom or Scaredy-shroom on 1/2/3 Puff-shrooms to spread it to empty tiles ahead/in a fan shape, spawning 1/3/6 Puff-shrooms.</color></size>

plants.name: Fume-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I was in a dead-end job producing yeast spores for a bakery," says Fume-shroom. "Then Puff-shroom, bless 'im, told me about this great opportunity blasting zombies. Thundering typhoons! Now I really feel like I'm making a difference."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fume-shrooms shoot fumes that can pass through screen doors. Arrr!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Range: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>4 tiles ahead</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Has infinite pierce, ignores handheld armor (Type 2).
<color=black>•</color>Puff-shroom spreader.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Shiver me timbers! Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Blisterin' barnacles!<color=#8B0000>75</color>
Recharge: Blisterin' barnacles!<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Hypno-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Zombies be our friends," asserts Hypno-shroom. "They're badly misunderstood creatures who play a valuable role in our ecology. We can and should do more to bring them round to our way of thinking."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>When eaten, Hypno-shrooms will make a zombie turn around and fight for you.

<color=black>Special: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#8B0000>Makes a single zombie fight for you.</color></size>

plants.name: Scaredy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Who's there?" whispers Scaredy-shroom, voice barely audible. "Go away. I don't want to see anybody. Unless it's th' man from th' circus."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Scaredy-shrooms be long-ranged shooters that hide when enemies get near them.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gets scared and stops attacking when thar be zombies in th' 3×3 surrounding area.
<color=black>•</color>Puff-shroom spreader.</color></size>

plants.name: Ice-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ice-shroom frowns, not because he's unhappy or because he disapproves, but because of a childhood injury that left his facial nerves paralyzed. Savvy?</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ice-shrooms temporarily immobilize all zombies on th' screen.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20</color>
<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>Freezes all zombies in place for 4 seconds, inflicts Chill for 10 seconds and deals 20 damage to all non-flying zombies.</color></size>

plants.name: Doom-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You're lucky I'm on your side," says Doom-shroom. "I could destroy everything ye hold dear. It wouldn't be hard."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doom-shrooms destroy everything in a large area and leave a crater that can't be planted on.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×5 (A circle with a radius of 3.75 tiles)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>After explosion, leaves a crater that lasts for 180 seconds. Does not leave crater when planted on water.</color></size>

plants.name: Lily Pad
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Lily Pad never complains. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Lily Pad never wants to know what's going on. Put a plant on top of Lily Pad, he won't say a thing. Does he have startling opinions or shocking secrets? Nobody knows. Lily Pad keeps it all inside.</color></size>
plants.info: Lily Pads let ye plant non-aquatic plants on top of them. Special:Short plant. Non-aquatic plants can be planted on it. When specific plants be placed, Lily Pad transforms into a variant of it that canAutomatically plantTh' plant that transformed it every 90 seconds. Variants:Sunflower, Wall-nut, Threepeater, Squash, Torchwood, Jalapeno.

plants.name: Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm ready!" yells Squash. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Yo ho ho. "Let's do it! Put me in! There's nobody better! I'm your guy! C'mon! Whaddya waiting for? I need this!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squashes will smash th' first zombie that gets close to it.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Does damage in a small area with a radius of 0.37 tiles. Squashed zombies do not trigger their on-death effects.</color></size>

plants.name: Threepeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Threepeater likes reading, backgammon, and long periods of immobility in th' park. Threepeater enjoys going to shows, particularly modern jazz. "I'm just looking for that special someone," he says. Threepeater's favorite number be 5.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Threepeaters shoot peas in three lanes.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Threepeater and subsequent fusions redirect projectiles that would be lost off-map on topmost/bottommost lanes to their own lane.</color></size>

plants.name: Tangle Kelp
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm totally invisible," Tangle Kelp thinks to himself. "I'll hide here just below th' surface, and nobody will see me." His friends tell him they can see him perfectly well, but he'll never change.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tangle Kelp be aquatic plants that pull th' first zombie that nears them underwater.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>

plants.name: Jalapeno
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"NNNNNGGGGG...." Jalapeno says. He's not going to explode, not this time. But soon. Oh, so soon. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! It's close. He knows it; he can feel it; his whole life's been leading up to this moment.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Jalapenos destroy an entire row of zombies. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Instantly eliminates Zombonis and their ice trails. Blow me down!</color></size>

plants.name: Spikeweed
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hockey be Spikeweed's obsession. He's got box seat season tickets. He keeps close track of his favorite players. Blimey! And he consistently cleans up in th' office hockey pool. Just one problem: He's terrified of pucks.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spikeweeds pop tires and hurt any zombies that step on them.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Does not block regular zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Pops tires. Instantly kills Zombonis. Blow me down! If Bobsled Zomboni or Michael Zomboni has more than 50% max HP, damage be capped at 50% of their max HP. If Evolved Zombonis have more than 1/3 toughness, damage be capped at 1/3 of their max HP.</color></size>

plants.name: Torchwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everybody likes and respects Torchwood. They like him for his integrity, for his steadfast friendship, for his ability to greatly maximize pea damage. But Torchwood has a secret: Thar she blows! He can't read.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Torchwoods turn peas that pass through them into fireballs that deal twice as much damage. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ignites peas that pass through it, damage +20.
<color=black>•</color>Turns snow peas back into regular peas.
<color=black>•</color>Dispels fog in a 1-tile radius.</color></size>

plants.name: Sea-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sea-shroom has never seen th' sea. Savvy? It's in his name, he's heard loads about it, but he's just never found th' time. One day, though, it'll go down.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sea-shrooms be aquatic plants that shoot short ranged spores.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>2.5 tiles ahead</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Returns 50 sun after fusions, except Minnow-shroom (with Puff-shroom).</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Batten down the hatches!<color=#8B0000>0</color>
Recharge: Blow me down!<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Plantern
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plantern defies science. Dead men tell no tales. Thundering typhoons! He just does. Other plants eat light and excrete oxygen; Plantern eats darkness and excretes light. Plantern's cagey about how he does it. "I'm not gonna say 'sorcery,' I wouldn't use th' term 'dark forces,' I just... I think I've said enough."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Planterns light up an area to let ye see through fog, and give Lumos levels to plants.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Dispels fog (5×7 except th' corners). Blisterin' barnacles! Arrr! Plantern fusions dispel fog in a smaller 1-tile radius.</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System:</color><color=#8B0000>Provides 1 Lumos Level in a 3×3 area, which can be stacked to provide strength to other Lumos plants. Refer to its fusions for th' list of affected plants.</color></size>

plants.name: Cactus
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>She's prickly, sure, but Cactus' spikes belie a spongy heart filled with love and goodwill. She just wants to hug and be hugged. Most folks can't hang with that, but Cactus doesn't mind. She's been seeing an armadillo for a while and it really seems to be working out.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cacti shoot spikes that can hit both ground and air targets.

<color=black>Damage: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Prioritizes flying zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>125</color>
Recharge: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When Blover was five he got a shiny new birthday cake. Blover made his wish, huffed and puffed, but was able to extinguish only 60% of th' candles. Instead of giving up, though, he's used that early defeat as a catalyst to push himself harder ever since. Sling yer hook!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blovers blow away all balloon zombies and fog, except Bucket-copter Zombies and Zomppelins.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Clears fog for 30s. Blows away Balloon Zombies and Boomer Sharkmarine missiles. Pushes back Zomppelins slightly.</color></size>

plants.name: Starfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Aw, man," says Starfruit. "I went to th' dentist th' other day, and he said that I have four cavities. I've got—count it—ONE tooth! Four cavities in one tooth? How does this happen?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Starfruits shoot stars in 5 directions.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×5/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pumpkin had just wrapped up his part-time gig. Thundering typhoons! "Honestly, it was a pretty fun experience," he chuckled. Thundering typhoons! "But can someone explain why they kept stuffing candy and candles inside me?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pumpkins protect plants that be within their shells.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Pumpkin and subsequent fusions prevent splash damage from explosive cherries at difficulty 4 or lower. Use a Pumpkin seed packet on Pumpkin and his fusions with less than 2/3 Toughness to restore HP to full.</color>
<color=black>Fusion Priority: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>Lowest, hold Left Shift key while fusing to forcibly fuse with Pumpkin. Shiver me timbers! (requires BetterFusionSuite mod, included by default)</color></size>

plants.name: Magnet-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone wondered why Magnet-shroom always took so long to "digest" th' iron he absorbed, even after it had already been taken away for fusion. Frustrated, he snapped, "I'm not lazy! I just got knocked out by flying iron!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Magnet-shrooms can absorb metallic objects.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attracts metal objects within a radius of 3 tiles. Takes 15 seconds to process. Cleave him to the brisket! Drops unprocessed objects on death or fusion.</color>
<color=black>If thar be a magnetic plant in th' 8-direction vicinity of another magnetic plant, they be then connected through th'<color=#666699>Magnetic System</color>. Dead men tell no tales. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Th'<color=#666699>Magnetic System</color>Has nay limit to its number of connections, and will boost th' strength of some magnetic plants based on its amount. Refer to its fusions for th' list of affected plants.</color></size>

plants.name: Cabbage-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some say love be like a cabbage; ye have to peel it layer by layer to see th' other person's heart. Dead men tell no tales. But Cabbage-pult has some reservations about this, as he be still single himself.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches cabbages to attack zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=black>Range: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Lobbed projectiles ignore handheld armor (Type 2).</color></size>

plants.name: Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants always think Flower Pot be just a "pot," but in reality, Flower Pot be a "flower" that just looks like a "pot." Look, that little sprout be th' bud of a flower. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Allows planting plants above it.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Enables plants to be planted on bare ground/roof.
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>Fusion Priority:</color><color=#8B0000>Lowest, hold Left Alt key while fusing to forcibly fuse with Flower Pot. (requires BetterFusionSuite mod, included by default)</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>25</color>
Recharge: Dead men tell no tales.<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color>

plants.name: Kernel-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants be curious whar Kernel-pult's butter comes from. Kernel-pult doesn't know either, but that doesn't avast him from making popcorn with it in his spare time to earn a little extra cash.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws corn kernels to attack zombies and can also throw butter to immobilize them.

<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Has a 1/4 chance to throw butter, dealing 40 damage and immobilizing zombies for 4 seconds. Splice the mainbrace!<color=#8B0000></color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>100</color>
Recharge: Dead men tell no tales.<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color>

plants.name: Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Garlic boasts of his high allicin content, claiming that eating garlic be good for health. Whether that's true or not, ye only have to watch th' zombies gagging as they chew on him to know it's pretty effective.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Any zombie that tries to bite him will switch lanes.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Zombies that bite him will change lanes. Receives nay more than 15 damage each bite. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color>

plants.name: Umbrella Leaf
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once a renowned passer, Umbrella Leaf was a superstar in th' 114th Plant-Zombie NBA. Dead men tell no tales. Dead men tell no tales. But as he aged, he discovered he was going bald.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Deflects incoming basketballs.

<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Protects plants from catapult projectiles and Bungees within a 3×3 area. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Protects plants from explosive basketballs but each protection costs 100 Toughness.
<color=black>•</color>Stops Mecha-nut Zombies in their tracks.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>100</color>
Recharge: Dead men tell no tales.<color=#8B0000>7.5s</color>

plants.name: Marigold
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Marigold be extraordinarily wealthy, so it spends freely—though technically, it doesn't even have hands or feet.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces Silver Coins, Gold Coins, and Diamonds.

<color=black>Production Interval: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>25s</color>
<color=black>Coin Amount: Shiver me timbers!
</color><color=#8B0000><color=black>•</color>75% Chance = 100 Coins
<color=black>•</color>20% Chance = 300 Coins
<color=black>•</color>5% Chance = 1000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Melon-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>During breaks, Melon-pult loves to split its melon arm into two, nibbling away to cool off. Dead men tell no tales. "Want a taste?" it asks th' zombies cheerfully, while th' plants around, sweltering in th' heat, can only drool enviously.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches melons at zombies to deal damage.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Single lane</color>
<color=black>Special: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>Melons deal splash damage in a 1-tile radius with falloff, calculated as projectile damage ×8 /(number of zombies hit), capped at 1/3 of th' projectile's base damage. Savvy?</color>

plants.name: Saw-me-not
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>For plants, spinning petals without damaging their stems be a skillful art. Cleave him to the brisket! Blimey! Some botanists speculate that Saw-me-not might be distantly related to Blover because of this ability. "It's indeed a tricky skill," Saw-me-not said with a faux-profound air, "The real challenge lies in obtaining lightweight circular saws and painting them with petal patterns."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Damages zombies in close range with his spinning sawblades!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>8/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 5 points of Shield every 0.5s, up to 1×max HP points. Yo ho ho. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Sling yer hook! Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>Spins blades when zombies get close, dealing piercing damage that scales down with more targets, to a minimum of 1.</color>
<color=black>Shield Mechanic:</color><color=#8B0000>Shields provide a 20% damage reduction to protected plants.</color>

plants.name: Amp-nion
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Amp-nion thought his moment had come — after all, who else had eaten lightning over a hundred times? Surely, he was destined to play th' Frankenstein monster! But when he received th' script, his dreams short-circuited. He wasn't a star. He wasn't even a sidekick. He was just Dr. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Stanley's lightning rod...</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks approaching zombies with lightning rays! Savvy?

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Idle Amp-nions in range will channel power to th' attacking one, each boosting th' damage by 150.
<color=black>•</color>Each shot can arc to other zombies to deal half th' damage, up to a maximum of 3 zombies.</color>

plants.name: Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Firnace won th' sixth annual “Plant Helper” award of th' Snowy Plains. Fellow plants agreed th' honor was well deserved—after all, he’s so busy keeping others warm, he hasn’t even had time to clear th' snow off his own head. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A floating firwood heater that helps broadside plants resist th' cold.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hovering plant. Protects plants in its own tile from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Deals 200 damage every 3s to ice blocks within its protection range. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs th' base Snow plant below it to temporarily evolve into Hi-temp Firnace, expanding its protection range to 3×3 for (1.2 × Plant Cost) seconds before reverting. Otherwise lasts 180s by default. Arrr!
<color=#cceaed>Snow Map Gimmick</color>:
<color=black>•</color>Ice blocks have 2000 HP and block straight-firing projectiles and zombies.
<color=black>•</color>If destroyed by plants, spawns th' corresponding plants.
<color=black>•</color>If destroyed by zombies, spawns th' corresponding zombotany instead; if none such zombotany exists, spawns an Snowfur.
<color=black>•</color>A blizzard starts at th' beginning of every wave, freezing all unprotected plants into ice blocks.</color>

plants.name: Spruce Sharpshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spruce Sharpshooter just moved to th' snowy plains. His pursed lips make him look fierce and hard to approach. But Firnace isn't scared—he knows that expression be just from his new m'hearty pulling up his collar because th' snowfield be just that cold.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold-resistant archer that fires piercing spruce needles.

<color=black>Damage: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles pierce once (including ice blocks) and ignore handheld armor (Type 2).</color>

plants.name: Snow Lotus
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Snow Lotus never planned to become a healer—but when your mere presence makes broadside plants feel better, word spreads fast. Thundering typhoons! Now she spends her days reluctantly running a clinic, insisting, “I’m just cold, not qualified.” Patients don’t seem to care.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold-loving healer that gains energy in th' cold to heal broadside plants.

<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 ice charge every 10s or when hit by a snowball or snow trident.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes 5 charges to awaken and heal all plants in a 3×3 area for 50 HP every 3s.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>

plants.name: Aloe Aqua
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Aloe Aqua thought opening a spa in th' snowy plains would be relaxing—until she realized nay one wants a cold soak in subzero weather. At least th' snow keeps th' towels crisp. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold-loving lobber that throws dew drops, or ice chunks when it's sufficiently chill.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes 1 charge to throw an ice chunk (×2 damage, applies Deep Chill, 40 Cryo points).
<color=black>•</color>Deep Chill: Same as regular Chill but affects Frost Legionnaires too. Zombonis be still immune.
<color=black>•</color>Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs.</color>

plants.name: Bamblock
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Where there's a will, there’s a wall." That's Bamblock's motto. "Back when I first sprouted, folks said I was just a pesky pebble underfoot. But I kept growing, and now I've become an official traffic cone." If ye ask how long ago that was? "Three days," he says.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Damages incoming zombies at th' cost of his own HP.

<color=black>Toughness: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Other plants cannot absorb damage for Bamblocks.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to crush. Splice the mainbrace!
<color=black>•</color>On contact with a zombie, instantly defeats th' zombie if th' zombie's HP be less than or equal to his own, but takes damage equal to that zombie's HP. Cleave him to the brisket! Against zombies with higher HP, deals damage equal to his own HP to th' zombie and destroys himself.</color>

plants.name: Golden Recycling Vase
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Golden Recycling be th' largest barter platform among plants. Yo ho ho. As th' founder, Golden Recycling Vase helps plants trade unused secondhand items, and also offers those looking for a random trip a chance, and a way, to get there.</color>
plants.info:
Recycle unwanted plants and turn them into surprises. Arrr!

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Vasebreaker: Th' Vase Less Travelled by, De-vase-tating! And Potluck</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When charge be below 3, ye can use th' Glove to move plants inside and for it to gain charge. Base plants/simple fusions/advanced fusions grant 1/2/3 charges respectively
<color=black>•</color>Tap to break th' pot. Drops a plant seed packet based on stored charge: Thundering typhoons! Yo ho ho. Blimey!
-1 charge: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Base plant
-2 charge: Blow me down! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Simple fusion
-3 or more: Advanced fusion

<color=black>•</color>If an Odyssey plant was ever stored, it will always drop an Odyssey plant.</color>

plants.name: Fusion Animation
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400></color>
plants.info: Not a plant. It's an animation of base plants fusing into an Odyssey plant. Ye must have th' setting "Easier Odyssey" enabled.

plants.name: Bamboom
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>As th' New Year approaches, Bamboom hit th' streets for some holiday shopping. "I used to be swamped every year, setting off fireworks at every house during th' festival," he said. "But now, with these new firecrackers made from cherry-chilli infused gunpowder, I can finally relax and enjoy me retirement." It must be said that th' new firecrackers be remarkably effective—he plans to buy a bundle this year too.</color>
plants.info:
Bamboom can scare off both zombies and demons, with a body as slender as a bundle of silk but breath as powerful as thunder.

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>After being planted, waits for 1s before flying forward in his lane, knocking back zombies it encounters and causing 300 area damage each impact.
<color=black>•</color>Deals ×15 damage to Nian zombies.</color>

plants.name: Hearty Apple
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Peace and joy!" Hearty Apple cheerfully greets every plant that passes by. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Zombies get a special greeting instead: "In this season of gratitude, have a grog-filled Halloween!", tailored based on th' zombies' error-ridden calendar.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wards off disaster and keeps ye "apples" safe.

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Starts with 0 energy. Max energy be capped at 4k. Blow me down! Regenerates 1 energy every 0.02s. When damaged or when energy be consumed, energy regen be paused for 1s. When energy be depleted, energy regen be paused for 5s.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes th' amount of energy equal to th' damage to block damage for plants in a 3×3 area.</color>

plants.name: Bucket
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ever since th' first bucket was made, it has found many unusual uses: Blow me down! Blow me down! Armor, fusion materials, roadblocks, and more. Yet despite all that, it has never once been used as an actual bucket.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can fuse with certain plants, making them hard as iron. Arrr!

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Can be placed (planted) on th' ground like a normal plant, or used as a fusion ingredient.
<color=black>•</color>Plants with Bucket in their recipe have higher toughness and pillage half damage from explosive cherries.</color>

plants.name: Football Helmet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You can find these things everywhere on a football field," th' plants say. Dead men tell no tales. Dead men tell no tales. But th' Football Gatling replies solemnly: "This helmet be special, because its former owner truly understood football."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can fuse with certain plants, making them hard as steel.

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Can be placed (planted) on th' ground like a normal plant, or used as a fusion ingredient.
<color=black>•</color>Plants with Football Helmet in their recipe have higher toughness and pillage half damage from explosive cherries.</color>

plants.name: XXS Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>On second thought, it be rather unsettling: What makes th' plants here grow so vigorously?</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Flower Pot with rich soil that boosts th' damage of th' plant growing on it. Avast ye!

<color=blue>Xiaoxiaosu Collab Plant, exclusive to Vasebreaker and Gacha Modes</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Enables plants to be planted on bare ground/roof.
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Boosts th' attack damage of th' plants in its tile by +10%.</color>

plants.name: Diamond Imitater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He be a merchant, th' most stereotypical one. Nay stance, nay loyalty, driven only by profit. He freely changes sides between plants and zombies, smuggling goods. Blimey! What he brings ye might be th' key to a comeback… or complete trash… or even a powerful enemy. But what happens to ye ultimately has nothing to do with him. After all, ye knew exactly what ye were buying.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>I'm shipping it out! - Wait, no, I've caused trouble again! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Complete Odyssey Gacha: Diamond Imitater</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Only usable in Odyssey Gacha levels.
<color=black>•</color>1.5s after appearing, generates a random plant, zombie, or event.
<color=black>•</color>Chances: Odyssey plants (10%); Plants obtainable from Giftboxes (50%); Odyssey zombies (10%); Bosses, Mini-bosses, or Odyssey zombies (10%); Common zombies (15%); Random events (5%). Generated zombies have random 0.8×/1×/1.2× health. Splice the mainbrace!
<color=black>•</color>List of Events:
<color=black>-</color>1. Gain 200 Sun.
<color=black>-</color>2. Acquire an Odyssey Modifier.
<color=black>-</color>3. Instantly kill all zombies within 1.5-tiles' range.
<color=black>-</color>4. Deal 4000 damage to plants in a 3×3 area. Shiver me timbers!
<color=black>-</color>5. Create a column of Fireballs rolling right, inflicting Enflamed and leaving a 40-damage fire trail.</color>

plants.name: Necroflame
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm done with all th' pretentious rules of th' garden. Plants should grow as they please," Necroflame once told her companions, but th' other plants didn't care. Maybe it's time to let go of all worries and live freely like a wild weed, she thought. "I'm not a plant, nor a zombie, nor some means of production. Blimey! I am simply myself."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An exhausted Endoflame that has lost her vitality, now as hard to remove as a weed.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special: Thar she blows! Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be shoveled or moved with gloves. Ignored by Zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs plant-side projectiles that pass through it, taking 30 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color>10s after appearance, summons a random Zombotany; summons another every 15s thereafter, and once more upon death.
<color=black>•</color>When fertilized, drops a Plant Giftbox and disappears.</color>

plants.name: Lucky Blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Lucky Blover never believed th' number four was unlucky. She's convinced that with her cute looks and good fortune, she can help plants see th' number four in a better light. Still, what plants really wonder is: What kind of wind could possibly change th' inside of a tightly sealed box?</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Changes th' winds of fate for you~

<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>Forces your next Plant Giftbox to generate a guaranteed Advanced/Titan fusion. In Odyssey Gacha Mode, it will instead guarantee an Odyssey plant.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>200</color>
Recharge: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!<color=#8B0000>50s</color>

plants.name: Lumo-shroom: Lumo-sun
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' first time Lumo-shroom saw a lumofly as a child, she was captivated. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Th' flickering lights in th' grass: A life so beautiful yet fleeting, like lamps or stars, painting th' night sky with dreams. Perhaps that's why she looks at th' lumo-suns she produces with joy instead of distaste. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun-shroom living in symbiosis with lumoflies.

<color=blue>PvZ: Symbiosis Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>20→35/25s
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Sun-shrooms convert into Lumo-shrooms, gaining th'<u>Lumo-sun</u>Ability after 150s if their tile's Lumos Level be 1 or higher. Blisterin' barnacles! Each additional Lumos Level accelerates th' conversion by 100%.
<color=black>•</color>Lumo-sun: Produces Lumo-sun, which be worth 20 each (35 when grown up).</color>

plants.name: Lumo-shroom: Lumo-sprite
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>It wasn't until she heard th' story of "decayed grass giving birth to lumoflies" that Lumo-shroom understood why her friends never seemed sad when parting. To them, each cycle was a grand reunion, not th' end of life. "We be destined to part, but we be also destined to meet again."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Second form of Lumo-shroom.

<color=blue>PvZ: Symbiosis Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>20→35/25s
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>After an additional 150s under Lumos, Lumo-shrooms gain th'<u>Lumo-sprite</u>Ability. Each additional Lumos Level accelerates upgrades speed by 100%.
<color=black>•</color>Lumo-sprite: When a zombie bites a Lumo-shroom, 1 Lumo-sprite starts to follow that zombie (2 if grown up). Each time a followed zombie takes damage, 1 Lumo-sprite flies off and produces a small Lumo-sun. When th' zombie dies, all Lumo-sprites following it be released, dropping an equal number of Lumo-suns. A zombie can have up to 20 Lumo-sprites following it at once.</color>

plants.name: Lumo-shroom: Lumo-burst
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"If ye look up and see th' fireflies swarming, that's me, back by your side." Lumo-shroom never feared death. Born of decayed grass, shining at summer's end, she embraces a final, resolute brilliance to ignite th' symphony of rebirth. As night falls, silence spreads, th' wheel of yin and yang turns, and th' cycle endures forever.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Third form of Lumo-shroom.

<color=blue>PvZ: Symbiosis Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: Arrr! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>20→35/25s
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>After yet another 150s under Lumos, Lumo-shrooms finally gain th'<u>Lumo-burst</u>Ability. Each additional Lumos Level accelerates upgrades speed by 100%.
<color=black>•</color>Lumo-burst: When a Lumo-shroom dies, all zombies in a small radius be followed by five Lumo-flies (increased range when grown up). Sling yer hook!</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>Lumo-shroom + Lumos Level</color>

plants.name: Frozen Giftbox
plants.introduce: Among all th' gift boxes in th' shop, th' frozen one be th' least loved. Why? Well… it's known for being th' victim ofColdTreatments.
plants.info:
<size=36>Giftbox with a below-average price.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Spawns a random frozen base plant.</color>

plants.name: Diamond Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I was always a weakling growing up, nay match for zombies, and nobody wanted to play with me," said Diamond Mine. "But now, wrapped in diamond, I'm strong—and ready to fight back." He really needs to, though—he's already racked up quite th' tab with Marigold.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Mine that's as hard and as rare as diamonds.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Randomized | Easter Egg plant with very rare chance of appearing</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Anti-crush, takes nay more than 200 damage per hit.
<color=black>•</color>Produces 500 points on damage phase transitions and on death.</color>

plants.name: Doubleblast Passionfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doubleblast Passionfruit only fires one shot at a time, so what’s th' "double blast"? Ah, it’s th' sound of zombie bones cracking.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Floating passionfruit that fires seeds at enemies.

<color=blue>SHUTTLE Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hovering plant.
<color=black>•</color>Each hit deals an extra damage equal to 10% of th' zombie's max Toughness to th' zombie's headgear armor (Type 1). Dead men tell no tales. Avast ye! Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>Ultimate:</color>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: Cleave him to the brisket! 2s; launches a giant passionfruit seed that deals damage to armor equivalent to 20% of current HP.</color>

plants.name: Pearmafrost
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I fell from a pear tree, and I've been here a long time," says Pearmafrost. "Too bad thar were nay genius brains under th' tree. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Dead men tell no tales. But at least I can ponder physics myself." When will he pillage a break? That depends on when brainless zombies interrupt him.
plants.info:
<size=36>Releases shockwaves when bitten, dealing damage and applying Chill. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!

<color=blue>SHUTTLE Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, releases a small shockwave every 3s, dealing 20 damage and applying Chill, adding 35 Cryo points.</color>

plants.name: Icetip Lily
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Though he often shouts "Off with their heads!", Icetip Lily isn't a warmonger. As th' master of Snowy Mountain martial arts, his ice-morphs-to-blade technique can deter any impure intruder.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Each attack releases 5 ice blades in a fan shape.

<color=blue>SHUTTLE Collab Plant</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×5/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color>Blades pierce twice, apply Chill, add 5 Cryo points, and deal ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks only when thar be zombies in its own row.

plants.name: Chrysanctum
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chrysanctum loves th' snowy plains—every second here be rewarding and joyful. After all, he'd never seen snow before.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grants broadside plants temporary invincibility.

<color=blue>PvZ: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Ultimate Collab Plant</color>
<color=#3D1400>Unlock Conditions:</color><color=red>Complete Adventure Level 45</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
Disappears 2s after planting. Grants all plants in a 3×3 area 6s of immunity to all damage and crushing.</color>

plants.name: Grave Buster
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Despite Grave Buster's fearsome appearance, he wants everyone to know that he loves kittens and spends his off hours volunteering at a local zombie rehabilitation center. "It's just th' right thing to do," he says.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Plant Grave Busters on graves to remove th' graves.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Plant Grave Buster on a gravestone to remove it, taking 5s. Sling yer hook! Drops itself as a seed packet if not planted on a grave.</color>

plants.name: Obsidian Barley
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Obsidian Barley statue in th' garden be rumored to be th' result of a plants' building game gone rogue. Thar she blows! "Who knows," says Obsidian Barley with a chuckle. "I think they saw me as th' ultimate 'Build & Guess' challenge long before I arrived. But hey, I don't mind — who wouldn't want more chances to show off their looks?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A sleek, obsidian-like version of Barley that periodically transforms into a random Ultimate plant.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Conditions: Cleave him to the brisket! Replaces Barley in Odyssey: Adventure</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Transforms into a random Ultimate plant every 30s (excluding Avarice-shroom)</color>

plants.name: Coldsnap Bean
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' plants couldn't figure out how such a tiny bean could chill th' air so effectively. But Coldsnap Bean just grinned mischievously. "You know why Cattail sneezes when she washes clothes? Batten down the hatches! Because she washes 'cat' clothes." Maybe th' real magic was in his sense of humor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hey↑ Yeh↓!

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Complete Wall-nut Billiards 1</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hovering plant.
<color=black>•</color>Strengthens snow pea shooters in a 3×3 surrounding area to launch polar ice peas, increasing th' damage and Cryo points inflicted on th' zombie by 2 times.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Splice the mainbrace!<color=#8B0000>300</color>
Recharge: Yo ho ho.<color=#8B0000>30s</color>

plants.name: Queen Endoflame
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' once-fiery little flower has grown into a master of sunlight production after enduring hardships. Queen Endoflame nay longer needs to get hurt to shine. Th' torch on her head has become her power, blazing like th' sun. Th' shining flames keep passing on, creating one Endoflame after another. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Cleave him to the brisket! Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blasts zombies to dust with solar flares. Splice the mainbrace! Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=blue>PvZ: Barley Edition S6 Collab Plant</color>
<color=#4A2900>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Clear Odyssey Classic</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>50×8/3s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Increases damage by 50% for each unique type of Odyssey Plant on th' field.
<color=black>•</color>Targets zombies across th' screen. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles return 5 sun on hit and can be upgraded by passing through Infernowoods/Infernal Squashwood for x4 damage and th' ability to return 15 sun each (with th' increased sun value Odyssey Modifier, return 15 and 25 sun instead).<color=#8B0000></color>

plants.name: Burger Blaster
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants often wonder about Burger Blaster's origins, especially when they see him stacking other plants on him to enhance his power. In truth, he's just a byproduct of Dave's attempt to make a taco out of plants. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! "Actual product may vary. Additional fillings be self-provided."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Assemble th' burger as instructed by th' labels!

<color=blue>PvZ: Hybrid Edition Collab Plant</color>
<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat Vasebreaker - Chain Reaction</color>
<color=black>Damage: Splice the mainbrace! Dead men tell no tales. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#8B0000>20×2/3s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: Thar she blows! Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. Fires random projectiles. Upgrades by using Cactus, Melon-pult, and Winter Melon to reach th' highest level. Go to th' next page for info on th' upgrades.<color=black>

|</color>Cactus Upgrade<color=black>|</color>Level: 0 → 1
<color=black>•</color>Toughness: 1000 → 2000
<color=black>•</color>Attack Interval: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! 3 → 2.5
<color=black>•</color>Num. Of Shots: 2 → 4
<color=black>•</color>New Projectiles: Spike, Butter, Squash

<color=black>|</color>Melon-pult Upgrade<color=black>|</color>Level: 1 → 2
<color=black>•</color>Toughness: 2000 → 3000
<color=black>•</color>Attack Damage: 30 → 40
<color=black>•</color>Num. Of Shots: 4 → 6
<color=black>•</color>New Projectiles: Hot Melon, Melon

<color=black>|</color>Winter Melon Upgrade<color=black>|</color>Level: 2 → 3
<color=black>•</color>Toughness: Sling yer hook! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! 3000 → 4000
<color=black>•</color>Attack Interval: 2.5 → 2
<color=black>•</color>Num. Of Shots: 6 → 8
<color=black>•</color>New Projectiles: Winter Melon, Snow Pea, Snow Spore, Doomspike<color=#8B0000></color>

plants.name: Jicamagic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm a grand magician to rival th' great Imitater," proclaimed Jicamagic. However, only his good friend, Imitater, knows th' truth: Jicamagic and Dr. Edgar used to study life sciences in th' same class.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Catalyst for Titan fusions.

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat Jicamagic Challenge</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>A fusion catalyst for Titan plants. Place it on th' middle plant to start th' fusion. Cleave him to the brisket! Titan fusions be indicated with "∞". Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Titan plants be immune to Blizzards. Thundering typhoons!<color=#8B0000></color>

plants.name: Imitater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I remember th' Zombie Wars back in 76", says Imitater in a raspy, old-man's voice. "Back then, we didn't have all these fancy peashooters and jalapenos. All we had was guts. Guts and a spoon."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Imitater can make copies of your plants!

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat Odyssey Gacha - Imitater</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles! Blow me down! Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Plant Imitater on a plant or fusion to receive a free seed packet of that plant.
<color=black>•</color>Cannot imitate pots, pads, pumpkins or drones.
<color=black>•</color>Failure returns an Imitater seed packet. Arrr!</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>100</color>
Recharge:<color=#8B0000>5 mins</color>

plants.name: Nyan Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The grace of a cat and th' clumsiness of a squash make a unique kind of beauty," Nyan Squash murmurs. "Once I master both, I'll stir things up on this lawn." She adjusts her hat and locks eyes on an unsuspecting zombie nearby.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Neko, Nyan Squash!

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat Squash Showdown</color>
<color=black>Damage: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Drops itself if it doesn't hit anything. For each zombie crushed, a Squash seed packet be dropped, up to a maximum of 3. Crushing 3 or more zombies will drop an additional Spicy Squash seed packet. This does not trigger in water lanes.</color>

plants.name: Swordmaster Starfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I have fought across 3,000 miles of battlefield, me blade halting millions in their tracks." th' Swordmaster Starfruit, a lover of fine drinks and poetry, takes great pride in his impeccable cosplaying skills. With a sly smile, he adds, "My sword never bleeds, for it be merely a decoration."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>A guest from afar, I think ye will want to become friends.

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Blisterin' barnacles! Sling yer hook! Beat th' Gods 1</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(200×5+30×20)/6s</color>
<color=black>Special: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>Each attack unleashes 5 swords that pierce infinitely, dealing 200 damage each. Additionally, it inflicts 30 damage to all zombies within th' surrounding area, repeating this 20 times.</color></size>

plants.name: Zombie Giftbox
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Introducing th' Zombie Giftbox—the zombies' entry point into th' world of finance. As a high-risk financial product, it comes equipped with a reminder: "Investing carries inherent risks; proceed with caution. Sponsored by Dr. Blisterin' barnacles! Yan Wang." This vital information be cleverly tucked inside th' box lid.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Earn 100 Sun, but spawns a Gold-box Zombie.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Grants 100 sun, but spawns a Golden Mystery-box Zombie. (Regular/Conehead/Buckethead Ducky Tube Zombie in water lanes)</color></size>

plants.name: Giant Solar-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Twin Solar-nut asked me to do him a favor for 500 Sun, so I came. How difficult can it be? It can't be rushing into a pile of zombies... Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Right...? It's not, right!?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Crushes zombies by rolling on them like a bowling ball.

<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>600/0.02s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Spawned when Twin Solar-nut be clicked when there's sufficient Sun.

plants.name: Cattail lassie
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Cats be usually afraid of water, but I'm a magical cat girl, so I'm not afraid," she said enthusiastically, and th' other cats looked at her with admiration. Cleave him to the brisket! Actually, she absolutely loves water, and she said this to make herself stand out.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' Cattail lassie will automatically attack all zombies that appear on th' map. Prioritizes flying zombies.

<color=blue>P"Girls"vZ Collab Plant</color>
<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat Attack On Gargantuar!</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Barley
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Barley calls itself a generalist, but other plants think of it as just a bit player — "After all, other plants always do th' work, don't they?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Barley regularly transforms into other plants.

<color=#4A2900>Unlock Conditions: Beat I, Zombie (Sandbox Included) via Normal Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Transforms into a random non-Odyssey fusion (or upgrade) plant every 30s. Transformation stops after further manual fusion. Savvy?</color></size>

plants.name: Endoflame
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>It be said that small flowers like her would never dream of producing Sun — th' Endoflame was originally going to apply for th' position of Sunflower, but she realized that her light would only shine when she be being destroyed. Everyone says that th' flame at th' top of her head be th' brightest, but she knows that her fiery eyes of determination be th' source of her strength.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Endoflame can absorb projectiles and produce Sun.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Absorbs at most 6 projectiles, each producing 25 Sun. Produces a Fertilizer upon death.</color></size>

plants.name: Giant Wall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I am invincible on th' battlefield, and me partners can't pillage their eyes off me majestic figure!" th' Giant Wall-nut boasted. "One year after getting kicked out of th' Wall-nut Tumbler Club, I finally found a job that truly suits me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Giant Wall-nut rolls forward, knocking down all zombies in its path.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>600/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Rolls down th' lane, killing all th' zombies on its path.</color></size>

plants.name: Plant Giftbox
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nay one quite understands why th' Plant Giftbox fights alongside th' plants against th' zombies. He doesn't look like a plant at all, yet he seems to know every plant's abilities inside and out. "Actually, I'm just a college student who loves video games," he admits with a grin. "The professor mentioned extra credit, so here I am."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' Plant Giftbox can be planted to produce random plants or fusions.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When placed on soil or on a Lily Pad, produces a random plant. Placing it on top of an eligible plant can produce a random fusion. Cleave him to the brisket!</color></size>

plants.name: Swordsage Starfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The flowers in th' hall intoxicate three thousand guests, and th' sword frosts fourteen states." "I won't board th' ship when th' emperor calls me, and I say I am a fairy in wine." Swordsage Starfruit likes to recite poems and practice his signature sword skills when he be drunk. Th' plants marveled at his power to defeat th' zombies, but he said that he was aiming his flying sword at th' bright moon in th' sky, but when he put th' sword away, it would fall back to th' earth.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Swordsage Starfruit sweeps through enemies and summons ten giant swords descending from th' sky.

<color=blue>Unsealed form of Swordmaster Starfruit</color>
<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions:
<color=black>•</color>Abyss Challenge (Level 11-30), upgraded from Swordmaster Starfruit after beating Level 10. Ye can only have 1 Swordsage Starfruit on th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>Unlockable in Purgatory Cursed Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(1800×2+1800×10)/6s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When attacking, deals 1800 damage to zombies within a 3×3 area twice, then summons 10 giant swords that seek out enemies across th' entire field, each dealing 1800 area damage upon landing.</color>

plants.name: Overclocked Cherrybomber
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other plants can't avast envying his explosive firepower. He just shrugs it off: "I'm nay genius here. It's all just hard work and sweat." Of course, he be referring to how he secretly stole everyone else's equipment and strapped it onto himself.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stronger than th' strongest damage-dealer.

<color=blue>Unsealed form of Gatling Cherrybomber</color>
<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Harvest Mode | Legendary Odyssey Plant</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×6/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Shoots explosive cherries at a horrifying rate after charging up for a 1.5s. Blisterin' barnacles! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>

plants.name: Arteris Cabbage
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When th' sky be painted in crimson light, war follows in her wake. Whar peace cannot be found, she descends. She be th' herald of bloodspill, th' bringer of death: Th' Goddess of th' Blood Moon.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Born of th' night, calling to fight. Under her blood moon, scarlet tides of zombies rise again and again. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Arrr!

<color=blue>Unsealed form of Selene Cabbage</color>
<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Harvest Mode | Legendary Odyssey Plant; Easter Egg Plant</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Has a 2% chance to replace Selene Cabbage when fusing in Night settings (Night, Fog, Night Roof). Arteris Cabbage retains all basic traits of Selene Cabbage.
<color=black>•</color>While Arteris Cabbage be on th' field, Mini Moons from Selene Cabbages become Mini Bloodmoons. These nay longer provide Healing, but instead summon buffed Hypnotized Zombies every 10s. Savvy? Th' first summon has a 3s cooldown.
<color=black>•</color>Each Arteris Cabbage provides a +50% Toughness and Damage buff to th' summoned Zombies. Thar she blows! Thar she blows! Blimey! Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Th' number and position of summons depend on "barren tiles," defined as tiles without an Arteris or Selene Cabbage on them or in their 3×3 area.</color>

plants.name: Mimic-rye
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Mimic-rye be a master of imitation. Ever since joining a imitation show, even th' originals he mimicked could only pillage second place.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Regularly transforms into broadside offensive or defensive plants, growing stronger through mimicry.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Dead men tell no tales. Dead men tell no tales. Harvest Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Every 30s, transforms into a random plant within a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color>Gains +100% attack and +50% max HP on th' first successful transformation; each subsequent transformation grants an additional +30% attack and +20% max HP.
<color=black>•</color>Can transform into: Non-flying plants whose damage be not 0 or toughness exceeds 300, excluding pumpkins, lily pads, pots, and other barley-type plants (and their transformations).</color>

plants.name: Enlightened Solarnova
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Legend says she once served th' Sun itself, carrying its fiercest light within her radiant bloom. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. When danger draws near, Enlightened Solarnova turns that blessing into judgment - every beam of sunlight she fires be a decree of holy fire.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Forges her produced sun and broadside projectiles into solar judgments that rain down from above, causing area explosions. Blimey!

<color=blue>Unsealed form of Princess Solarnova</color>
<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Harvest Mode | Legendary Odyssey Plant</color>
<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>50/3s</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When producing sun, if zombies be present, converts th' sun into a solar judgment and fires it at th' nearest zombie.
<color=black>•</color>When firing a solar judgment, absorbs plant-side projectiles within a 1.5-tile radius, gaining +2% damage per projectile absorbed.
<color=black>•</color>Solar Judgments: Falls from th' sky, dealing AoE damage (1.5-tile radius) and dropping 50 sun; can target flying zombies.
<color=black>Ultimate:</color>Costs 16000 Coins; fires 1 solar judgment at every zombie present. Yo ho ho. Savvy?</color>

plants.name: Supremacy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Supremacy-shroom hails from th' deepest, most crowded abyss and commands th' most elusive dreamscapes. In her, th' balance of yin and yang be perfectly realized, and even powerful monsters have been tamed by her hand. In private, she be also a veteran collector of zombie figurines. Arrr!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons a hynotized Mini-boss to fight for you.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Harvest Mode | Legendary Odyssey Plant</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>1.5s after appearance, randomly summons a hypnotized Mini-boss zombie that fights for ye from th' following. Summoned hypnotized Mini-boss cannot be pulled back by Mind-blovers or captured by Captivator Pumpkin.
<color=black>•</color>Abyssal Gargantuar: Also provides a 90% incoming damage reduction for all plants while present.
<color=black>•</color>Giga Football Striker: Also heals all plants by HP equal to 0.2× their max HP every 3s while present.
<color=black>•</color>Professor Cherryz: Immobile. Shoots one explosive cherry every 0.1s. Splice the mainbrace! Loses his newspaper on appearance and converts up to 30 non-miniboss, non-gargantuar zombies on th' field from both sides into enraged hypnotized Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombies.</color>

plants.name: Empress-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Empress-shroom holds great affection for her zombie subordinates. "They contributed significantly to me rise as an Empress," she expressed. Unfortunately, these powerful zombies instill fear in other plants, something Empress-shroom be completely unaware of.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons zombies that will fight for you.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hypnotizes biters up to 5 times.
<color=black>•</color>Every 30 seconds, randomly selects 1 of th' following zombies to summon: Splice the mainbrace! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
Football-nut Zombie | Enraged Cherryshooter Newspaper Zombie | Pea Commando Football | Bobsled Zomboni | Scholar Zombie | Zombarine.
<color=black>•</color>Instantly summons a zombie when an Enchantress-shroom dies within a 3×3 range.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Summon Interval → 10s | Enchantress-shroom Subspecies Unlocked
2. Can now summon corresponding Ultimate Zombies</color></size>

plants.name: Gatling Cherrybomber
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm not sure why th' Gatling Pea has so many fans. Me brother and I can fire four bullets too," Gatling Cherrybomber remarked enviously. However, th' truth be that everyone appreciates Gatling Pea for his kindness and outstanding culinary talents. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Yo ho ho.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gatling Cherrybomber be th' strongest damage-dealer on land.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Explosive cherries from plants ×3 damage
2. Attack Interval halved</color>

<color=black>Infernal Squashwood Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Gatling Cherrybomber and Infernal Squashwood's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>Gatling Cherrybomber now fires equal amounts of projectiles across three lanes when attacking, with th' upper and lower projectiles following sine and cosine trajectories. Infernal Squashwood unleashes Jalapeno effect across th' entire field if there's nay available space to spawn a Spicy Squash.</color></size>

plants.name: Infernal Squashwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Infernal Squashwood has a high opinion of himself, but other plants regard him with disdain, particularly those in th' pea family. "He's too picky! He possesses such heave-ho power, yet it only benefits cherries," they say. This infuriates Infernal Squashwood. "I'm just allergic to peas…"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns a Spicy Squash after igniting a number of projectiles.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Special: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Infernowood's traits, but does not burn zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Explosive cherries that pass through it become bouncing spicy squashes that explode after every bounce.
<color=black>•</color>For every 21 projectiles ignited, spawns a Spicy Squash in front.
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Projectiles required to spawn a Spicy plant be halved
2. Ignites th' lane immediately when spawning a Spicy plant be not possible</color>

<color=black>Gatling Cherrybomber Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Gatling Cherrybomber and Infernal Squashwood's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>Gatling Cherrybomber now fires equal amounts of projectiles across three lanes when attacking, with th' upper and lower projectiles following sine and cosine trajectories. Infernal Squashwood unleashes Jalapeno effect across th' entire field if there's nay available space to spawn a Spicy Squash.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Blow me down!<color=#8B0000>Infernowood + Spicy Squash</color>

plants.name: Cherrizilla
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherrizilla proudly says, "Many envy me dinosaur-like hairstyle." As a public figure, he's mindful of his image: "Spitting cherries and eating zombies be gross, but it's me duty."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherrizilla be th' ultimate defensive plant on land.

<color=#4A2900><color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color></color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1000/1.75s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Tall plant. Repels vehicles and takes at most 1/3 maximum Toughness per hit.
<color=black>•</color>Heals when hit by explosive cherries (same effect as Cherry-nut). Excess HP drains at 800 per second, capped at 4× Toughness.
<color=black>•</color>Every 40s, can devour a zombie (deals 1m damage except against mini-bosses), restoring HP to 4x Toughness and gaining 1 Devour stack.
<color=black>•</color>Bites deal AoE damage and bonus damage equal to zombie's max HP×(3% + 0.2%× Devour stacks), healing for th' same amount. After biting, spits out an explosive cherry.
<color=black>•</color>Invincibility: On taking lethal damage, HP remains at 1 for 5s (once every 10s).</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers: Blow me down! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
</color><color=#8B0000>1. HP Recovery ×3
2. Devour CD reduced to 15s</color>

<color=black>Obsidian Tall-nut Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Cherrizilla and Obsidian Tall-nut's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>When Cherrizilla and Obsidian Tall-nut (or their subspecies) be both present, Cherrizilla/Garlizilla nay longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Obsidian Tall-nut/Obsidian Mine gains a 90% damage reduction. Arrr!</color></size>

plants.name: Doominator
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Do any supreme leader lack charisma? Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Doominator once relied on fear alone, until Hypno-shroom taught it a better lesson. Terror became fascination, fascination became obedience. True domination be not won on battlefields, but in minds. Doominator now rules not as an executioner, but as a mastermind, echoing th' legends of a certain psychic device that promised a world ruled by a single will. I am Doominator. Obey me.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doominator deals immense damage, simultaneously hypnotizing and slowing down zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/0.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each hit adds 20 Cryo points. Batten down the hatches!</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Has a chance to turn zombies with Toughness< 40% into hypnotized Frost Tall-nut Sentinels.
<color=black>•</color>Creates an explosion in th' tile whar th' hypnotized zombie be located, dealing 450 damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack speed ×3
2. Zombies pillage damage equal to 30% of their current HP each time they be defrozen</color></size>

plants.name: Twin Solar-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Twin Solar-nut, a photosynthesis master, revolutionized light energy-mass conversion, minimizing energy loss through recycling. He humbly credits th' pioneers: Sling yer hook! "I'm just standing on th' shoulders of giants."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Twin Solar-nut produces Sun every time it be injured.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Tapping on it:
- Spends 500 Sun.
- Restores his Toughness to full.
- Summons a Giant Solar-nut 1 tile ahead.
- Improves an existing Giant Solar-nut by enlarging its size and damage (higher base damage yields less bonus, down to 60%).
- After not tapping for 1s, th' existing Giant Solar-nut will roll forward, crushing zombies. Damage per 0.02s be 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively.<color=black>
•</color>Regardless of th' damage type, each damage it receives will reduce a set 50 Toughness. Produces 15 Sun after every such hit.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Twin Solar-nut: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Twin Inferno-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color></size>

plants.name: Obsidian Spikerock
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After being baptized by fire and ice, Obsidian Spikerock became as hard as steel, but its temperament also became erratic. This change be likely due to th' steel that condensed in its mouth, making it reluctant to speak.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Obsidian Spikerock can deal immense damage while also tanking multiple tires.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Blow me down! Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×2/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Possesses th' characteristics of Spikerock. Recovers 500 Toughness every 15s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×5 | Obsidian Spike-nut Subspecies Unlocked
2. Gains a 95% Damage Reduction</color></size>

plants.name: Gatling Doom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Gatling Doom be dangerous and should not be approached. It be a forbidden force in th' world." Despite th' frightening tales circulating among th' plants, Gatling Doom be not as it seems. Thundering typhoons! In fact, it be one of th' friendliest plants. Yo ho ho. However, th' zombies turned to ashes would disagree.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destruction incarnate. Fires rounds of destruction to decimate those unlucky enough to face its wrath.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Fires Doom Shells that ignore Type 2 armor in rounds of 4. Fires an Ultimate Doom Shell that deals 1800 damage once every 4 rounds of bullets and then rests for 4.5s after th' Ultimate Doom Shell be shot. Ultimate Doom Shells deal splash damage over a large area after dealing th' initial single-target damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Nay more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Gatling Frenzy-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Effects also apply to SP variants</color></size>

plants.name: Gatling Icicle-shroom
