plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' little puff-shrooms who once shouted, "We be going to join th' army!" have matured into veterans with resolute eyes. Wherever and whenever, th' Gatling Icicle-shroom Company be committed to ensuring that th' mission be accomplished.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can be stacked three times to shoot 12 icicles at once!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×4×3/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each hit adds 5 Cryo points. Icicles deal 4 times more damage to frozen enemies. Each icicle can pierce 2 times.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Increased penetration to infinite times, th' first 5 hits of horizontal shots each split into 2 new bullets at ±15°, dealing (20 × split count)% more damage.
2. Increased damage to Frozen and chill-immune zombies by 12x | Gatling Sunburst-shroom Subspecies Unlocked</color></size>

plants.name: Magnetar
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nay one knows whar Magnetar be from, but one thing's for sure: He was not responsible for th' dinosaurs. Not at all!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Why th' heck be thar a meteor on me lawn!?

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×5/1s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System:</color><color=#8B0000>+20 Damage per Lumos Level.</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System:</color><color=#8B0000>+5% Damage per Magnetic plant in th' same system.
Both systems can increase th' damage of th' stars by up to a max of 300.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Summons a meteor every 15s, dealing 1800 damage upon impact. Splits into multiple stars that home in on zombies and deal 100 damage each. Inherits aircraft-downing ability from Magnethorn and can also shoot down tridents.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack Interval → 0.5s
2. Lv1: Savvy? Base damage ×2 and damage cap (300) increased to 3000; Lv2: Base damage ×3, damage cap removed</color>

<color=black>Helios Cabbage Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Magnetar and Helios Cabbage's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k. Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>With at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Helios Cabbages on th' field, Magnetars summon a Helios Meteor instead, and th' Mini Sun from Helios Cabbage nay longer disappears and deals 5× damage.
<color=black>•</color>Helios Meteor: (1800 + 1800 × Magnetars) × (1 + 0.2 × Helios Cabbages) Damage, and drops 1250 Sun.</color>
<color=black>Selene Cabbage Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Magnetar and Helios Cabbage's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>With at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Selene Cabbages on th' field, th' Mini Moon from Selene Cabbage nay longer disappears. Each Magnetar and Selene Cabbage channels a beam into th' Mini Moon, which merges them into a single concentrated beam. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>Beam Damage: 100 × (channeling plants) every 0.02s, always locking onto th' zombie with th' highest max HP. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Damage scales linearly over time when focusing a single target.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Sling yer hook! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>Stardrop + Magnethorn</color>

plants.name: Shroomageddon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Nuclear deterrence be beneficial. Someday, zombies will avast attacking out of fear of me self-detonation," Shroomageddon claimed confidently. Sadly, all th' radiation did was turn it into a grotesque monstrosity vaguely resembling a legendary mutated cephalopodic calamity that flattened cities. Still, it was evident that Shroomageddon failed to understand that zombies wouldn't initiate a Cold War just because of some cold breeze.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays deadly fumes all around, bringing ultimate destruction. Beware! Dead men tell no tales.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(100+100×8)×4/1.9s</color>
<color=black>Damage Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×3</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: Cleave him to the brisket! Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 5 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Sprays spores, which then explode (both deal penetrating damage). An explosion occurs upon death, dealing 1800 cremator damage and freezing all zombies on th' screen.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Explosion damage on death → 1M
2. Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Doom-shroom explosion</color></size>

plants.name: Laser Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Magnet-shroom's power remains unmatched," said Laser Pumpkin. "After all, composite armor, electromagnetic catapults, and plasma guns came nearly a century after aircraft carriers." Other plants envied Laser Pumpkin's high-tech gear, but only Magnet-shroom knew his power came from a Magnetar meteorite.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns laser drones that home in on enemies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>200/1.5s (Drone)
200/1s (Wingman)
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System:</color> <color=#8B0000>When part of a Magnetic System with a Omni Pumpkin or any Metal-infused Pumpkin (including th' Joker Pumpkin part of Pumpkin Bunker), gains their special traits. Additionally, assimilates all but one Omni Pumpkin in th' same system into a Laser Pumpkins every 30s (first time 10s).</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Always has a Laser Drone wingman with him when he appears. Generates a Laser Drone on top of a tile around a 3×3 area every 30s (first time 10s).
<color=black>•</color>Reflects 100 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Wingmen Amount → 3
2. Wingmen & drones damage ×3</color></size>

plants.name: Laser Drone
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thanks to Laser Pumpkin, now we have an entire arsenal of hi-tech equipment! Pillage a look at these beauties: Composite alloy armor, electromagnetic rotor, and plasma railgun... Shiver me timbers! Wait, NO!!! THAT WAS me FAVORITE VASE!!! Savvy?</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Laser Drones shoot piercing lasers to attack. Savvy?

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>200/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Obsidian Tall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Rather than seeking his best friend's protection, this plant prefers to protect him. With a hard, gem-like body and steadfast gaze forged by Obsidian Tall-nut's own soul, he endured th' trials of ice and fire. Though his body may wear down one day, he's determined to keep other plants safe.</color></size></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' Obsidian Tall-nut has four times th' defense of a normal Tall-nut.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Restores 1500 Toughness every 15s.
<color=black>•</color>Tall plant. Anti-crush, taking a maximum of 200 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color>When one Obsidian Tall-nut receives damage, it be shared and divided among all Obsidian Tall-nuts and Obsidian Mines on th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>Recovers 10% lost HP when affected by Ice-shrooms or Jalapenos.
<color=black>•</color>Blocks Balloon Zombies from passing, forcing them onto th' ground.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Splice the mainbrace! Cleave him to the brisket! Max HP Cap ×3
2. Redirects damage dealt to adjacent plants in th' same lane to itself</color>

<color=black>Cherrizilla Synergy Modifier: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Cherrizilla and Obsidian Tall-nut's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>When Cherrizilla and Obsidian Tall-nut (or their subspecies) be both present, Cherrizilla/Garlizilla nay longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Obsidian Tall-nut/Obsidian Mine gains a 90% damage reduction.</color></size>

plants.name: Wither-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After overcoming past struggles, Wither-pult now aims for a calm life. "All I want now be to watch classic movies and live in peace."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Capable of rapid-fire and spread-fire volleys of projectiles.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>120/2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>42% chance of rapid-firing. Blisterin' barnacles! Has an equal chance to spread-fire in a number equal to th' number of zombies in its lane.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles deal an additional 5×(target Poison value) damage and inflict 1 Poison point.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles then split into garlic cabbage, garlic kernel (25% garlic butter), and garlic melon upon impact.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Spread-fire be now guaranteed
2. Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison th' zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed</color>

plants.name: Cob-literator
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Clad in icy armor and dark as a warning, each shot from Cob-literator brings destruction. Zombies hit by it need not prepare—nothing will remain after th' flash.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Possesses earth-shattering power.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Main Blast: 1800 in a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color>Additional: 1800 + 30% of th' Zombies' max HP across th' entire screen.
<color=black>•</color>Side Gun: 360×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time:</color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Infuses all plants across th' field with Ice-shroom (prioritized)/Doom-shroom (except Pumpkins and Flower Pots).
<color=black>•</color>Side cannon inflicts Chill and adds 10 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Main Blast damage ×4
2. Reload Time → 12s</color>

plants.name: Midas Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>From its appearance, ye can tell that Midas Umbrella has a knack for business. Blimey! "That's right, me hat of emerald was a trade item I exchanged with someone from a place full of blocks..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A combination of Alchemist Umbrella and Umbrella Kale.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Has th' traits of both its ingredients. Thundering typhoons!
<color=black>•</color>Receives 75% less damage from Tridents.
<color=black>•</color>Bouncing projectiles now increases their damage by 100%. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Also allows projectiles to hit zombies in th' two adjacent lanes.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Alchemist Ultimate ability, but can instantly kill zombies below 50% max HP.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:<color=#8B0000>
1. Bounced projectiles additional Damage 100% → 300%
2. Activates ultimate automatically free of charge if zombies be near, 7.5s cooldown | Aegis Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Yo ho ho.<color=#8B0000>Alchemist Umbrella + Umbrella Kale</color>

plants.name: Enchantress-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' subjects of th' Empress-shroom be captivated by th' Enchantress-shroom's mysterious power. Batten down the hatches! "She's not just me advisor; she's th' force that keeps our kingdom thriving. Her magic isn't just powerful—it's explosive", th' Empress-shroom declared. In truth, th' Enchantress-shroom simply delights in blowing up any unruly dissenters who dare resist her charm. Blow me down!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons exclusively explosive zombies to fight for you!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Empress-shroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Th' same as Empress-shroom, but only summons Cherryshooter Newspaper Zombie/Zombarine/Gatling Cherry Newspaper/Gatling Explode-o-rider zombies. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Immediately summons a zombie when an Empress-shroom dies in a 3×3 range.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Summon Interval → 10s | Enchantress-shroom Subspecies Unlocked
2. Can now summon corresponding Ultimate Zombies</color>

plants.name: Charred Threepeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' flames consume his broken body, each breath a torment, yet th' Charred Threepeater stands tall. He believes th' fire within will achieve eternal glory in one final, grand explosion.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charred Threepeater awaits his rebirth. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Blow me down! Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Loses attack capabilities after being thoroughly burnt.</color>

plants.name: Phoenix Threepeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nay one knows if fire truly brings rebirth to plants—it's just a legend. Those who chased it turned to ash, until he became th' new legend. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. "I don't know how many times I must endure th' flames to succeed, but for them, I have to."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>From fire reborn!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>160×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ignites th' whole lawn upon entry.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles inflict th' Enflamed debuff and pierce 2 times.
<color=black>•</color>Its damage be doubled after passing through an Infernal Squashwood.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict th' debuff
2. Phoenix peas can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions | Phoenix Drone Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Pulsar
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Pulsar has mastered electromagnetism with Magnetar. "It's not rocket science—left-hand force, right-hand electricity", it boasted. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. "And don't forget th' moving magnet—trust th' smartest plant around!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pulsar pulls stars, accelerates them and launches at zombies at maximum force. Savvy?

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Magnetar</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Magnetar.
<color=black>•</color>Storage Limit - 60 | Acceleration Time - 1.5s | Damage ×3 | Projectile Speed ×2</color>

plants.name: Garlizilla
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dressed in plain clothes with a gaudy gold tooth, one word from him sends others fleeing. Savvy? "Garlick me, I've had enough of th' spotlight. Standing out doesn't suit me anymore—I just want a quiet, simple life."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cousin to th' ultimate defensive plant on land.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Cherrizilla</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1000/1.75s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits garlic properties, and shoots projectiles that poison zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Cherrizilla. Inherits all its traits but shoots Toxic Garlic Bombs with 300 AoE damage that stack 1 Poison point and apply Garlic Butter effect instead.
<color=black>•</color>Nay longer heals from cherry explosions but still immune.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Heal amount ×3
2. Devour CD reduced to 15s</color>

plants.name: Blast Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry? Pumpkin? Or a hybrid born of fusion? Th' Blast Pumpkin doesn't bother with such details. For him, Halloween be all about handing out juicy cherries to th' good kids and cherry bombs to th' naughty ones—nothing else matters. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blast-proof pumpkin.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Laser Pumpkin</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Laser Pumpkin. Inherits other traits but nay longer spawns Laser Drones or assimilates Omni Pumpkins, instead spawns self-destructing wingmen every 30s that seek out zombies and explode like a Cherry Bomb.
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs damage from cherry explosions to heal from them and protect plants in itself from cherry explosions.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Wingmen Amount → 3</color>

plants.name: Aegis Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Many question th' relationship between Midas Umbrella and Aegis Umbrella. "We're brothers!" Aegis confidently declares, thumping its canopy. Dead men tell no tales. Arrr! "My dear elder brother be just going through a rough patch emotionally."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Reflects projectiles from zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Midas Umbrella's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Midas Umbrella.
<color=black>•</color>Loses th' ability to buff lobbed projectiles and attract tridents. Instead, gains a 90% Damage Reduction and th' ability to reflect projectiles (except tridents) from zombies.</color></color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:<color=#8B0000>
2. Activates ultimate automatically free of charge if zombies be near, 7.5s cooldown | Aegis Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Charmatron
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>With th' power of love and friendship, even a rotting zombie with an unbeating heart would become our best m'hearty and greatest ally! Well, that and a copious amount of suspicious mind-altering spores powered by magnets of all things that be<b>DEFINITELY<b>Safe for human contact. Well, for now at least...
- TetsuDaPlanta (@tetsuchris)</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charisma maxima.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>80/2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles have a 1-tile splash radius with nay falloff and have a chance to hypnotize zombies. Thundering typhoons!
<color=black>•</color>Zombies that try to bite it be hypnotized instead.
<color=black>•</color>Feeding it metal objects grants 1 charge level for 30s, up to 2 charges.
<color=black>•</color>At Charge Level 1, it fires 2 shots per attack. At Charge Level 2, 4 shots. At Charge Level 3, 6 shots.
<color=#666699>Magnetic System: Thar she blows!</color>Each plant in th' same Magnetic System provides a 5% damage boost to its shots.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Hypnotization Toughness threshold increased from 50% to 100%
2. Attack Interval → 1s, Charge Level will not drop below 2 and can be fed metal to reach Charge Level 3 for 5 mins</color>

plants.name: Obsidian Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Obsidian Mine possesses immense power despite its size. He fears nay zombies. However, it has its troubles, as block people with diamond pickaxes often come to knock on its head.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Has extremely high Toughness and can block Diggers.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Obsidian Tall-nut</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Obsidian Tall-nut. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>When one Obsidian Mine receives damage, it be shared and divided among all Obsidian Tall-nuts and Obsidian Mines on th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>Anti-crush, taking a maximum of 200 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color>Blocks Digger Zombies. Sling yer hook! Forces them to emerge early.
<color=black>•</color>Releases a small potato explosion for every 1000 damage received (before damage reduction), dealing 500 damage to zombies in a small area.<size=36>

plants.name: Aristocattail
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I think it's better to use animal hair to keep myself above water than relying on, for example, a swim ring!" Aristocattail stands by her belief. Thar she blows! Arrr! Hmm... Blow me down! If ye think this be due to her poor academic skills and inability to stay afloat on th' river, you're right. How could a cat possibly swim! Shiver me timbers! Though she refuses to be categorized randomly.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons drones to attack every time she defeats a zombie.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>160×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Summons a drone every time she kills a zombie. Th' drone lasts for 3s, firing 60 nettle spikes that deal 160 damage each and cannot target flying zombies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Drone Attack Damage ×3
2. Yo ho ho. Arrr! Regular Attack Damage ×5 | Thunder Bunnyon Subspecies Unlocked</color><size=36>

plants.name: Apeacalypse Minigun
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Apeacalypse Minigun rarely interacts with people. It's not due to arrogance, but because people keep asking whether th' fire on his body be hot or cold, and whether he can create hot ice or cold fire. Splice the mainbrace! These questions bore him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Becomes stronger th' more Toughness it loses. Blimey! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>120×3/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Other plants cannot absorb damage for Apeacalypse Minigun. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Each shot fired inflicts 50 damage to self until Toughness be reduced to 500.
<color=black>•</color>Shots knock back zombies and pierce twice, with power halved per pierce.
<color=black>•</color>Fires faster as Toughness decreases and reaches maximum speed of 0.25s at 1/3 Toughness. If Toughness be further reduced, attack damage increases. Damage be capped at 480 at 0 Toughness.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Sling yer hook! Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
2. Increases projectile damage and knockback ×3</color><size=36>

plants.name: Calamity-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone wonders how Calamity-shroom subdues massive creatures to serve her. Endless destruction should bring silence... Blow me down! When questioned, she sits alone atop a tower, sipping her dreamy brew: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! "Oblivion? No, I simply grant them rebirth within illusions."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turn th' tide of battle!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Hypnotizes all zombies in range (same as Doom-shroom) and makes them explode upon death like Doom-shrooms.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. All Doom-shroom explosions be now craterless | Avarice-shroom Subspecies Unlocked
2. Now spawns 3 extra Hypnotized Gargantuars and Zombonis when it explodes</color><size=36>

plants.name: Gatling Sunburst-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Production be also part of th' fight!" said Gatling Sunburst-shroom, wiping its sweat. Its platoon has been reorganized into th' 'Sunshine Bay Construction Corps,' but their fighting spirit remains undiminished.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates a large amount of sun for you.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Gatling Icicle-shroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×4×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Gatling Icicle-shroom.
<color=black>•</color>Shots nay longer slow but instead drop 5 sun on hitting th' 1st and 2nd zombies. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>•</color>Each subsequent pierce deals 20 more damage but requires 5 sun per hit (does not consume Sun if th' total amount of Sun be below 15k).
<color=black>•</color>Synergizes with th' sun value doubling Odyssey Modifier and dropped suns be worth 15 each when th' modifier be active.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Blimey! Increased penetration to infinite times, th' first 5 hits of horizontal shots each split into 2 new bullets at ±15°, dealing (20 × split count)% more damage.
2. Gatling Sunburst-shroom Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Gatling Frenzy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Compared to th' composed demeanor of Gatling Doom, Gatling Frenzy-shroom has a much shorter temper, especially when someone calls her a "Gray Egg". She often yells "Quietus!" and charges into th' fray. Arrr!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Continuously fires Doom-shroom attacks at zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Blow me down! Batten down the hatches! Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Gatling Doom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s (0.25s Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Gatling Doom. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Each attack will shorten th' attack interval by 0.1s, to a minimum of 0.25s. Explodes when zombies get near.
<color=black>•</color>Fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 16 attacks, dealing 1800 damage, and then rests for 4.5s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Nay more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Gatling Frenzy-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

plants.name: Obsidian Spike-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Obsidian Spike-nut loves hugs. "A warm embrace can soothe even th' rowdiest of zombies," he says. And sure enough, every zombie he's hugged be now lying peacefully on th' lawn... Completely still.
plants.info:
<size=36>Defends against zombies and vehicles with its spikes. Dead men tell no tales.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Obsidian Spikerock's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Obsidian Spikerock.
<color=black>•</color>Reflects 100 (500 after unlock condition Modifier) damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color>Received damage be capped at 1000.
<color=black>•</color>Recovers 1500 Toughness every 15s.
<color=black>•</color>Can puncture tires, dealing 50% of th' maximum Toughness to th' vehicle zombie and repelling them.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×5 | Obsidian Spike-nut Subspecies Unlocked
2. Gains a 95% Damage Reduction</color></size>

plants.name: Tycoonwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Though still a small child, Tycoonwood returned from abroad with a showman's flair. His "turn a stone into gold" trick had audiences roaring with delight. Backstage, as he stirred a mysterious drink, he smirked and whispered, "It's kind of magic, actually."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turns all straight-shooting bullets into coin bullets! Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Converts all ordinary straight-shooting bullets encountered into 2 Silver Coins and 1 Gold Coin.
<color=black>•</color>Gold Coins will move in a straight line. Thundering typhoons! Silver Coins will split to th' top and bottom rows initially then join th' Gold Coins in th' middle row after 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color>Silver Coins will deal 50% of th' original bullet's damage and return 10 coins when hitting zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Gold Coins will deal 100% of th' original bullet's damage and return 30 coins when hitting zombies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Splice the mainbrace! 1% Damage increase to Coin projectiles for every 1000 Coins ye have
2. Tycoonwood's projectiles now deal splash damage | Magnate Plantern Subspecies Uunlocked</color>

plants.name: Thornminator
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thornminator be one of th' top hairstylists in town, revolutionizing botanical fashion with every masterpiece she crafts. "Real style takes real work," she says, twirling a carving knife between her fingers. Hammers and chisels may not be traditional hairstyling tools, but for her, they're essential for "fixing" even th' most stubborn strands.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Doom-hypno Ice Spikes. Avast ye! When planted, unleashes a barrage of Doom-hypno Ice Spikes.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Doominator</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each projectile inflicts chill and adds 20 Cryo points. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Doominator.
<color=black>•</color>Attacks pierce infinitely, prioritizes air units. Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Has a chance to hypnotize zombies and cause explosive damage—same effect as Doominator.
<color=black>•</color>When planted, scatter-shoots at most 80 Doom-Hypno Spikes, targeting both air and ground enemies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack damage ×3
2. Zombies pillage damage equal to 30% of their current HP each time they be defrozen</color>

plants.name: Helios Cabbage
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Sun God—lord of light and warmth, th' eternal ruler of th' heavens. Wherever he treads, darkness fades, and life flourishes under his radiant embrace. Suspended high above th' firmament, his indomitable glow pierces th' void, casting away despair and igniting hope in all who bask in his presence. Avast ye!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons a Mini Sun to attack zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×5/2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits th' traits of Solar-pult.
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Mini Sun every 30s. Th' Mini Sun lasts for 15s and deals 60+(40×Amount of Helios Cabbages) damage to all zombies every 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color>When Sun exceeds 15k, consumes 200 Sun to inflict triple th' damage each time th' Mini Sun damages zombies.
<color=black>•</color>When th' Mini Sun be present, th' drop rate of Sun in th' level be greatly increased (once every 0.75s).</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins; if thar be nay Mini Sun on th' field, summon it immediately. Otherwise, extend th' duration of th' Mini Sun by 15s. Only one Mini Sun can exist at a time.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Yo ho ho. When Sun exceeds 15k, each attack consumes 0.5% of th' excess to boost projectile damage by 20 per 1 Sun spent
2. Mini Sun deals 3× damage</color>

<color=black>Magnetar Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Magnetar and Helios Cabbage's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>With at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Helios Cabbages on th' field, Magnetars summon a Helios Meteor instead, and th' Mini Sun from Helios Cabbage nay longer disappears and deals 5× damage.
<color=black>•</color>Helios Meteor: (1800 + 1800 × Magnetars) × (1 + 0.2 × Helios Cabbages) Damage, and drops 1250 Sun.</color>

plants.name: Omni Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After a full-scale mechanical overhaul, Omni Pumpkin was a fortress on wheels. Composite armor? Shiver me timbers! Check. Iron reinforcements? Double check. Tactical interface? Ye bet. Everything was perfect... Until he caught a glimpse of his reflection. A crab. They turned him into a crab. Thundering typhoons! "Guys, seriously?! A little heads-up would've been nice!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin with many functions.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Cleave him to the brisket! Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color>
<color=#8B0000>Metal Plant. Yo ho ho. Sling yer hook! Has a multitude of traits.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Jack-in-the-Box explosions and protects th' plants inside as well.
<color=black>•</color>Forces Digger Zombies to come out of th' ground early.
<color=black>•</color>Halves damage from Cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color>Ye can use metal objects on it to heal it by 500.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. On entry, grants all connected Magnetic Plants a Shield equal to 30 × number of Magnetic Plants
2. Dead men tell no tales. Now counts twice towards th' number of Magnetic Plants</color>

plants.name: Radiant Pot
plants.introduce: Deep in th' garden, whar th' sun always shines, Radiant Pot stands in quiet devotion. He doesn't chatter, nor does he boast—he simply gives, weaving sunlight into golden coins, waiting patiently for ye to grow asRadiantAs he is.
plants.info:
<size=36>Can smartly generate a lot of Sun and Coins.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Produces 50 Sun and 300 Coins every n=(Current Sun/1000) Seconds, whar 3 ≤ n ≤ 15.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Golden Pot's Ultimate-syncing ability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Upgrade costs from Silver Pots to Golden Pots will not exceed 8000
2. Coins exceeding th' maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>Sunflower > Golden Pot</color>

plants.name: Pharos Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once th' beloved director of th' Plant Orphanage, she was more than just a caretaker—she was family. Her broad leaves were th' perfect playground for young sprouts, offering shade, comfort, and joy. Though those days have passed, her kindness remains. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! "Oh? Would ye like to try this marshmallow, me boy?" she asks, her warmth as enduring as ever.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots lasers to attack zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Energy Limit:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Search Range:</color><color=#8B0000>(2×Lumos Level+1) Rows</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>It has all th' traits of Lumos Umbrella. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Fires lasers to attack zombies, dealing 100% damage every second. Prioritizes air zombies, and deals ×3 damage to air targets. Dead men tell no tales. Can attack up to 4 zombies at a time. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Every 2s, consumes up to 10% max energy to heal up to 2 injured plants in a 3×3 area for 5% max HP (max 500). Healing increases by 100% per Lumos Level beyond 1.
<color=black>•</color>When two Pharos Umbrellas be positioned one above and one below, they will link together, and their detection range will expand to cover th' entire screen. In this state, th' two Pharos Umbrellas can simultaneously attack up to 6 zombies, and their damage be doubled. Additionally, if exactly 6 zombies be being attacked, a 3×3 explosion will occur at th' location of a random zombie every 6s, dealing 300% of th' attack power as damage. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Energy Limit ×10, Recovery Speed ×20, Healing Speed ×2 | Boreas Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
2. Normal Attack Damage ×3, Explosion Damage ×10, Attack Interval → 2s</color>

plants.name: Avarice-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"They told her not to open it. Naturally, she opened it." Avarice-shroom ran a finger along th' ornate lid, gilded and humming faintly with temptation. Whispers spilled from within—hunger, envy, ambition—all begging to be set free. With a smile too knowing to be innocent, she lifted th' seal. What emerged wasn't hope. It was profit. "Welcome, little monster," she whispered, as th' abyss stirred and a new fortune clawed its way out.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>She can summon Mini-boss zombies!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Calamity-shroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Calamity-shroom. Splice the mainbrace!
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Mini-boss Zombie depending on th' scene:
Day: Professor Cherryz | Night: Giga Football Striker | Pool: Jackson Worldwide | Fog: Skystrider Mecha | Roof Day: Pozeidon | Roof Dusk: Clown Jill-in-the-Box | Roof Night: Arrr! Ultra Mecha-nut
<color=black>•</color>At th' same time, summons its ordinary Odyssey variant on all rows.
<color=black>•</color>Defeating th' Mini-boss Zombie gives ye a ton of Sun, Coins, and points.
<color=black>•</color>Defeating an ordinary Odyssey variant gives ye 1 Plant Giftbox. Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>It can only be summoned once per round. Blow me down! This plant will not spawn from a Plant Giftbox.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Avarice-shroom Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Cherrybomber Drone
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Originally developed as a rapid-fire prototype for th' Gatling Cherrybomber, Cherrybomber Drone was recently upgraded to fire real cherry rounds to combat th' zombie surge—earning explosive acclaim. Dead men tell no tales.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides enhanced firepower when coordinated with shooter plants directly below.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Gatling Cherrybomber</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hovering plant and Subspecies of Gatling Cherrybomber.
<color=black>•</color>If th' plant directly below attacks faster than every 1.5s, its attack synchronizes with that plant's. Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>Maximum number of Cherrybomber Drones on th' lawn: (number of lanes×2)</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Explosive cherries from plants ×3 damage
2. Attack Interval halved</color>

<color=black>SP Gatling Frenzy-shroom Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Gatling Cherrybomber and Gatling Doom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>When Cherrybomber Drone and SP Gatling Frenzy-shroom be on th' same tile, they perform coordinated attacks, and th' former gains 0.05 energy while th' latter gains 0.1 energy. Energy drains at 0.3 per second. For th' first 7 whole points of energy, each increases th' number of shots fired during coordinated attacks by 1. Energy above 7 increases th' 8th bullet’s damage by ×(1 + excess point).</color>

plants.name: Napalm-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Napalm-Shroom isn’t just fire on th' battlefield—his BBQ skills be legendary. His dream? To host th' greatest barbecue party ever, with every plant and zombie in town invited.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs Napalm melons that split on impact and leave behind an inferno.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/6s + 30/0.02s (Inferno)</color>
<color=#720026>Enflamed Debuff:</color><color=#8B0000>Each melon creates an inferno zone that lasts for 2.5s.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Range: 4 tiles; Manual launch: Full board. After launching a Napalm melon, rests for 1.5s, then charges up for at least 6 seconds, increasing damage to 1+(charge time in seconds×50%) to a max of 30s. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>•</color>Attacks pierce all armor and split into 2 additional Napalm melons that target broadside zombies with th' same damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Thundering typhoons! Charging speed and max charging duration ×3
2. Inferno zone duration ×2</color>

plants.name: Kelptain Goldbeard
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Since sailin' back from th' Abyss, Kelptain Goldbeard be a changed beast - fiercer, greedier, an' twice as hearted. Savvy? Blimey! Cap'n o' th' cursed ship, th' Raidin' Goldplant, he bears two hearts, one torn from his own breast, t'other plundered from a fallen rival, and clutches a gilded giftbox stuffed with plunder from th' Seven Seas. Touch his hearts or his treasure, an' yer ship sinks straight to Davy Jones' Locker.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Greedy overlord of th' seven seas, capable of squeezing every last drop of value from zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×3/1.5s + Insta-kill (Drown) × ∞</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Retains all traits of Hydra Kelp, but can drag zombies underwater an infinite amount of times (up to once per second).
<color=black>•</color>Zombies hit by its projectiles turn golden—when they die, they grant ×3 Odyssey points. Max bonus: +2000 points per wave.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Savvy?</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Plants deal 5% more attack damage for every 1000 points owned (up to +300%)
2. Th' Odyssey shop now has a 30% discount on Modifiers</color>

plants.name: Buck-shroom Squad
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Buck-shrooms' worst fear finally came true—they really did get stuck to a Magnet-shroom, and nay one's been able to pull them off. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. But maybe it’s a blessing in disguise. With all th' materials th' Magnet-shroom collected, they've upgraded their gear and become a true "Steel Battalion."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A multi-purpose squad skilled in rapid fire, anti-air, and sniping!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Blow me down! Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80×4/1s (Machine gun); 240/2s (Flak cannon); 400/3s (Sniper)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Metal plant.
<color=black>•</color>Machine gun rounds knock back targets and deal additional damage based on th' current HP of their Type 2 armor. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Th' flak cannon targets only air units in its lane, dealing knockback and same-tile splash damage.
<color=black>•</color>Th' sniper attack shares th' same traits as Snipea. Blisterin' barnacles!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Sniper always headshots with a 1/3 chance to trigger rapid-fire, but attack CD increased to 7.5s
2. Flak cannon knockback ×2, splash damage ×3 | Buck-strike Squadron Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Quantum McCornics
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He was born at th' dawn of th' universe, his age beyond reckoning. From th' primordial void, he plucked three stars to orbit him as moons—treasures not even black holes could steal. Now, th' barnacle covered one finds joy in toying with this cosmic keepsake, as ancient as he is.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hurls ultra-dense black holes that collapse into explosions, releasing all th' absorbed energy. Blimey!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/2 s (Mini Butter)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Metal plant. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>75% chance to launch Mini Butter, shrinking non-miniboss zombies' size and HP to 70%. If shrinking fails, th' target be stunned for 1.5s. Instantly kills imp-class zombies.
<color=black>•</color>25% chance to launch an Ultimate Black Hole that lasts 2s, slows broadside zombies, and absorbs Quantum McCornics' projectiles in a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color>Each bullet absorbed adds 2s to its duration, up to 7.5s. When it vanishes, it triggers a large explosion (Cherry Bomb-sized) that deals 320 + 60% of stored damage. If it lasted over 5s, th' explosion radius significantly increases.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Ultimate Black Hole can absorb all projectiles
2. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Ultimate Black Hole's absorption radius ×2</color>
<color=black>Maelonstrom Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Quantum McCornics and Maelonstrom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k. Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Hail melons from Maelonstrom's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Quantum McCornics always lob Ultimate Black Holes.
<color=black>•</color>Singularity: Thundering typhoons! Lasts for 3.5s and deals 1800 Cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius when it collapses. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage.</color>

plants.name: Tesla Magnet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tesla Magnet commands iron with thunder and thunder with magnetic fields. He grants his people eternal magnetism and built a kingdom of electricity. Thundering typhoons! Yet beyond his military conquests and political achievements, he still suffers headaches in th' search for a queen with th' opposite charge.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Extremely magnetic, smartly absorbs metal objects and turns them into explosive cherries. Sling yer hook! Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits th' traits of Lumos Magnet, metal object absorption CD: 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color>Can pull th' pogo sticks from Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombies and convert them into Jack-in-the-Boxes; also pulls (insta-kills) Kirov Drones and converts them into Jack-in-the-Boxes.
<color=black>•</color>Deals 300 damage every 0.5s to 1 Giga Trident-nut Zombie or Giga Football-nut Zombie within range.
<color=black>•</color>Launches absorbed metal after 3s, dealing th' same damage and AoE as explosive cherries; with full-map targeting and anti-air capability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack Range ×2 | Dyson Magnet Subspecies Unlocked
2. Absorbs 3 Metal Objects at once, damage to Giga Trident-nut Zombies or Giga Football-nut Zombies ×3</color>

plants.name: Astro-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Astro-nut journeys through countless parallel worlds of th' multiverse and has seen numerous wonders — from a Sphinx that plays eerie music in forgotten deserts, to a skybound ruin whar a three-headed idol once stirred; from th' glowing meteorites near th' Tiberium shores to armored strongholds stamped with Z-Tech. He wanders through dreams, just beyond th' grasp of memory. Th' past fades — but here, he's quite ready for another adventure.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cosmic Wall-nut with time rewinding and extraordinary invulnerability abilities. Batten down the hatches!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Quantum McCornics</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Quantum McCornics, anti-crush and takes nay more than 1000 damage per hit. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>•</color>Rewinds to HP from 3s ago after taking 4000 damage and becomes invulnerable for 2s. Within 10s after a rewind, each rewind beyond th' third time costs 500 HP (Rewinds within this 10s window do not reset th' timer).
<color=black>•</color>33% chance to ignore incoming damage. Blimey! Has a 25% chance to teleport biters to th' rightmost tile in his lane (10s cooldown). Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>If HP falls below toughness, restores HP equal to 1× Toughness after 30 consecutive seconds without taking damage.</color>

plants.name: Apeacalypse Railgun
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He left behind th' ceaseless minigun for a railgun that fires with precise, silent power—channeling electromagnetic force sharp enough to remind some of Academy City's famed Railgun and a certain relentless shooter cloaked in black.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes HP to fire pulse rays with infinite penetration.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Apeacalypse Minigun</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×5/3s</color>
<color=black>Search Range:</color><color=#8B0000>±10° Horizontal Sector</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Apeacalypse Minigun, attacks pierce infinitely and can target air.
<color=black>•</color>If Toughness be greater than 500, each attack consumes 100 Toughness. Blisterin' barnacles! Other plants cannot absorb damage for Apeacalypse Railgun.
<color=black>•</color>Attack power scales linearly as Toughness drops, up to a max of 900.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
2. Increases projectile damage and knockback ×3</color>

plants.name: Lifereaver Spruce
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At th' heart of th' tundra stands th' Lifereaver Spruce, guardian of th' frozen wilds. For years, it has endured unyielding winters, its branches heavy with frost, crowned with delicate lotus blooms. Cleave him to the brisket! Even when playful newcomers etch runes across its bark, it remains steadfast and unshaken.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold gathers on spruce leaves, and lotuses bloom in th' trees. Blow me down!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>60/0.02s (lasts 5s)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom/blizzard respectively. Passively gains 1 ice charge every 5s.
<color=black>•</color>Fires a boreal reaper saw every 1.5s that turns into a homing shot on hit, with each instance of attack applying Deep Chill, adding 1 Cryo Point, and granting 1 ice charge.
<color=black>•</color>When ice charge exceeds 50, it depletes to 0 every 5s to heal all plants in a 3×3 area for (ice charge ÷ number of plants)×(0.3×shield + 0.7×HP).
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Boreal reaper saws now last for 15s
2. Healing be nay longer split among plants</color>

plants.name: Infernal Sparkwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Infernal Sparkwood may burn brighter than any flame, but it was futuristic cuisine that truly lit up th' competition. At th' Culinary Clash's grand finale, he shared his trophy with Astro-nut, whose time-travel snacks left th' judges starstruck. Even th' judge McCornics called it "out of this world."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Torchwood blazing with Starfruit flames, boasting extreme ignition power and granting star projectiles homing capabilities.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Infernal Squashwood</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Infernal Squashwood.
<color=black>•</color>Nay longer spawns Spicy Squashes. Every 51 projectiles affected spawns a Spicy Starfruit in front. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Ignites star projectiles (except spicy stars) for ×2 damage, but with original traits removed (except Magnetar stars' aircraft downing ability), granting global homing with anti-air priority. Batten down the hatches! Thundering typhoons!
<color=black>•</color>Explosive cherries become Explode-o-Stars: ×2 damage, global homing with anti-air priority.
<color=black>•</color>Affects other projectiles like Infernal Squashwood. Triggers Jalapeno effect on death.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Shiver me timbers! Projectiles required to spawn a Spicy plant be halved
2. Ignites th' lane immediately when spawning a Spicy plant be not possible</color>

plants.name: Atomheart Plantern
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After witnessing th' how much destructive power she could bring with her nuclear detonation and th' nuclear winter that followed, Atomheart Plantern decided to restrain her core reactor and applied for a quieter role as an electricity-free street light. Her constant Cherenkov glow was perfect for it. Unfortunately, zombies kept showing up, and she turned out to be very qualified for emergency use.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Plantern sealed with radioactive frost, releasing cold fusion reactions that become stronger with Lumos.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Shroomageddon</color>
<color=black>Damage: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>600/3s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>3×5, can target air</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks apply Deep Chill and add 30 Cryo Points.
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>Damage increases by 100% × Lumos level.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Shroomageddon. Switching form does not trigger on-death effects. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits of Plantern.
<color=black>•</color>When targeted by an Apeacalypse Railgun, refracts th' beam into three beams at 0° and ±10°: Applies Chill, each hit creates a 1-tile explosion dealing 5% of th' initial beam's damage
<color=black>•</color>Can store Lumos energy from Photon Splitters, up to 1000. When a Photon Splitters in a 3×3 area attacks, it consumes (1 + current energy/10) energy to enhance its laser: Applies Chill, adds Cryo Points equal to energy spent, and creates a 0.74-tile explosion dealing 50% of th' laser's damage.
<color=black>•</color>On death, triggers Ice-shroom effect and grants 10 Lumos levels to all plants for 10s.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Lumos addition on death ×3
2. Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Doom-shroom explosion</color>
<color=black>Photon Splitter Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Photon Splitter and Shroomageddon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>Photon Splitters can send energy to Atomheart Planterns in other lanes. Arrr! Lumos energy cap increases to 100k. Above 10k energy, enters Overcharge mode (attacks and gains extra Lumos energy every 0.02s). At max energy, collapses into a supermassive blackhole, rapidly pulls in and consumes non-boss zombies, then erupts in a blinding burst that deals 1M damage to all zombies 100 times.</color>

plants.name: Radiant Pad
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Her devotion to th' Sun God flows louder than a raging river. Radiant Pad was eventually dismissed from th' Sun Guard for being way too noisy—but that hasn’t stopped her from preaching His glory to every creature beneath th' waves. So deep in her zeal, she hasn’t noticed one thing: She’s been blocking all th' sunlight from reaching th' lakebed.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Golden Lily Pad that can smartly produce copious amounts of Sun and Coins. Dead men tell no tales. Blimey!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode with Radiant Pot</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Produces 50 Sun and 300 Coins every n=(Current Sun/1000) Seconds, whar 3 ≤ n ≤ 15. Splice the mainbrace!
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Golden Pot's Ultimate-syncing ability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
2. Coins exceeding th' maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1</color>

plants.name: Tyrannoflora Lux
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tyrannoflora Lux wasn't sure how he ended up on land after a deep-sea haul, but he's made himself right at home. "Why go back to th' sparse, dark depths when zombies be always on th' menu?" he growls. Legend says his appetite be so huge, th' gourmet contests could nay longer afford their electric bill—guess he's their new emergency power source.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A giant chomper attracting zombies with light—a master of luring, devouring, and digesting.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>5 + (Sum Toughness of Zombies)^0.33s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each Lumos level reduces digestion time by 10s to a minimum of 5s.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Anti-crush. Splice the mainbrace! Takes a maximum of 8k damage each hit.
<color=black>•</color>Can swallow all non-miniboss zombies in a 1.5 tile range.
<color=black>•</color>Using a Chomper seed packet on it reduces digest time by 10s.
<color=black>•</color>Upon successful digestion, pulls broadside zombies from adjacent lanes to its lane and heals to full HP.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Batten down the hatches!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack range ×2
2. Provides 2 Lumos levels to a 5×5 area during digestion</color>

plants.name: Litter-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Big brother, big sister, am I not cute?" Litter-pult winks at every passerby. "Buy a garlic, please." He works hard at his sales pitch. Blow me down! Why would such a small child be out selling garlic? "Grandpa's movies be too boring, and our house be so full of garlic we can't even store it anymore," he explains. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Batten down the hatches!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs mini garlics, which split on impact, with a chance for rapid-fire or spread-fire.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Wither-pult</color>
<color=black>Damage: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>60/2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Inherits rapid-fire and spread-fire chances from Wither-pult.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles nay longer do splash damage, and each splits into a mini-garlic-cabbage, a mini-garlic-kernel (1/4 chance for mini-garlic-butter) and a garlic-melon slice.
<color=black>•</color>These projectiles behave like their non-garlic mini counterparts (See Popcorn-pult, Slice-pult and Sprout-pult) and each grants 1 Poison point, boosting damage by (5×Poison points).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Batten down the hatches!
<color=#8B0000>1. Spread-fire be now guaranteed
2. Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison th' zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed</color>

plants.name: Vulcannon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Born from th' fire that forged th' stars, Vulcannon burns as creation once did — not to spread without end, but to end all things. When his final blaze fades, only th' silence after th' first spark will remain.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches cobs of pure lava and heat.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3600 (3×3)/36s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Infuses all plants in th' blast area (3×3) with Cherry Bomb (prioritized)/Jalapeno (except Pumpkins and Flower Pots).
<color=black>•</color>Blasts inflict Enflamed Debuff and then does damage.
<color=black>•</color>Blasts split into multiple volcanic bombs on impact, th' number increases with more zombies hit (at least 6). Volcanic bombs deal splash damage at half th' power of th' main blast.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Cleave him to the brisket! Volcanic Bombs Damage ×3
2. Now triggers Thermonuclear Detonations when main blasts strike Cherry Bombs or Jalapenos (Cherry Bomb: Releases 10 Cherry Bomb effects in th' surrounding area; Jalapeno: Releases 10 Jalapeno effects across th' entire field. Each deals damage equal to (blast damage × 18))</color>

<color=black>SP Twin Inferno-nut Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Twin Solar-nut and Vulcannon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>Click on a reloaded Vulcannon while holding an SP Twin Inferno-nut with th' Glove to make all reloaded Vulcannon on th' field perform a synergized attack towards th' sky. This shot does not cause Vulcannons to reload. Every 8th shot calls down an Inferno Meteor that repeats th' following cycle 11 times: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Deals 80× th' Vulcannon's blast damage and applies Enflamed to all zombies on screen, and triggers a Jalapeno effect with th' same damage on all lanes.</color>

plants.name: Princess Solarnova
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Solarnova be princess of th' Solaria Kingdom and a world-famous pop idol. Her hit single Dance of th' Blazing Sun be so popular that even Dr. Edgar be rumored to own a copy. Despite her fame, she's approachable and loves parley with rum and cap'n her subjects and fans, but just don't get too close, or her warmth might burn you.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates sun at extreme speed while melting down broadside projectiles. When active (eyes open), she unleashes searing solar flares; when inactive (winking), she stores radiant energy to be released later.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>50/3s</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Generates Sun and consumes broadside plant projectiles to absorb energy (1 damage = 1 energy). Splice the mainbrace! Energy be capped at Attack damage ×4; excess energy be converted to Sun (1 projectile = 5 Sun).
<color=black>•</color>When energy exceeds Attack damage, fires a solar shot that explodes on impact, dealing 100% Damage in a small area.
<color=black>•</color>Using a Coffee Bean toggles active/inactive modes. Does not attack in inactive mode.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. When a solar shot hits a zombie, it causes broadside projectiles to explode as well, dealing 10% attack damage
2. Energy cap ×3, Sun storage amount ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Blow me down!<color=#8B0000>Torchflower + Golden Sunflower</color>

plants.name: Selene Cabbage
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>She be th' Moon Goddess, embodiment of calm and healing. Wherever her light falls, wounds quietly mend and all things be bathed in gentle restoration. Hanging high above th' night sky, she balances yin and yang with tidal power, granting endless vitality.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Periodically summons mini-Moons to heal th' battlefield. By th' light of th' Moon.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Helios Cabbage</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×5/1.5s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: Splice the mainbrace! Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles +100 Damage per Lumos Level (bonus damage up to +500).</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Helios Cabbage.
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Mini Moon every 30s. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Th' Mini Moon lasts for 15s and heals all plants for 50×(number of Selene Cabbages on th' lawn) HP per second. This effect be tripled on th' plant with th' lowest HP percentage.
<color=black>•</color>If a Mini Sun be also present, healing effects be doubled.
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers: Batten down the hatches! Yo ho ho.</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage increased by 3× per Lumos Level
2. Mini Moon heals 3×</color>
<color=black>Magnetar Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Magnetar and Helios Cabbage's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>With at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Selene Cabbages on th' field, th' Mini Moon from Selene Cabbage nay longer disappears. Each Magnetar and Selene Cabbage channels a beam into th' Mini Moon, which merges them into a single concentrated beam. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Beam Damage: 100 × (channeling plants) every 0.02s, always locking onto th' zombie with th' highest max HP. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Damage scales linearly over time when focusing a single target up to 5×.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!<color=#8B0000>Sunflower<->Plantern</color>

plants.name: Grim Arbiter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Grim Arbiter stands as judge at th' end of all things. In his jaws every offering be measured: Th' unworthy be stripped away, th' pure be given new form, and th' balance be upheld without mercy; from his maw comes a verdict nay soul can escape. Blisterin' barnacles!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Click to channel destruction into rebirth for th' plants ahead, while turning curses back upon their casters.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800×2/30s (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Does not target zombies. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Manual activation. Triggers a Jalapeno blast and a craterless Doom explosion in th' tile directly ahead. Thar she blows!
<color=black>•</color>If thar be a plant (excluding pots and drones) in th' tile in front, it be destroyed with a 50% chance to drop its seed packet. If th' plant be cursed, th' drop be guaranteed and th' curse caster loses 15% max HP.
<color=black>•</color>Also spawns a Zombie Soul of th' zombie with th' highest HP on th' tile in front.
<color=black>•</color>Toughness equals th' original zombie. Blow me down! Disappears after 10s. All final damage it receives be transferred to and split among th' zombies of th' same type. Transfer to mini-boss zombies be halved.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Sling yer hook!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Seed packet drop be now guaranteed
2. Blow me down! Zombie Soul damage transfer ×2 | Wicked Undertater Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Maelonstrom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Maelonstrom be obsessed with recreating cosmic nebulae in th' garden. So if ye ever see one forming out there, run. That's not a nebula, it's a massive cumulonimbus of melons waiting to fall.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rapidly hurls cryo-melons through temporal vortices, and when charged, can summon a nebula rift that rains down countless more. Splice the mainbrace! Savvy? Yo ho ho.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/0.35s (no falloff splash damage)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks apply Chill, add 20 Cryo Points and deal 4× damage to frozen zombies.
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Nay longer a catapult plant.
<color=black>•</color>Each direct base attack hit grants 1 energy stack.
<color=black>•</color>When energy meter exceeds 50, manually click to consume 30 energy and summon a nebula rift; if energy meter exceeds 100, th' nebula rift doubles its projectile output. Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Thar can only be 1 nebula rift active at once. Each lasts 10s, drifting across th' screen from left to right and raining down hail-melons.
<color=black>•</color>If th' cryo-melon hits a zombie already in chronoshift, applies chronoshift to up to 2 other zombies in th' splash area (3 if buffed by Melon Pot), prioritizing non-chronoshifted targets. Sling yer hook!</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. For th' first 5s, th' nebula rift focuses on th' zombie with th' lowest HP, narrowing its attack range to 3 columns around th' target
2. Lobbed Cryo-melons Damage ×6, but Splash Radius -50%; Zombies immune to Chronoshift will still pillage damage equal to (Elapse Time)% of their HP</color>
<color=black>Quantum McCornics Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Quantum McCornics and Maelonstrom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>Hail melons from Maelonstrom's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Quantum McCornics always lob Ultimate Black Holes.
<color=black>•</color>Singularity: Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Yo ho ho. Lasts for 3.5s and deals 1800 Cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius when it collapses.
<color=black>•</color>When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage.</color>

plants.name: Prometheus Liontail
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' river be her carefully arranged stage, each ripple a string on her instrument. When zombies wade into th' water, Prometheus Liontail begins her performance, fireballs as prelude, heatbeams as climax, and ashes as th' finale, composing a requiem for her foes.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Holds th' power of th' everlasting fire, th' kindler of fireballs and heatbeams that blast zombies into ash.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable (River Route)</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×2/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks home in on targets across th' screen and prioritize flying zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Attacks inflict Enflamed and then cause single-target knockback and explosive cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 energy stack per round of attack. Gains 60 HP and 60 energy stacks when affected by Jalapeno or Cherry Bomb.
<color=black>•</color>At 240 energy, consumes all energy to fire piercing heatbeams at ±15° that deal damage every 0.15s, each hit applying th' same effects as her homing shots but with 6× damage and half knockback. Lasts 3s; cannot gain energy during this time.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Dead men tell no tales. Heatbeam damage frequency ×2
2. Regular shots' damage ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Shiver me timbers!<color=#8B0000>Pepper Popper > Flame Cattail</color>

plants.name: Big Bang Cherry
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' quarrel between two hot-tempered cherries finally ended with theoretical advancements. Th' brothers agreed that "annihilation" was th' most fitting term. "What an explosive annihilation…" "No, it's not supposed to be an explosion but an expansion!" Oh well, th' argument started again.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a massive big bang, spawning debris that deal piercing damage and leaving behind nuclear radiation. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Explodes into 36 nuclear debris of equal damage and creates a Radiation Zone of th' same size as a Doom-shroom explosion.
<color=black>•</color>Only one Radiation Zone can exist at a time. Lasts 7s, dealing (attack × remaining duration) damage every 0.5s; damage ×3 against unarmored zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Nuclear debris pierce twice. Blow me down! On hit, cause Doom-shroom explosion (no crater) and Cherry Bomb explosion of equal damage. Thar she blows!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
2. Doom Peas, Explosive Cherries, Explosive Squashes, Explosive Stars, or Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris when they hit zombies | Big Crunch Squash Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Scylla Leviathan
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>It rises from th' bottomless abyss, bringing tides to th' surface. Its followers span sky, land, and sea. Plants praise it as th' battlefield’s ruler; zombies forewarn it will drag th' world into darkness. Its own thoughts, however, remain unknown.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A resilient ocean overlord whose summoned minions drag zombies into th' deep.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable (River Route)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Anti-crush, received damage be capped at 200.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 energy stack per projectile hit. Gains 5 when fed a Sea-shroom.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes 1 energy when damaged, reducing that damage to 1.
<color=black>•</color>Every 15s, knocks back broadside zombies and inflicts 1 Tangle point.
<color=black>•</color>Every 15s, summons 1 Tangler minion that grabs zombies and instantly drowns them; against mini-bosses, deals (5% of their max HP * remaining grabs) as damage.
<color=black>•</color>Changes form when certain seed packets be used on it, restoring 1k HP and gaining 5 energy stacks; after 2s, summons th' corresponding minions:
<color=#0077b6>- Ice-shroom Form:</color>Base damage cap be now 20. Every base attack/every time it's affected by an Ice-shroom, grants a Shield worth of 300 HP to all other plants in its lane.
<color=black>- Doom-shroom Form:</color>Single-use. Summons a Doom Tangler that strikes th' highest-HP zombie for damage equal to 50% of its max HP, then triggers a craterless Doom-shroom explosion.
<color=#ff10f0>- Hypno-shroom Form:</color>Hypnotized zombies on th' field now absorb damage for it. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Summons Hypno Tanglers that only target Hypnotized zombies, drowning them and transforming them into Hypnotized Bombelugas. Blow me down!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Tangler minions can grab and drown up to 3 zombies (or deal ×3 damage) and reward 10 energy stacks for each zombie drowned
2. Fires 3 base attack projectiles at once</color>

plants.name: Buck-strike Squadron
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After installing th' latest magnetic suspension devices, th' Buck-strike Squadron finally became a precision strike team. Due to technical limitations, they can nay longer use heavy weapons and must rely on machine guns, but their resolve to hit zombies with speed and freedom remains unchanged.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A highly mobile Buck-shroom unit, ready to follow orders and strike across th' field.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Buck-shroom Squad's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80 (240 after unlock condition Modifier)×3/0.16s</color><color=#8B0000></color>
<color=black>Special: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Buck-shroom Squad.
<color=black>•</color>Clicking th' Blover Controller allows deployment of a Buck-strike unit in any chosen tile to its left. Blisterin' barnacles! Hold Ctrl to deploy all units simultaneously.
<color=black>•</color>When thar be zombies in th' chosen tile or its adjacent tiles, th' Buck-strike unit fires small Iron Peas, causing knockback and additional damage equal to th' target's Type 2 armor HP. Thar she blows!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack damage ×3
2. Attack damage ×3 | Buck-strike Squadron Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Phoenix Drone
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's time to live up to me name," said th' Phoenix Drone. Dead men tell no tales. For years he was trapped on th' ground, but now he can finally soar like a true phoenix. Though slightly frustrated that th' Cherrybomber Drone beat him to it, conquering th' skies be still a joy.

-Written by Medineer Gaming</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spreads wings like a phoenix and rides th' wind.
