<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Phoenix Threepeater's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>160×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Phoenix Threepeater. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>Flying plant. Projectiles inflict th' Enflamed debuff and pierce 2 times.
<color=black>•</color>On death, triggers Jalapeno effect in th' same lane and 2 adjacent lanes. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict th' debuff
2. Phoenix peas can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions | Phoenix Drone Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>Shovel<->Blover</color>

plants.name: SP Twin Solar-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>To push photosynthesis research even further, SP Twin Solar-nut began a deeper study of chloroplasts. "Clearly, chloroplasts do far more than most plants imagine," says SP Twin Solar-nut. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! "They not only increase photosynthetic efficiency, but also promote th' growth and mitosis of bowling balls."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stores energy from Sun, using heavier Nuts to drop massive amounts of sun and snowball th' profit. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Twin Solar-nut's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Promotion of Twin Solar-nut, inherits its other traits. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>Tapping on it:
- Spends 500 Sun.
- Restores his Toughness to full.
- Gains 10 Solar charges.
- Summons 2 Bowling Solar-nuts that roll at ±45° angles forward and ricochet on hit. These each deal a one-time damage equal to th' summoner's HP and drop 5 sun n times, whar n equals th' number of hits so far.
- Summons a Giant Solar-nut 1 tile ahead. Yo ho ho.
- Improves an existing Giant Solar-nut by enlarging its size, knockback and damage (higher base damage yields less bonus, down to 60%).
- After not tapping for 1s, th' existing Giant Solar-nut will roll forward, crushing and knocking back zombies. Damage per 0.02s be 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. Also drops 15 Sun each time it hits a new zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 Solar charge every time your Sun increases.
<color=black>•</color>When Solar charge meter reaches 100, automatically consumes 100 Solar charges to summon a Giant Solar-nut improved 5 times.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Shiver me timbers! Twin Solar-nut: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Twin Inferno-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Promotion Recipe: Cleave him to the brisket!<color=#8B0000>Wall-nut + Twin Solar-nut</color>

plants.name: Panmelonium
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Panmelonium represents th' peak of cold ordnance design: Distributed warheads, guided escorts, and relentless frostfire. He advances without haste, ending battles not with fury, but with absolute zero.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches bone-chilling clusterbombs for saturated bombardment.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Cob-literator</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator) ×40</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time:</color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Cob-literator.
<color=black>•</color>Conversions between Panmelonium and Cob-literator reset remaining reloading time of both to 36s.
<color=black>•</color>Manually click to fire 4 Oblivion Clusterbombs which spawn 36 additional Minishells. Minishells prioritize targeting zombies on th' field, with a higher chance to strike zombies near th' aimed position.
<color=black>•</color>Oblivion Clusterbombs damage th' full-screen; Minishells' splash radius be 1.5 tiles. On hit, both apply Freeze for 5s before dealing damage, and permanently reduce zombie speed by 0.005×, up to a maximum reduction to 0.9×.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×4
2. Reload Time → 12s</color>

plants.name: Big Crunch Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Big Crunch Squash always glares straight ahead with a scowl, wearing th' same bad temper even while eating or sleeping. Though this makes his allies uneasy, compared to those two noisy brothers, he be actually quite friendly. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Blimey! Avast ye!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Holds th' immense power of universe-contraction, but while on standby, its potential gradually decays to zero.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Big Bang Cherry's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>2 tiles to th' left; 3 tiles to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Big Bang Cherry.
<color=black>•</color>On landing, triggers a Doom-shroom blast with 3600 damage, with th' crater remaining at th' jump-off position, releases a ring of 36 pieces of Nuclear Debris each dealing th' same damage and creates a Radiation Zone lasting [7 - 0.25 × (Big Crunch Squash's time on th' lawn)] seconds, down to 0s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
2. Doom Peas, Explosive Cherries, Explosive Squashes, Explosive Stars, or Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris when they hit zombies | Big Crunch Squash Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Kaledera Eruptor
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Kaledera Eruptor be a cosmologist. Unlike his colleagues, he believes th' universe be not a fire that burns out and collapses, but a continuously active existence. To prove this theory, he created high-heat cabbages that can be preserved long-term on Umbrella Kales as a model. Th' model failed to convince his peers, but achieved unexpected success on th' battlefield against zombies.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs cabbages for explosive and incendiary damage.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Vulcannon</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×n/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Vulcannon.
<color=black>•</color>Conversion to Vulcannon resets remaining reloading time to 36s.
<color=black>•</color>When attacking, lobs one Pyro Cabbage at each zombie (up to 10) in th' forward area of his lane and th' 2 adjacent lanes.
<color=black>•</color>Pyro Cabbages apply Enflamed on hit, then trigger an explosion with a 1-tile radius, identical to that of Explosive Cherries.
<color=black>•</color>Umbrella Kale or Midas Umbrella in front in of his lane can also intercept Pyro Cabbages that would have been thrown to adjacent lanes and boost them.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Pyro Cabbages Damage ×3
2. Attacks have a 10% chance to trigger Cherry Bomb and Jalapeno effects at th' barrel position and ignore th' target limit of 10</color>

plants.name: Captivator Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As zombie numbers continued to rise, how to stay popular among zombies became a hot topic. "Relying on traditional communication alone be nay longer enough," says Captivator Pumpkin. "I will use a brand-new radio-wave microphone to deliver me music and feelings to a wider audience of zombies." With this move, she ushered in a new trend in zombie culture.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charisma aeterna.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Charmatron</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Charmatron.
<color=black>•</color>Zombies that try to bite it be hypnotized instead. Shiver me timbers! Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Captures 1 non-flying, non-miniboss hypnotized zombie that passes through, preventing it from leaving th' tile and having it absorb damage for th' Captivator Pumpkin.
<color=black>•</color>Deals damage equal to 0.1× max HP per second to th' captured hypnotized zombie and gains 4 energy stacks.
<color=black>•</color>When energy stack be ≥0/50/100, Charge Level be at 1/2/3, draining 1/2/2 energy per second respectively. Charge Level be locked behind a Modifier. Yo ho ho. Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>At charge levels 1/2/3, every 15/10/6s, hypnotizes 1 non-flying, non-miniboss zombie within a 1.5-tile radius. Avast ye! On success, th' plant inside th' shell gains a damage boost of (60% × Charge Level) for 1s. Every time a Captivator Pumpkin activates this effect, Laser Pumpkins and Blast Pumpkins in th' same Magnetic system resonate and trigger th' same effect simultaneously.
<color=black>•</color>While a Charmatron be inside, th' Charmatron always benefits from th' same damage boost of (60% × Charge Level).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage to captured hypnotized Zombies halved</color>
<color=#8B0000>2. Charge Level 3 unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe:<color=#8B0000>Shovel<->Glove th' Charmatron onto a Pumpkin</color>

plants.name: Twin Inferno-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Heliology be dead!" cries Twin Inferno-nut, so enraged that he nearly overturns his own laboratory. "They were all lying to me, Sunflower, Sun-shroom, even Endoflame." Helios Cabbage considers stepping in to ask what happened, but seeing th' lab in ruins and countless bowling nuts rolling across th' floor, decides it be better to wait until Twin Inferno-nut cools off. Shiver me timbers!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>On taking damage, consumes Sun to gain HP. Batten down the hatches! Spends HP to create Giant Inferno-nuts that can tear through Enflamed zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Twin Solar-nut's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Twin Solar-nut.
<color=black>•</color>HP can exceed Toughness with nay upper limit. Excess HP decays at a rate of (10% of Total HP per second).
<color=black>•</color>When taking non-crushing damage, can consume 15 Sun to negate th' damage and gain 50 HP.
<color=black>•</color>Reflects 20 damage when bitten and applies Enflamed debuff.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 3000 HP when affected by Jalapeno (including initially).
<color=black>•</color>Click to spend 500 health to spawn 1 Giant Inferno-nut in th' tile in front. It begins rolling 1s after th' last click. Before it rolls off, further clicks increase th' existing Giant Inferno-nut's size and damage. Damage per 0.02s be 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. Th' Giant Inferno-nut does ×2 to Enflamed zombies. Batten down the hatches!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Twin Inferno-nut: Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Twin Inferno-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

plants.name: SP Twin Inferno-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Light energy, thermal energy, kinetic energy, mass… all of it be transforming within me." SP Twin Inferno-nut be driven by grand ambition, forging a path never walked before - unifying all forms of energy into one. For this great mission, he be willing to give up everything, even th' annual summer beach ice-cream gathering.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stores energy drawn from fire and flesh, using even stronger Nuts to send zombies "rolling away."

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Twin Solar-nut's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Promotion of Twin Inferno-nut, inherits its other traits; Subspecies of SP Twin Solar-nut.
<color=black>•</color>HP can exceed Toughness with nay upper limit. Excess HP decays at a rate of (10% of Total HP per 3s).
<color=black>•</color>When taking non-crushing damage, can consume 15 Sun to negate th' damage and gain 50 HP and 2 Infernal charges.
<color=black>•</color>Also gains 10 Infernal charges when affected by Jalapeno (including initially). Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>Click to spend 500 health to gain 10 Infernal charges and spawn 1 Giant Inferno-nut in th' tile in front. It begins rolling 1s after th' last click. Before it rolls off, further clicks increase th' existing Giant Inferno-nut's size, damage and knockback. Damage per 0.02s be 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. Th' Giant Inferno-nut does ×2 to Enflamed zombies.
<color=black>•</color>When Infernal charge meter reaches 100, automatically consumes 100 Infernal charge to summon a Giant Inferno-nut improved 5 times.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Twin Inferno-nut: Cleave him to the brisket! Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Twin Inferno-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

<color=black>Vulcannon Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Twin Solar-nut and Vulcannon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>Click on a reloaded Vulcannon while holding an SP Twin Inferno-nut with th' Glove to make all reloaded Vulcannon on th' field perform a synergized attack towards th' sky. This shot does not cause Vulcannons to reload. Batten down the hatches! Every 8th shot calls down an Inferno Meteor that repeats th' following cycle 11 times: Deals 80× th' Vulcannon's blast damage and applies Enflamed to all zombies on screen, and triggers a Jalapeno effect with th' same damage on all lanes.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Conversion Recipe: Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Sunflower<->Jalapeno</color>
Promotion Recipe:<color=#8B0000>Wall-nut + Twin Inferno-nut</color>

plants.name: Cornveyor Weed
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cornveyor Weed works at a large butter-processing factory, whar th' heavy, monotonous labor leaves him so exhausted that he sticks out his tongue every day. After work, all he wants be to lie down at home and rest, but zombies keep coming like flies, forcing him back into battle. Blimey! Unfortunately, th' fighting be just as dull as his day job: A never-ending butter conveyor line.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A sticky, slippery "road of Zomzomphus."

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ignored by vehicles and immune to most types of damage; takes 10 damage when smashed by Gargantuars.
<color=black>•</color>Attacks knock back but nay longer pops tires.
<color=black>•</color>Every 3 total hits, applies 1 second of Butter stun to one zombie.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Splice the mainbrace!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Cornveyor Weed's Butter stun duration ×3 | Cornposter Pot Subspecies Unlocked
2. Now makes zombies on it to continuously slide to th' right</color>

plants.name: SP Gatling Doom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silence. Deep, cold silence. Th' ashes of what was once thriving crackle faintly. Nothing remains; only lifeless cinders as far as th' eye can see. A light breeze brushes across th' barren field. This land be scorched now. This be th' end.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Irradiated Shells that inflict extra effects based on status debuffs. Arrr!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Doom Gatling's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Promotion of Doom Gatling, inherits its other traits. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Fires Irradiated Shells that ignore Type 2 armor in rounds of 4 and applies Irradiated debuff. Fires an Ultimate Irradiated Shell that deals 1800 damage once every 4 rounds of bullets and then rests for 4.5s after th' Ultimate Irradiated Shell be shot. Ultimate Irradiated Shells deal splash damage over a large area twice.
<color=black>•</color>Depending on th' target's debuffs, gains th' following effects:
- Chilled: Freezes th' target for 1s and multiplies th' damage of this hit by 4.
- Enflamed: Triggers an Enflamed explosion dealing th' same damage as this hit.
- Poisoned: Deals extra damage equal to (hit damage × 0.5 × [Poison value]).
<color=black>•</color>Only Ultimate Irradiated Shell's second explosion triggers th' effects above. See Doomwood's entry for extra interactions between Irradiated and other debuffs.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Nay more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Gatling Frenzy-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

plants.name: SP Gatling Frenzy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>SP Gatling Frenzy-shroom has been growing her hair out for a while now. A lot of people ask how th' crack in her helmet got there. She always answers, "Oh, that was on purpose. Shiver me timbers! It lets me hair show."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires special Irradiated Shells that enhance Irradiated's combo with other status debuffs.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Doom Gatling's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s (0.25 Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Promotion of Gatling Frenzy-shroom, inherits its other traits; Subspecies of SP Gatling Doom.
<color=black>•</color>Fires Irradiated Shells. Fires an Ultimate Irradiated Shell every 16 attacks, dealing 1800 damage, and then rests for 4.5s.
<color=black>•</color>When frightened, resets attack speed and triggers a craterless Doom-shroom effect (does not self-destruct).
<color=black>•</color>Depending on th' target's debuffs, gains th' following effects:
- Chilled: Chilled duration increased by 25%.
- Enflamed: Damage bonus increased by an additive 40%, stackable with other increases.
- Poisoned: Triggers Poison effects twice.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Nay more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Gatling Frenzy-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

<color=black>Cherrybomber Drone Synergy Modifier: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Gatling Cherrybomber and Gatling Doom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color>When Cherrybomber Drone and SP Gatling Frenzy-shroom be on th' same tile, they perform coordinated attacks, and th' former gains 0.05 energy while th' latter gains 0.1 energy. Energy drains at 0.3 per second. For th' first 7 whole points of energy, each increases th' number of shots fired during coordinated attacks by 1. Yo ho ho. Thundering typhoons! Energy above 7 increases th' 8th bullet’s damage by ×(1 + excess point).</color>

plants.name: Thunder Bunnyon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We're a band of wizards from th' Frost Magic Tower. Just look at these fluffy scarves. Savvy? Nothing's warmer than this, not even lightning magic." Thunder Bunnyons wiggle their long bunny ears… As for why they have bunny ears at all, that question has baffled taxonomists everywhere.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Channels team power to unleash chain lightning and help Aristocattail summon drones.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Aristocattail's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Aristocattail. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Tapping a Thunder Bunnyon designates it as th' Team Leader, as indicated by its lightning orb sparkling. Only one Leader can exist at a time; all others become Members. Arrr!
<color=black>• Team Leader:</color>Strikes zombies with electricity. Arrr! On hit, it can arc up to 5 times to other zombies (the same zombie can become a non-consecutive target too) within a 2.2-tile radius. Arcs deal 50% th' original damage. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Damaged zombies have their DR value reduced by 3 (mini-bosses by 1), down to 0.
<color=black>• Members: Avast ye! Shiver me timbers!</color>Do not attack. Each Member increases th' Leader's attack damage by 1.5× and increases th' number of arcs by 3.
<color=black>•</color>When th' electric arc kills a zombie, a random Aristocattail on th' field summons a nerfed Drone that fires only 20 straight-shot bullets, each dealing 160 damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Blow me down!
<color=#8B0000>1. Summoned Drone be nay longer nerfed and fires 60 shots normally
2. Attack Damage ×3 | Thunder Bunnyon Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Dyson Magnet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dyson Magnet has spent her whole life trying to harness th' power of stars themselves to help her fellow magnetic friends. Starting off small, at least in her mind, she has been successful in linking th' power of th' Sun to th' power of any magnetic system she desires to join; effortlessly providing sustenance to her allies without expecting much in return. Her final goal be to harness th' power of a galaxy, and become so efficient in transforming energy that she can unite th' plants and zombies. She would also like to find a partner, possibly becoming th' queen of a kingdom with a certain other plant... Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses th' power of light and magnetism to rapidly produce Metal Objects, while granting damage bonuses and healing to magnetic plants.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Sling yer hook! Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Tesla Magnet's Modifier</color><color=black>
Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Tesla Magnet.
<color=black>•</color>Produces a random metal object every 30s (10s for initial production) and recovers 500 HP on production. Drag a metal object on it and it will produce 25 Sun.
<color=black>•</color>Produced metal object be automatically given to Grenadier Magnet, Hypno Magnet or Charmatron directly in front. Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>Metal production speed be increased by (1 + 0.15 × [Lumos Level] + 0.05×n), whar n be th' Number of Magnetic Connections in th' same System, up to a maximum of 4×. Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>When producing Metal, grants every other plant in its Magnetic System a 3% attack bonus for 30s. If a plant be not at full HP, restores 500 HP for it; otherwise, spawns a random Metal Object at that plant's location. Th' number of Metal Objects generated by this effect does not exceed (3 + n/3).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Metal Production CD halved | Dyson Magnet Subspecies Unlocked
2. Heal amount ×3, extra Metal Object production limit (3 + n/3) → (5 + n/2)</color>

plants.name: Boreas Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Coldness be th' Boreas Umbrella's defining trait. She calls herself an avenger, precisely locking onto every zombie burdened with sin and firing arrows she names Judgment. Though her icy demeanor frightens and alienates young plant sprouts, she has quietly donated to th' Plant Orphanage for ten years without fail. That familiar building always reminds her of th' grog-filled life she once had.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Scatters chilling light and fires homing ice spikes; can consume energy to switch to a high-damage single-target mode.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Pharos Umbrella's Modifier</color><color=black>
Toughness: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color><color=black>
Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Pharos Umbrella. Inherits Plantern's traits.
<color=black>•</color>Targets her own lane and th' 2 adjacent lanes. Prioritizes th' nearest zombie in range; can target air units.
<color=black>•</color>Fires ice spikes at th' target: Thar she blows! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Deals ×2 damage to chilled targets and ×4 damage to frozen targets; also projects a cryo-beam that applies Chill for 5s.
<color=black>•</color>For th' first 10 Lumos levels, each level increases projectile damage by 20.
<color=black>•</color>Scatter Mode: Can target up to 6 enemies. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Cleave him to the brisket! Gains 1 energy per attack cycle. Blow me down! Switches to Focus Mode at 40 energy. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Focus Mode: Targets only 1 enemy. Consumes 2 energy per attack cycle and multiplies projectile damage by 6. Reverts to Scatter Mode when energy be depleted.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage in Scatter Mode increases linearly up to ×4, Damage in Focus Mode ×4 | Boreas Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
2. Cryo-beam in Focus Mode now applies Freeze for 1s</color>

plants.name: Quasar
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's time to become a BIG Starfruit!" Quasar shouts excitedly every time he's lifted into th' air by a Gardening Glove. Even though his armor be cobbled together from leftover meteor fragments, hardly enough to support his dream of flight, he enjoys every moment of it. Just don't tell him he looks like a crab, or a bug. Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Integrates th' traits of multiple magnetic Starfruit variants.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Omni Pumpkin</color><color=black>
Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>160×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Omni Pumpkin.
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be targeted by zombies and be ignored by zombies. Immune to crush.
<color=black>•</color>Fires quasar projectiles that deal full splash damage in a 1-tile radius (single lane) with nay falloff.
<color=black>•</color>Magnetars within th' same magnetic system as Quasars fire one additional quasar projectile when attacking, dealing damage equal to th' Quasar's attack power.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. On entry, resets and grants connected Magnetic Plants an additional Attack buff of 0.5% × number of Magnetic Plants
2. Sling yer hook! Now counts twice towards th' number of Magnetic Plants</color>

plants.name: Cryolina Reaper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He burns with a violet, icy chill. Some plants say he be constantly crying; Cryolina Reaper simply calls it "breathing."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Accumulates soul energy to save plants in moments of crisis and unleash surges of ice and fire.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color><color=black>
Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>64k</color><color=black>
Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Enters th' field with 1 soul charge. Can hold a max of 3 soul charges. Gains 1 charge for every 500 zombies that die on either side.
<color=black>•</color>When a plant takes fatal damage, consumes 1 charge to leave it at 1 HP, then:
- Restores 50% of max HP to all plants on th' field
- Triggers a Jalapeno effect once in every lane (not affected by damage reduction)
- Triggers an Ice-shroom effect once
<color=black>•</color>Upon death, triggers a Jalapeno effect once in every lane (not affected by damage reduction), then triggers an Ice-shroom effect once.</color>
<color=black>•</color>Th' maximum number of Cryolina Reapers that can be on th' lawn at once be [(number of map rows) + 2].
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Avast ye!</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Dead men tell no tales. Soul charge cap increased to 10, now gains 1 soul charge whenever a Mini-boss dies
2. When using a soul charge, also grants 1s of invincibility to all plants</color>

plants.name: Cornposter Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cornposter Pot works at th' factory, coating little Squashes in layers of butter, and has saved up a full year of vacation. Blisterin' barnacles! But when he finally set foot on th' island he had long dreamed of, he found more tourists thar than zombies- so many that he nearly melted like butter. Forced to abandon th' trip, he chose instead to stay home and bake his favorite buttercup cake.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses a few "slippery" tricks to make zombies struggle to move.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Avast ye! Shiver me timbers! Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Cornveyor Weed's Modifier</color><color=black>
Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Cornveyor Weed. Sling yer hook! Yo ho ho. Short plant.
<color=black>•</color>Increases th' butter chance for Kernel-pult plants on it from 25% to 50%.
<color=black>•</color>Can generate mini Butter Squashes (only one can exist at a time for each Cornposter). Th' mini Butter Squash leaps toward th' nearest zombie up to 1.5 tiles, then lands, applying a 1-second butter stun to each zombie it crushes. It can bounce up to 6 times before disappearing.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Thar she blows! Blow me down! Cornposter Pot's Butter stun duration ×3 | Cornposter Pot Subspecies Unlocked
2. Butter Chance for th' plant above 50% → 100%</color>

plants.name: Dragonbreath Torcher
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Amidst th' crackling of fireworks, th' barnacle covered year departs, and th' warm spring breeze brings new life. Shiver me timbers! Shiver me timbers! Batten down the hatches! Th' Spring Festival be th' happiest time for all plants. Th' only minor incident involved th' Dragonbreath Torcher; while setting off fireworks, he accidentally ignited th' stage of Sunflowers that were performing "Gong Xi Fa Cai".</color>
plants.info:
Breathes fire, summons dragons, and blasts zombies away in a lively spectacle.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Yo ho ho. Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>200</color>
<color=#3D1400>Range: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>5 Tiles Forward</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: Yo ho ho.<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Breathes fire every 4s that covers a 5 tile range, dealing fire damage every 0.02s to all zombies it hits (including flying enemies) and triggering knockback and a small cherry explosion every 0.2s.
<color=black>•</color>When they avast breathing, Dragonbreath Torcher will summon a mini flying Bamboom that knocks zombies back and triggers a small cherry explosion to every zombie it hits every 0.02s. Can target flying enemies. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Explosion frequency ×2
2. Each zombie hit by Dragonbreath Torcher's fire breath increases th' damage of th' next hit of that same attack by 1%, stacking up to 400%</color>

plants.name: Soulrender Bamboo
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>In th' snowy plains, you'll often see th' Soulrender Bamboo poking through thick snow. It's th' winter vitality of th' plains, growing a little more each day. As a sidenote, he absolutely loves drawing faces Lifereaver Spruce while he naps. Arrr!</color>
plants.info:
Forms a tough armor, standing firm against heave-ho foes.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Lifereaver Spruce</color>
<color=#3D1400>Toughness: Batten down the hatches! Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special:<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Lifereaver Spruce. Other plants cannot absorb damage for Soulrender Bamboo.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to crush, knockback, freeze from Snowballs or Blizzards. Restores 1% max HP when hit by Snowball, Snow Fork, or Blizzard effects. Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>When HP/Shield be below 1× Toughness, restores 10% Toughness per 1.5s and gains a Shield equal to 10% toughness. Batten down the hatches!
<color=black>•</color>On contact with zombies with less than 10× its own HP, deals 10× Soulrender Bamboo's own HP in damage and takes 1× its own HP as self-damage.
<color=black>•</color>Records incoming damage. While record damage > 0, takes 1% Toughness damage every 0.02s and deducts th' same amount from th' record. If record damage > 1M, this damage be increased. Ice-shroom effect clears th' record.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Splice the mainbrace! Now receives only 1/3 incoming damage
2. HP and Shield recovery ×2</color>

plants.name: Fungularity
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Fungularity perfectly embodies th' meaning of "paradox." Despite being mostly ice, it loves summer, especially strolling on th' beach and soaking up th' sun. It's very frustrated that it can't get a tan.</color>
plants.info:
Freezes time and generates ice particle streams that continuously wipe out enemies. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Consumes Doom-shrooms to reach th' next level.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Maelonstrom</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special:<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Maelonstrom's Subspecies. Does not explode automatically. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>•</color>Click on it once to select a detonation spot. Click again to select. Explosion releases Doom-shroom effect at th' target spot, applies 30s of Chronoshift, temporarily freezes th' level (delaying th' next zombie wave), and spawns 5 sets of vertical portals lasting 10s each. Some effects scale with energy level.
<color=black>•</color>Starts out at 1 energy level. Using a Doom-shroom on it increases th' level by 1, up to 3.
-At energy level 1: 1 ice particle stream per portal, freezes th' level for 1s;
-At energy level 2: Explosion damage ×3, 2 ice particle stream per portal, freezes th' level for 3s;
-At energy level 3: Explosion damage ×3, 5 ice particle stream per portal, freezes th' level for 10s, deals 10× attack to th' zombie with th' highest HP at th' detonation epicenter tile, returns 1 Maelonstrom seed packet, and be extremely unstable: Cleave him to the brisket! If not manually detonated 10s after appearance, explodes in place.
<color=black>•</color>Ice particle streams deal 10 damage every 0.02s to zombies on contact, apply Chill and 1s of Chronoshift, and increase elapsed Chronoshift time by 1s. Can target air. When they disappear with th' portals, deal cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius and apply 10s Freeze.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Now only creates one set of portals, but they spawn ×10 ice particle streams
2. Zombies immune to Chronoshift will still pillage damage equal to (Elapse Time)% of their HP</color>

plants.name: Magnate Plantern
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Magnate Plantern pulses with an greedy warmth, casting golden beams that make even th' dullest plants sparkle. Its light shines generously, hiding its true intention that it wants to claim th' world's riches for itself. Those who linger beneath its glow might feel fortune, but disaster be what awaits them.</color>
plants.info:
Provides Lumos for a large area and boosts plant lasers with light and money.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Tycoonwood's Modifier</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special:<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Tycoonwood.
<color=black>•</color>Provides 3 Lumos levels in a 5×5 area.
<color=black>•</color>When targeted by an Apeacalypse Railgun, splits th' beam forward into three Gold Lasers at 0° and ±10°, which drop 50 coins per zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color>Can receive Lumos energy from Photon Splitters, up to 1000. Sling yer hook! When a Photon Splitter in a 3×3 area attacks, Magnate Plantern consumes (1 + current energy/10) energy, each point increasing th' Photon Splitter's damage by 1%.
<color=black>•</color>Each Lumos level increases th' damage of both lasers above by an additional 0.1×.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Thundering typhoons! Avast ye! 1% Damage increase to lasers for every 1000 Coins ye have
2. Magnate Plantern Subspecies Uunlocked</color>

plants.name: Wicked Undertater
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Wicked Untertater be th' Arbiter's loyal undertaker, roaming th' battlefield with a wicked grin. Nay plant escapes his scrutiny, and those who fall in his shadow be not simply gone, they be transformed into fuel for his dark magic of soul conjuring and curse cleansing. Some of th' fallen may be reborn as echoes of life, giving th' world a chance to marvel at his grim handiwork. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>
plants.info:
On explosion, reincarnates broadside plants, counters curse-casters, and summons a Zombie Soul.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Savvy? Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Grim Arbiter's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Arming Time:</color><color=#8B0000>30s</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special:<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Subspecies of Grim Arbiter. Short plant. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>When armed and then triggered, releases Jalapeno effect and craterless Doom-shroom effect, destroying plants in a 3×3 area with a 50% chance to drop destroyed plant's seed packet, and spawns a Zombie Soul of th' highest-HP zombie within his tile. If th' plant be cursed, th' drop be guaranteed and th' curse caster loses 15% max HP. Does not destroy Grim Arbiters, Wicked Undertaters, Endoflames or Titan plants.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Seed packet drop be now guaranteed
2. Zombie Soul damage transfer ×2 | Wicked Undertater Subspecies Unlocked</color>

plants.name: Photon Splitter
plants.introduce:
<color=#3D1400>"Time works in strange ways. Blisterin' barnacles! One moment I'm th' last defender on a devastated lawn, and suddenly it's like all that fighting never happened, and we're using a slightly different strategy against th' same crowd of zombies." th' front head has many stories like this, but th' back head just sighs. "Why do I always pillage th' back seat in these jobs..."

-Written by Boxpone</color>
plants.info:
Receives, channels, transfers, and uses Lumos energy to annihilate targets in spacetime.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40</color>
<color=#3D1400>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5 Tiles Forward</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: Batten down the hatches!<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Every 0.5s, gains Lumos energy equal to its current Lumos level. Storage cap 1000. Energy consumed for attacks or transfers = 1 + current energy × 10%.
<color=black>•</color>Can transfer Lumos energy to Photon Splitter in front in th' same lane, or to selected Atomheart Plantern or Magnate Plantern (not adjacent). Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Blow me down! Clicking on self makes it target zombies and attack.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes Lumos energy every 0.1s for transfer, supplying 10% of its own attack as Lumos energy to th' target. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Each energy spent doubles th' supplied amount.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes energy every 0.2s to attack, increasing damage by th' amount of energy spent. Attacks apply Chronoshift. Lasers be enhanced if thar be an Atomheart Plantern or Magnate Plantern transferring energy within a 3×3 area.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Lumos energy cap increase from 1000 to 2000; Lv2: Lumos energy cap further increased to 10k
2. Sling yer hook! Boosts Transfer efficiency by 50%, and by 250% if target's energy< 1000</color>
<color=black>Atomheart Plantern Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Ye must have unlocked all Photon Splitter and Shroomageddon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in th' shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>Photon Splitters can send energy to Atomheart Planterns in other lanes. Lumos energy cap increases to 100k. Above 10k energy, enters Overcharge mode (attacks and gains extra Lumos energy every 0.02s). At max energy, collapses into a supermassive blackhole, rapidly pulls in and consumes non-boss zombies, then erupts in a blinding burst that deals 1M damage to all zombies 100 times. Savvy?</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Savvy? Savvy? Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Split Beam + Chrono Pea</color>

plants.name: Solar-shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Actually, th' Sunflower behind me be me sister," Solar-shooter explained to everyone. "We've been inseparable since birth. She loves producing Sun, and I destroy zombies on her behalf." But everyone knows th' truth: Th' cheerful Pea brother be a total siscon. After all, every zombie that gets near his sister mysteriously ends up vaporized by sunlight.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar-shooter can fire Sun shots that occasionally produce Sun.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every third shot drops 5 Sun when hitting targets.</size>

plants.name: Cherryshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You think I have red-hot anger issues? Shiver me timbers! Me? Bah! You're red and hot! Your whole family be red!" Cherryshooter despised being teased about th' color of his head. But th' jokes didn't last long. It was just a grog-filled incident. After eating special cherries, Peashooter found himself turning red and hot, and surprisingly, he could shoot cherries.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherryshooter fires powerful cherries.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Solar Bomb
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"So… it's obvious… we be Pretty Cures, aren't we?" th' two Sunflower sisters tried to suppress their excitement. "The world needs us to save it!" Their passion bubbled over as they shouted together, "Flash!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar Bomb can produce Sun after killing zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Produces 25 Sun for each zombie killed in th' explosion.</color></size>

plants.name: Cherry-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I heard some zombies grumbling about their inability to eat cherries. Well, here I am!" th' cheerful Cherry-nut shook th' leaves atop his head, boasting about his pure cherry flavor. "But first, ye have to promise me something: Blow me down! When ye have cherries, share a bit with me. In fact, just give me everything you've got! I was born for this!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry-nut can absorb explosion damage and restore Toughness. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>Absorbs Cherry explosion damage to restore 200 Toughness.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Blisterin' barnacles!<color=#8B0000>Cherry Bomb + Wall-nut</color>

plants.name: Pea-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"No... Don't call me ugly, or else... Wait... I'll spray you." Pea-nut has always struggled with his "unique" appearance. But he firmly believes that what's inside a plant matters more than how it looks. Seeking guidance, he humbly asked senior Bowling Nut for advice and eventually mastered th' technique of rolling nuts like bowling balls.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea-nut fires mini-nuts that can penetrate zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5 Seconds (Piercing)</color>

plants.name: Explode-o-shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Meet Explode-o-shooter, th' ultimate plant killer. He's more irritable than ever—who would've thought th' warm and friendly Cherryshooter would swallow another special cherry? Don't push your luck with him. That cherry stuck in his throat might just be his next shot—his face be already turning red!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots out explosive cherries that explode on impact.

<color=black>Damage: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Its bullets will deal area explosion damage.
<color=black>•</color>Has immunity to cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color>Reduces th' Recharge of th' last Cherry Bomb seed packet used for its fusion by 85%.</color></size>

plants.name: Solar-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Solar-nut always sees himself as an angel, blissfully unaware that th' other plants often parley behind his back. "You know, if he adds a few black lines, he'd look exactly like a bee!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar-nut produces Sun while protecting your plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage Phases:</color><color=#8B0000>1333/2666</color>
<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Produces 25 Sun on damage phase transitions. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Drops 50 Sun on death.</color>

plants.name: Peatato Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Peatato Mine may not have eyes, but he has his own special way of sensing zombies. "I feel it…" he murmured, "The zombies be getting closer… closer… closer…" Peatato Mine's heartbeat quickened, and so did his firing speed. Faster, faster… until, with a "bang," Peatato Mine exploded into a burst of potato-flavored fireworks.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Peatato Mine can attack before unearthing.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Savvy? Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>Fusion returns 50 Sun.
<color=black>•</color>Attacks faster as zombies get closer, with a minimum attack interval of 0.5s. Batten down the hatches! Upon exploding, deals 1800 damage to zombies in a small radius and releases 36 projectiles in all directions. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color></size>

plants.name: Cherrypeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherrypeater lives by th' motto "good things come in pairs." Whether it's fighting zombies or handing out presents, he does it all in twos. "But come on," Repeater teased, "those cherries of yours aren't even close to ripe."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherrypeater can fire two cherries at a time.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.</color></size>

plants.name: Solar Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Stop at red lights, slow down at yellow lights, and obey traffic rules!" Solar Mine frequently warns zombies. But to th' zombies, all they see be th' disgusting green hue before them. Avast ye! He clutches his green leaves and pouts, wishing for more sunshine. "After all, sunshine be what fuels us all!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar Mine produces Sun until and after its explosion.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Fusion returns 25 Sun. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Drops 50 Sun on explosion.</color></size>

plants.name: Mine-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once seen as small and weak, Mine-nut now stood tall and strong, boasting a pair of big eyes and firm flesh. Yet beneath that sturdy exterior, he felt fragile and feared shrinking back to his former size. Th' zombies quipped, "If ye pillage another bite, you'll explode!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Mine-nut can explode while being eaten and once when broken.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage Phases:</color><color=#8B0000>1333/2666</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>500/Phase Transition, 1800/Death</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Causes single-tiled explosions on damage phase transitions. Dead men tell no tales. Blisterin' barnacles!</color></size>

plants.name: Chomp-shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chomper has always envied Chomp-shooter's ability to spit out zombie remains, and he's tried to learn th' trick more than once. Little did he know, though, that th' secret wasn't a special skill—it was just that Chomp-shooter's mouth was slightly deformed, causing bits of zombie to leak out while chewing.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Chomp-shooter can fire parts after biting.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour); 80/3s (Zombie part)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>30s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Spits out rolling zombie parts while chewing that deal 80 damage each and have infinite pierce.</color></size>

plants.name: Chomp-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As a young plant, Chomp-nut was notoriously picky about food, never swallowing zombies in one bite, which frustrated its parents. After much persuasion, Chomp-nut finally learned to consume zombies whole, just like its predecessors. "I'm not picky! Blimey! I just want to imitate how zombies eat. I should try something new, right? It's definitely not because I don't have a neck!" Chomp-nut said while chewing on a zombie.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Chomp-nut can restore Toughness after eating zombies. Avast ye!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook! Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>Restores 1000 Toughness after digestion.</color></size>

plants.name: Chompzilla
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chompzilla savors every meal, despite his smaller mouth. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. "Chompers be sloppy and don't hit th' gym; they fall apart on th' front line," he scoffs. Avast ye! Dead men tell no tales. "I only eat th' essence of zombie meat and spit out th' rest," he grins, though his backyard be filling up with leftovers. Cleave him to the brisket!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Both a bulwark and fierce attacker.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>200/1.75 (Chomp); 80/3s (Zombie part)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Chomping zombies restores 200 Toughness and deals 200 damage. Spits out rolling zombie parts after that deal 80 damage and pierce infinitely.
<color=black>•</color>Instantly kills unarmored zombies with less than 500 Toughness, restoring 400 Toughness. Also spits out parts that knockback zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Every 40s, devours a zombie and restores to max (up to 16k HP). Excess Toughness drains at 200 per second.
<color=black>•</color>Damage taken per hit be capped at 1/3 Toughness.</color></size>

plants.name: Solar Chomper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone was curious about how Solar Chomper transformed th' zombies it devoured into sunlight, but it always hesitated to share its secret. One day, Sunflower discovered that her Plant Food content had significantly diminished, revealing th' truth: It wasn't actually turning zombies into sunlight. Blimey!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar Chomper can produce Sun after swallowing zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Produces 100 Sun after swallowing a zombie.</color></size>

plants.name: Chomp-mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Delicious and enticing, Potato Mines taste just like self-heating mashed potatoes, earning rave reviews from zombies. Among them, fries pillage th' top spot in popularity. As zombies flock to th' tantalizing aroma of French fries, they have nay idea they're also indulging in tasty potato chips. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Thundering typhoons! "Just wait and see," Chomp-mine said with a mouthful, "Their nutrients will soon become new mines."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>After swallowing a zombie, th' Chomp-mine will grow Potato Mines in front.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>20s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Fusion returns 75 Sun.
<color=black>•</color>Plants a fully armed Potato Mine in front of it upon finishing digesting a zombie. Thar she blows! Also explodes like a Potato Mine on death.</color></size>

plants.name: Cherry Chomper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ever since her grog with Cherry Bomb, Chomper has been constantly "buzzing." She turned into an absolute menace every meal. Th' sound of chewing transformed into explosive pops as plates and bowls flew everywhere, leaving everyone unwilling to dine with her. After a show of hands, Cherry Chomper ended up eating in th' yard… at least she nay longer has to buy new tableware.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces a cherry explosion upon eating a zombie.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour) + 1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>Creates a 3×3 Cherry explosion in th' tile directly ahead on successful biting.</color></size>

plants.name: Gatling Cherry
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Cherry's barrel was always red hot. He assured everyone that it was preheated to ensure faster firing. Everyone bought th' story—until they caught him eating special cherries without even removing th' barrel.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherryshooter's final form!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×4/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Pea-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Don't let me size fool you; even a small body can contain a lot of energy," Pea-shroom cautions those who underestimate him. "We all began as tiny mushrooms, making progress a little at a time. With dedication to a sunny breakfast, ye can become just like me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea-shroom shoots further than Puff-shroom. Avast ye!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Thar she blows!</color></size>

plants.name: Repeat-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Who am I? Th' double-shot holds th' answer!" exclaims th' little Repeat-shroom, proudly flaunting th' twin leaves atop its head. With double th' firing rate and double th' cheer, these spirited beings thrive in groups, eagerly pouring their firepower onto th' battlefield, showcasing that size doesn't define their strength.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Repeat-shroom can fire two small peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage: Thar she blows! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>20×2/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>

plants.name: Buckshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I carry me ancestors' spirit - I won't fall here!" Buckshooter declared. When told his helmet looked like Buckethead Zombie's, he retorted, "Then let's invoke their will and ride again!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Buckshooter has th' ability to crack armor.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Metal plant. Recovers 500 Toughness when fed metal object.
<color=black>•</color>Takes half th' damage from explosive cherries.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles knock back zombies and instantly break Type 2 armor (before damage reduction).</color></size>

plants.name: Nut-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nut or mushroom? Why worry about labels? Nut-shroom isn't about to tell ye it's actually a matsutake in disguise anyway.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Nut-shroom can be your stalwart defender despite its size. Sling yer hook!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Arrr!</color></size>

plants.name: Gnome-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"As a kid, I believed zombies were nothing more than fairy tale monsters," Gnome-shroom said softly. "Now, don't get it twisted—I'm just restoring them to th' fairy tale form they were always supposed to have."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shrinks a zombie and makes it fight for you!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Makes a zombie smaller (cuts Toughness to 70%) and fight for you.</color></size>

plants.name: Perfume-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' colorful Perfume-shroom makes a grand debut! With a blast of perfume, it can turn zombies around in an instant. Thar she blows! Blisterin' barnacles! Some claim it's a secret technique passed down by th' mushroom family, while others believe it's a cutting-edge military weapon. Perfume-shroom just smiles and says, "It's all thanks to Hypno-shroom helping me rinse me mouth everyday."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Perfume-shroom sprays fumes that can hypnotize zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Chance to hypnotize zombies with less than 50% Toughness. Th' lower th' zombie's HP, th' higher th' chance, up to 25%.
<color=black>•</color>Hypnotization threshold be removed for zombies already hit by Trippy-shroom. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Fume-shroom.</color></size>

plants.name: Trippy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Scaredy-shroom has always been afraid of zombies. Avast ye! In order to reduce her fear, Hypno-shroom tells her a bedtime story every day: "Actually, thar be good people among zombies." Over time, Scaredy-shroom was finally brainwashed. Now she can use spores to brainwash zombies. Of course, she be still very afraid. Thar she blows!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Trippy-shroom can fire spores in 7 colors.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Randomly fires 1 of 7 types of spores. When a zombie be hit by all 7 types of spores, it will be hypnotized. Each time it be hit by a type of spore, th' hypnotize probability of th' Perfume-shroom will increase. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Scaredy-shroom. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color></size>

plants.name: Gutsy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Courage fills me, nay fear remains~ Whether it's spring, fall, winter, or summer~" Gutsy-shroom nay longer shrinks in th' face of zombies. "I used to tremble, but Senior Fume-shroom told me, 'If a zombie gets near, spray your spores. Hiding won't solve anything.'"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gutsy-shroom be ready to pillage on th' zombies, near or far!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s (Long range); 30/1.5s (Short range, piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#8B0000>Shoots 2 spores at once. Savvy? Blisterin' barnacles! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! When zombies get within 4 tiles in range, sprays piercing fumes instead.</color></size>

plants.name: Charm-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm-shroom speaks with a soft smile, "Each spore carries me love, and when they bloom, it's like a spring breeze caressing th' air." She even twisted her head into a heart to express her feelings. Her eyes shine with sincerity, hoping that maybe, just maybe, th' zombies will understand her love.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charm-shroom can fire explosive Charm spores.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>120/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Deals 40 no-falloff splash damage in a 1-tile radius.
<color=black>•</color>Has a chance to hypnotize zombies with< 60% Toughness (ignoring Type 2 armor).
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Gutsy-shroom.</color></size>

plants.name: Tall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The taller ye are, th' more powerful ye become." Tall-nut firmly believed in this, which be why he always stayed on th' front line. Other plants would urge him to pillage it easy, but he'd just smile and say, "It's fine, I'm tall. As long as ye fight quickly, th' zombies won't have time to eat all of me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tall-nuts be heavy-duty wall plants that can't be vaulted or jumped over.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. Blocks Pole-vaulting Zombies, Dolphin Riders and Pogo Zombies. Cannot block Yeti Riders and charged Pogo jumps. Can only be placed on existing Wall-nuts.</color></size>

plants.name: Football-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Football-nut looked fierce, causing some small plants that didn't know th' truth to feel scared by his appearance. Dead men tell no tales. However, th' plants that understood Football-nut knew that beneath his serious exterior lay a heave-ho determination to protect his companions. Th' stolen helmet undoubtedly boosted his confidence.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Football-nut be able to hold a huge amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Metal plant. Can be fed metal objects to restore 500 Toughness.
<color=black>•</color>Tall plant.</color></size>

plants.name: Buck-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants hold conflicting feelings about Buck-nut. As an exemplary soldier, he executes orders with unwavering precision, yet his cold demeanor leaves much to be desired. Th' rust at th' corners of his mouth hints at a storied past. In th' quiet moments, however, Buck-nut wrestles with an unspoken worry: Shiver me timbers! "How do I prevent rust in a humid garden?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blocks th' zombies' advance with a wall of iron.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can be fed corresponding metal objects to restore 500 Toughness. This also applies to other Metal Plants. All Bucket plants receive half th' damage from explosive cherries. Shiver me timbers!</color></size>

plants.name: Repeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Unlike his bright and cheerful brother, Repeater leads a carefree life—until it's time to fight. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! He secretly mastered th' art of double shooting but kept it hidden from Peashooter. "I just want him to live happily, without ever needing to learn these battle skills."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Repeater fires two peas at a time. Yo ho ho.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color></size>

plants.name: Sun-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun-shroom hates sun. He hates it so much that when it builds up in his system, he spits it out as fast as he can. He just won't abide it. To him, sun be crass.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun-shrooms give small sun at first and normal sun later.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>15→25/25s
<color=black>Growth Time:</color><color=#8B0000>120s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>

plants.name: Gatling Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Pea, th' big brother of th' Pea family, stands tall with his gun barrel, th' very foundation of everyone's safety. His back be like a monument on th' battlefield, admired by all. Yet, he smiles modestly, knowing that his daily life be actually managed by his younger brother, Peashooter. "I can't live without him," he admits quietly.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gatling Pea shoots four peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×4/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Shiver me timbers!<color=#8B0000>Split Pea + Peashooter</color>

plants.name: Twin Sunflower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Twin Sunflower be known as sisters, always working behind th' scenes rather than on th' battlefield's front lines. Their role be to support everyone from th' rear, but make nay mistake—you must protect them. If they're harmed, many plants will quietly shed tears.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Twin Sunflowers give twice as much sun as a normal sunflower. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25×2/20s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thundering typhoons! Avast ye! Avast ye!<color=#8B0000>Sunflower + Sunflower</color>

plants.name: Snow Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' cold-blooded Snow Pea rarely displays his emotions to other plants. Dead men tell no tales. Some say his heart be even colder than th' snow peas he fires. Snow Pea doesn't want to come off that way, but every time he opens his mouth, th' bullets he launches plunge th' atmosphere around him to freezing temperatures.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Snow Peas shoot snow peas that damage and slow th' enemy. Savvy?

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each snow pea inflicts chill and adds 10 Cryo points. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color></size>

plants.name: Icicle-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Icicle-shrooms didn't set out to master refrigeration technology. During a hiking trip, they forgot their quilts and spent an entire night frozen atop a mountain, frost forming on their heads. Later, Snow Pea, captivated by their frosty appearance, gifted them some icicles to complement their new look.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Icicle-shroom fires icicles that slow down enemies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts chill and adds 5 Cryo points for every icicle hit. Pierce 2 times. Deals ×4 damage to frozen and chill-immune zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color></size>

plants.name: Hail-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Smaller in size, same big abilities!" Hail-shroom's signature poker face never cracks as he delivers his jokes, and that might just be why zombies freeze on th' spot.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hail-shroom can temporarily freeze zombies they come into contact with.

<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Freezes zombies that eat it in place.</color></size>

plants.name: Frost-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost-shroom stands out among th' Fume-shrooms. His study abroad in th' freezing Alaskan wilderness made him even cooler—literally. Though he only studied hair design for a few years, he's pretty proud of it.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Frost-shroom's fumes can pass through and freeze zombies.

<color=black>Damage: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict chill and add 5 Cryo points. Frost-shrooms can be upgraded to Frost Gloom-shrooms using a Fertilizer.</color></size>

plants.name: Shivery-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Shivery-shroom believes he stands apart from other scaredy-shrooms. Unlike them, he never shrinks in fear and joins in all activities without hesitation. However, that's only because when he gets scared, th' air around him plummets in temperature, leaving everyone too afraid to startle him.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shivery-shroom fires freezing spores. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Thundering typhoons!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict chill, add 10 Cryo points and deal ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Freeze broadside zombies when they get near.</color></size>

plants.name: Frost Tall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost Tall-nut raised his icy spikes high, ready to confront th' zombies. Others remarked on how "cold" and "silent" he seemed. Yet, his expression remained unchanged, resolute in his defense against th' undead. Th' truth was his face had simply frozen in place.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tall-nuts with a minty taste. They slow down zombies that bite them.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies that bite it be chilled and accumulate 10 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. When affected by Ice-shrooms, heals 1000 Toughness.</color></size>

plants.name: Demise-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I will freeze th' world, and silence will reign. Shiver me timbers! Avast ye! Th' extreme cold will disrupt your body's temperature system, so it won't be very painful," Demise-shroom proclaims. Blow me down! He seldom appears in battle, but when he does, a blizzard follows in his wake. With a flash of white light, even time seems to freeze.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Demise-shroom can destroy zombies in th' entire screen and freeze time. Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Freezes surviving zombies for 5 seconds. Also freezes th' level temporarily – nay new zombies will appear within 10 seconds. Blisterin' barnacles!</color></size>

plants.name: Cryonic-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A frosty beauty? An untouchable flower? Cryonic-shroom couldn't care less. She quietly took care of th' frosty ornament on her head, always ready to hand her Frost Tall-nut headgear to th' zombies at any time. "They'll appreciate th' chill vibe," she remarks coolly. Cleave him to the brisket! Shiver me timbers!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>When a zombie eats a Cryonic-shroom, it will transform into a Frost Tall-nut Zombie that will fight for you.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon being bitten turns th' zombie into a Hypnotized Frost Tall-nut Zombie, freezes th' full field and disappears. Blisterin' barnacles!</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>Hypno-shroom + Ice-shroom</color>

plants.name: Frenzy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>While some plants instinctively bury their heads when nervous, Frenzy-shroom thrives on excitement. His adrenaline spikes, causing his spores to fire at an increasing rate. It's wise to avoid provoking him again, or he might explode from all that pent-up energy.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Frenzy-shroom's attack speed increases as it attacks.

<color=black>Damage: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s (0.25s Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>Each attack will shorten th' attack interval by 0.1s, to a minimum of 0.25s. Hides and resets when zombies get near. Will explode when zombies get near while peak attack speed be reached.</color></size>

plants.name: Soot-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Soot-shroom, th' misanthropic workaholic, can't stand th' sight of zombies—too much of a distraction. He's got a small stash of bullets, but they're more than lethal enough. "Don't bother me unless it's urgent. If ye want them dead, just shoot them yourself." Still, his sharp efficiency keeps everyone looking up to him.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Soot-shroom can destroy most zombies in front of it.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800/30s</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>Click manually to attack all zombies in th' row in front.</color></size>

plants.name: Boom-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Boom-shroom may be small, but his temper be explosive. Disagree with him, and he might blow up—no eye contact needed. It's best to admire him from afar—just don't get too close, or things might get messy.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Boom-shroom will explode when it comes into contact with a zombie.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Will explode when zombies get close.</color></size>

plants.name: Curse-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' plants have always wondered why zombies can't be killed for good. Savvy? Recently, Curse-shroom uncovered th' mystery: Blimey! "I didn't really do much," it said modestly. Savvy? "I just kindly helped th' zombies activate their backup hidden power source. Doesn't that red zombie look especially harmless? I did warn them, though."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Zombies that eat th' Curse-shroom will get hypnotized, and explode after death.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies that eat th' Curse-shroom will be hypnotized and cursed. Th' cursed zombie will explode like a Doom-shroom upon death/leaving th' lawn, but also destroying th' plants in its tile (if thar be any).</color></size>

plants.name: Doomspike-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost has wrapped around his body, stripping away th' innocence of his youth. His eyes, colder and deadlier than any gun's barrel, now only show disdain for his enemies. He's become th' reaper, th' end of th' line. Anyone caught in his frosty sights would do well to leave one less meal prepared at home.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doomspike-shroom can fire chilly doomspikes.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×4/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Add 10 Cryo points to zombies each hit. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Pierces 2 times. Splashes for 10 damage without falloff within a range of 1 tile.</color></size>

plants.name: Squash-spreader
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"He has three heads, and his base isn't even a leaf! Yo ho ho. He looks nothing like a regular pea!" Many plants cower at th' sight of Squash-spreader's peculiar appearance. Yet, Squash-spreader remains unfazed. Thundering typhoons! Cleave him to the brisket! He thrives in his vibrant life, battling zombies, reading voraciously, playing chess, and winning every pool skipping contest.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash-spreader can fire small bouncing squashes.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every time a mini-squash hits th' ground, it inflicts 40 points of damage to broadside zombies.</color></size>

plants.name: Spike-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spike-nut be always glaring, always frowning. "I need them to know I'm not a snack," he insists. Th' zombies, however, just laugh—because when has a Wall-nut ever been scary? Then they pillage a bite. Then they learn. Th' hard way.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spike-nut punctures th' tires of approaching Zombonis!!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Reflects 50 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color>Punctures incoming tires in exchange for 500 Toughness. It cannot protect against submarines or being stomped by Gargantuars.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!<color=#8B0000>Wall-nut + Spikeweed</color>

plants.name: Spicy Kelp
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Passion be like fire," and Spicy Kelp knows this saying all too well. Nay amount of water can quench their fervent flames! Too bad, th' broadside zombies can only feel th' heat of th' "grilling". Look at them, they have already turned to ashes in this relentless fire!</color></size>
plants.info:
