plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After countless days and nights of research, Hypno Magnet finally mastered th' art of th' magnetic charm field. Avast ye! 'Now I can better persuade zombie friends to fight alongside us,' he said. 'Some think I threaten them with metal tools, but one day, th' truth will come to light.'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes metal objects and summons th' corresponding zombies to fight for you.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Uses metal objects to spawn hypnotized zombies with 40% HP.
<color=black>•</color>Auto-uses metals generated from Solar Magnet behind itself and those consumed by Magnet-shrooms in th' same Magnetic System.
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Magnet-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Morph-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>'I used to ferment bread,' Morph-shroom explained, 'but now I collect metal to build th' bread ovens.'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Putting an Iron Bucket on him might have interesting results.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×2 damage to Metal Zombies.</color>

plants.name: Rust-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>'I got canned again!' cries Rust-shroom, who was Morph-shroom just a moment ago. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Splice the mainbrace! 'All I did was accidentally make a coffee maker instead of an oven!'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Thar could be another twist if ye give him a Football Helmet?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>50/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×3 damage to Type 1 armors.</color>

plants.name: Football-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've always dreamed of being a Football player, and now I've finally got this hat of glory," said Football-shroom proudly. "But today, I've decided to pillage a break on th' sidelines." In reality, he's just a stadium security, keeping th' overenthusiastic fans out with his spores.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays fumes that penetrate all kinds of armor! Savvy?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Counts as an Advanced Fusion. Deals damage to armor and th' zombie in th' armor at th' same time. Thar she blows!</color>

plants.name: Titan Pea Turret
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As one of th' ultimate weapons of th' Pea family, th' Titan Pea Turret be always taught not to lie down without reason. "But me head be really heavy!" Sometimes, when being scolded, he complains like this. Batten down the hatches! Of course, he doesn't know that th' Pea elders tell him not to lie down just because it's actually kind of cute when he does.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Unleashes pure pea hell onto zombies!

<color=black>Toughness: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(20×3×2.25)/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Fires 3 peas at once.
<color=black>•</color>Firing speed increases th' longer th' turret fires and has 3 stages. After shooting 100 rounds, attack speed be increased by 50% (to 150%). After shooting another 200 rounds, attack speed be increased by another 50% (to 225% th' original). Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>Firing speed returns to normal when its attack resets. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Peas may proud beauty Imps due to th' turret's height.</color>

plants.name: Explode-o-tato Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Explode-o-tato Mine be a top chef, and his "hash cherries" and "potato jam" be highly praised in th' plant world. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! If he runs out of ingredients, he will cheerfully say: "I'll go buy some."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits into 8 Potato Mines in surrounding tiles.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Cleave him to the brisket! Explodes like a Potato Mine and spawns Potato Mines that only need 5s to arm themselves in a 3×3 range upon defeat. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>

plants.name: Chip Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chip Mine be a capable assistant to Explode-o-tato Mine, but most of her dishes be given low ratings by customers. "What's going on—" Chip Mine feels really guilty but doesn't know why. Arrr! Blow me down! Th' truth is, she be not sensitive to spicy flavors and always adds too much chili.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits into 7 Potato Mines in her lane.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Explodes like a Potato Mine and spawns up to 7 Potato Mines that only need 5s to arm themselves in her lane upon defeat.</color>

plants.name: Cherry Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Pumpkin be a distant relative of Cherry-nut, but every time Cherry Pumpkin meets Cherry-nut, he be always late. "I want to come early too," Cherry Pumpkin says, "but I can't resist jumping to anything red."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin that cannot be exploded by cherries!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Absorbs explosive cherries and heals 200 Toughness instead. Blimey!</color>

plants.name: Blizzard Commando
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' general commander of th' Pea family, Blizzard Commando has an aura that makes plants and zombies shudder even from miles away. But regarding his proud freezing ability, Blizzard Commando always keeps quiet about it, until one day a small pea accidentally opened his diary: "If I had known, I wouldn't have bet against th' Blazer Snipea. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Not only did I almost freeze to death in th' ice fields, but I also ended up like this. Shiver me timbers! Tonight, I'll make that gal eat three big bowls of chili—"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots snow peas at zombies, with a small chance of shooting a massive barrage!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×6/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of snow peas each attack, lasting 5s. Dead men tell no tales.</color>

plants.name: Grenadier Magnet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Selling well be also a skill." said Grenadier Magnet. Only Magnet-shrooms can turn hate into love. He once hated cherries th' most. Actually, he still does, but perhaps he has discovered a business opportunity?</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Transmutes metal objects into explosives!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attracts metal objects and turns them into explosives. Each object can be turned 5 times before consumption. Metal objects can be actively given to th' Grenadier Magnet for it to initiate an attack.</color>

plants.name: Blazer Snipea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other snipers envy Blazer Snipea for being a reliable assistant to th' commander, even though she be still a little one. "Talent be one thing, but... I have to thank th' commander for cultivating me!~"Blazer Snipea says, but in reality, it's because Blizzard Commando be naturally cold and always keeps Blazer Snipea as a warm-up buddy.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Marks and blows up zombies anywhere on th' map! Thar she blows!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict th' Enflamed debuff and deal 100 damage to broadside zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>Snipea + Jalapeno</color>

plants.name: Pea-storm Commando
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Faced with th' crazy zombies and powerful teammates, Pea-storm Commando, who came to th' yard for more challenges, feels immense pressure, and his temper be getting worse... However, th' plants be always shocked by th' extreme violent tendencies of th' Pea-storm Commando, who fires peas madly from a distance. Thar she blows! Gatling Frenzy-shroom has already decided to ask for his contact information.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots peas at zombies, with a small chance of shooting a massive barrage!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×6/1.5 Seconds
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>?×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of random peas (regular peas, ignited peas, snow peas, hypno peas, but all flattened to 20 damage) each attack, lasting 5s. Ye can switch between Pea-storm Commando and Snipea with Peashooter.</color>

plants.name: Pumpkin Bunker
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once, a pair of pumpkins dreamed of joining a circus. But after a magnetic mishap left them stuck together, they discovered a better calling: Standing their ground as an impenetrable shield. Th' circus can wait.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Protect two tiles at once!

<color=black>Toughness: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>12000</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: Batten down the hatches!<color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Can only be planted on plants that occupy 2 tiles. When moving th' plant inside Pumpkin Bunker, th' Pumpkin Bunker moves with it.
<color=black>•</color>Plants within th' Pumpkin Bunker become immune to cherry and Jack-in-the-box explosions. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Restores full HP when absorbing Jack-in-the-box explosions, restores 200 HP when absorbing cherry explosions, and can consume metal objects to restore 500 HP.</color>
plants.cost: <size=35>Fusion Recipe: Arrr!<color=#8B0000>Joker Pumpkin ∞ [Magnet-shroom] ∞ Cherry Pumpkin < Jicamagic (Place On Middle)

plants.name: Nugget-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some plants asked: "Why be th' top of Nugget-shroom red?", to which he replied, "Well, let me ask ye first..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can reproduce itself!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Spawns a new Nugget-shroom in th' same tile after 20 Seconds. Each Nugget-shroom can only reproduce once. Upon death, it deals 300 damage to broadside zombies</color>

plants.name: Spuddy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Why does Spuddy-shroom explode after a few attacks? His explanation be quite touching: "Every attack I make be burning me life!" But th' truth is—he's just a magician who doesn't want to do much work. After a few attacks, he decides to use a potato firework to perform a grand "fungus" transformation.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes Toughness to fire high-damage spores!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>600/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Each attack costs 75 Toughness. If kept alive for 20 seconds after being planted, his red light will turn off with attack power reduced by 90%, but attacks will nay longer cost Toughness. Upon death, it deals 600 damage to broadside zombies.</color>

plants.name: Foul-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With a pale skin, a hairstyle that could rival a cathedral dome and a grin full of crooked teeth, Foul-shroom looks like it's auditioning for th' villain in a fairytale. Ironically, he usually gets th' role of a vampire.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays poison gas at zombies!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>Attack adds 1 Poison point to zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies that bite it be forced to switch lanes.</color>

plants.name: Spicicle
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold on th' outside, fiery on th' inside. Blimey! This be how other plants describe Spicicle. "Don't be fooled by me calm appearance, me explosive energy be beyond your imagination," murmurs Spicicle. Oh, by th' way, he's also quite skilled at making ice-cream.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Has both th' properties of Ice-shroom and Jalapeno!

<color=black>Damage: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#8B0000>Loses 20% Toughness every 3 seconds. While present, absorbs damage for all plants. Upon death, triggers Jalapeno in his row (ignores damage reduction) and fullscreen Ice-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Chomper Maw
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chomper Maw won th' grand prix in an Gourmet king contest, finishing 10 giga garg cakes in 44 seconds — with 3 of those seconds wasted because he didn't hear th' starting whistle. "If there's another event like this, please call me. Th' buffet near th' garden won't let me in anymore," said th' Chomper Maw during th' interview.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Swallows all zombies that get too close!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>[8 + 3 × ln(Sum Toughness of Zombies)]s</color>
<color=black>•</color><color=#8B0000>For reference: Zombie - 24.8 Seconds | Buckethead - 29.9 Seconds | Giga Gargantuar - 34 Seconds | 10 Giga Gargantuars - 41s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Can swallow all zombies in a 1.5 tile range, including Gargantuars. Unable to swallow other zombies that have immunity to Chompers.</color>

plants.name: Kraken-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sailors whisper of th' Giant Kraken of th' Northern Sea, its name alone enough to turn th' bravest hearts cold. Blisterin' barnacles! But Kraken-shroom? He's got nay time for legends. He didn't come to terrify—he came to play. And his favorite game? Pushing zombies around like driftwood.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can repel zombies in front.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=#006400>Tangled Debuff:</color><color=#8B0000>Adds 1 Tangle Value per hit, dealing additional damage based on th' Tangle Value.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Repels approaching zombies (single target) and deals 100 damage.
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe:<color=#8B0000>Tangle Kelp ∞ [Sea-shroom] ∞ Tangle Kelp< Jicamagic (Place On Middle)</color>

plants.name: Mind-blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants be always curious why Mind-blover pulls th' zombies back. Mind-blover explains: "Since Blover always pushes zombies to th' opposite direction they face, I believe it's only natural for me to do th' same to hypnotized zombies."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can pull back hypnotized zombies!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Pulls all hypnotized zombies back, lasting for 5s, but reduces their HP by 10% max Toughness (except for zombies in th' leftmost column).</color>

plants.name: Twin Saw-me-not
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Twin Saw-me-not's two heads be constantly arguing — one swears spinning be th' best approach, while th' other insists launching saw blades be superior. Somehow, their teamwork still cuts through th' competition.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks broadside zombies with its blades and can also strike at a distance!

<color=black>Damage: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>8/0.02 Seconds (Melee); 16/1.5 Seconds (Ranged)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Th' front head attacks like a regular Saw-me-not, while th' back head targets all zombies on th' screen (prioritizing flying zombies).
<color=black>•</color>Gains 5 points of Shield every 0.5s, up to 300 max.</color>

plants.name: Boomwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Boomwood's Afro bounces rhythmically, as if dancing to a beat only it can hear. Some say his groove inspires his fiery creations, while others just appreciate th' spectacle — both th' style and th' explosions leave a lasting impact.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns explosive cherry drones that seek out zombies.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Generates a homing cherry drone for every 30 peas that pass through.
<color=black>•</color>Converts any explosive cherry that passes through into a cherry drone.
<color=black>•</color>Thar can be up to 3 cherry drones at once.
<color=black>•</color>Upon death, it triggers a Cherry Bomb explosion.</color>

plants.name: Pepper Popper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Business be booming for Pepper Popper, but th' zombies aren't celebrating. Every time a firecracker goes off, they end up singed, dazed, and fuming—literally. "Oh, lighten up," Pepper Popper teases. "You look great in charcoal black. Thundering typhoons!
plants.info:
<size=36>Propels himself towards th' zombies, causing damage and knocking them back.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>After being planted, waits for 1s before flying forward in his lane, knocking back zombies it encounters and causing 300 area damage each impact.
<color=black>•</color>Deals ×15 damage to Nian zombies.</color>

plants.name: Iceweed
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Breaking news from th' first Plants vs. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Zombies Hockey Tournament! Iceweed skated to victory, leaving th' Bobsled Zombies scrambling. Blisterin' barnacles! But now, they're calling foul! "I did nothing wrong," Iceweed insists, adjusting their icy spikes. "And these springs? Just a little pre-game safety gear."
plants.info:
<size=36>Iceweed can slow down zombies that walk on it.

<color=black>Damage: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>40/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Iceweeds can be upgraded to Icerocks using a Fertilizer. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each hit inflicts Chill and adds 10 Cryo points. Dead men tell no tales.</color>

plants.name: Disguster
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Disguster used to have a simple life, working at a bustling barbecue joint whar business was booming. "Ah, those were th' days," it sighs. "Customers used to leave with a green glow of happiness after I blew away th' overwhelming garlic. Now? Things just aren't th' same."
plants.info:
<size=36>Disguster can poison zombies.

<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts 5 Poison Points to every non-poisoned zombie in th' screen and applies th' Poisoned debuff. Inflicts an additional 1 Poison Point and increases th' time th' debuff stays by 5 more seconds.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Forces Zombies to change lanes.</color>

plants.name: Frostburn-wood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"One input, one output. Avast ye! Blisterin' barnacles! That's th' rule." Frostburn-wood prided himself on his structured logic. "That's why I counteract Torchwood's flames with pure, unyielding frost." But put them together? Things got... Messy. Fire and ice, heat and cold—sometimes they balanced, sometimes they clashed, and sometimes, well... Yo ho ho. Physics just gave up.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can turn normal peas into snow peas or polar ice peas, and water orbs into ice blocks.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Turns th' normal peas that pass through into snow peas, and th' snow peas that pass through into polar ice peas for ×2 damage and ×2 Cryo points.
<color=black>•</color>Turns th' water orbs from Spruce Sprayshooters into ice blocks.</color>

plants.name: Twinkle-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Twinkle-shroom would be all over Dave's house, on th' floor, on th' table, on th' dinner plate - Dave always forgot about th' Doc's reminder - who cares, Daisy loved th' gummy vitamins anyway!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A small mushroom that shoots mini-stars.

<color=black>Damage: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>20×5/2.25 Seconds (Equivalent to th' DPS of 10 Peashooters)</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Batten down the hatches!</color>

plants.name: Solar Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"What do ye guys think 'flower pot' means, huh?" Solar Pot snapped. "Is it a pot for growing flowers? Yo ho ho. Or be it a pot that be a flower? Either way, let's get one thing straight—I am a flowerpot. End of discussion."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates extra Sun for you.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>15/25s</color>

plants.name: Lumos Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Beyond th' fog, she watches, a prophet untouched by mortal blindness. When God willed light into existence, she stepped forth. "By decree of th' Almighty, I have come to th' land of Seth. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Th' fire looms, but with this sacred light, I shall protect th' lost from its grasp."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>It can dispel fog and block bullets.

<color=black>Energy Limit:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Shield & Light Range:</color><color=#8B0000>3×3</color>
<color=black>Special:<color=#99582a>Lumos System</color></color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Provides 1 Lumos Level and dispels fog like a Plantern.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes Energy to block projectiles. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Each block consumes Energy based on th' damage of th' projectile (excluding basketballs). Tridents cannot be blocked.
<color=black>•</color>Restores (25 x Lumos Level) Energy every second, pausing to rest for 5 seconds when it be completely exhausted.
<color=black>•</color>Reduces Energy first to absorb damage, whar 5 Energy = 1 Toughness.</color>

plants.name: Umbrella Thorn
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Umbrella Thorn just dropped his latest song, "Prickly Cactus." With a hopeful glint in his eyes, he mused, "Maybe one day, people will like me as much as they love roses. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! I know it won't happen overnight, but I'll keep trying me best."</color>
plants.info: <size=36>Can shoot down flying zombies and repel airships.

plants.name: Silver Sunflower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Who says sunflowers only bask in th' sun? Silver Sunflower has a knack for more than just growing—she's a master silversmith! With techniques passed down from her brewer, she forges dazzling silverware and jewelry, each piece shimmering with history. As they say, "A brewer's legacy lives on, and elegance never goes unnoticed."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates Sun faster.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: Cleave him to the brisket!<color=#8B0000>Sunflower + Marigold</color>

plants.name: Golden Sunflower
plants.introduce: Standing guard over a trophy had beenSoLast season. Now? She was ready to shine—and not just under th' sun. "Look, I love a good tan, but let's be real... I was made for th' fight!"
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates Sun faster... Sling yer hook! Faster!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Every 10 seconds, 50 Sun be accumulated, up to 10,000. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Th' Sun limit in th' level be adjusted to 50,000.
<color=black>•</color>Th' excess will be stored in th' available Golden Sunflowers. Avast ye!
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins; makes all Golden Sunflowers release their stored Sun.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost:</color><color=#8B0000>3000 Coins; each existing Golden Sunflower will double th' cost</color>

plants.name: Frost Wall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost Wall-nut huffed as he hit th' ground again. "Do th' janitors ever remember to put up 'Caution: Slippery Floor' signs!?" he grumbled. But in his frustration, he failed to realize something very concerning—he was shrinking.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Zombies that bite him be slowed down.

<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies that chew it will be slowed down and will accrue Cryo points. Frost Wall-nuts can be upgraded to Frost Tall-nuts using a Fertilizer.</color>

plants.name: Pumpkin Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once a chip shop owner, Pumpkin Mine had a simple business model: Cut th' fries in half but keep th' price th' same. Th' customers disagreed. Now in th' Garden, he's offering a different kind of deal—one that ends with a bang. Yet, for some reason, people still bring up his barnacle covered menu. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A shorter Pumpkin.

<color=black>Toughness: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). However, non-"short" plants inside it will be hit. Thar she blows! Blimey! Each time it be damaged, a small explosion will occur, causing 500 points of damage to zombies.</color>

plants.name: Doom Cactus
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doom Cactus be a firm believer in th' Art of War of Plants: Bide your time, strike hard, and leave nothing standing. Whether it's zombies shambling through th' battlefield or armored rats scurrying for cover, one well-placed explosion be all it takes to turn th' tide.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires destructive thorns.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Each attack has a 0% starting chance of unleashing an Ultimate attack. If it fails, th' chance be increased by 5% for th' next attack.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Shoots a large number of thorns forward, which can hit airborne units.</color>

plants.name: Doom Chomper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>In th' Chomper's Big Eater Championship, Doom Chomper was a force to be reckoned with—until he took things a little too far. "He didn't just eat his cake—he incinerated mine!" a fellow contestant recalled. Unsurprisingly, he was disqualified for excessive destruction. Batten down the hatches!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Devours a zombie to produce a Doom explosion.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>60s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Each time it successfully bites a zombie, a Doom-shroom explosion be released, causing a crater to appear in front of it (does not trigger explosion if in th' rightmost column).</color>

plants.name: Flame-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' head chef of th' restaurant, performing a fiery dragon dance on th' teppan be a must-have show for every dinner. But every time, at least one guest ends up getting burned. Batten down the hatches! Word has it that to make up for it, th' Flame-shroom gave them an encore performance.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Flamethrower incarnated.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>33/1.5s (Piercing, deals frame damage of 1 33 times)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals fire damage and inflicts Enflamed debuff. Flame-shrooms can be upgraded to Flame Gloom-shrooms using a Fertilizer.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: Thundering typhoons! Fume-shroom + Jalapeno<color=#8B0000></color>

plants.name: Doom Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doom Pea and Frenzy-shroom be great friends—one's a hothead, th' other’s laid-back. But together, they're th' perfect pair. Arrr! "We may be opposites, but we bring out th' best in each other."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A damage-scaling Peashooter and th' perfect partner for Frenzy-shroom.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks penetrate Type 2 armor. Damage increases by 1 each attack, up to 60. If a Frenzy-shroom be planted 1 tile behind it, Doom Pea gains Frenzy-shroom's attack speed and Frenzy-shroom gains Doom Pea's attack damage.</color>

plants.name: Lumos Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Lumos Pot always emits a warm glow, so it be often used as a nightlight. If ye look closely, ye will also find a small inscription on th' edge of th' pot that says, "Firefly habitat, please do not disturb."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Flower Pot that can be used as a small Plantern, providing 1 Lumos level for its tile.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Dispels a small patch of fog, providing 1 Lumos level for its tile.</color>

plants.name: Spring Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Holding your breath, focusing, and striking with precision!" Spring Melon be very patient, always waiting for th' perfect moment to make a move. If ye ask him how he manages to stay calm, he will always mention his mentor, Imitater.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A big shroom with coiling vines that lob watermelons after charging.

<color=black>Damage: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>120/4s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>4 tiles ahead</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Charges when not attacking for at least 4.5s to increase damage to (1 + charge time × 0.5) times th' base damage. Maximum charge time: 30s.</color>

plants.name: Sparkwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After graduating from university, Sparkwood returned to th' mountainous region to teach. "From th' moment I received an education, I understood that knowledge be meant to be passed on like a 'spark'!" th' flame of knowledge ignited th' students' enthusiasm and also th' zombies.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Torchwood shaped like a Starfruit, ignites star projectiles.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Ignites passing star-shaped projectiles (except thorn stars and jack-in-the-box stars), adding 20 damage and removing their other traits. Sling yer hook! Ignited stars do splash damage in a similar way to ignited peas.</color>

plants.name: Spicy Starfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spicy Starfruit silently glares, while th' other starfruits keep their distance: "He looks too scary." But Spicy Starfruit doesn't care; he be focused on creating an ultimate piece of art. He firmly believes that when he finally blooms, everyone will pillage notice.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Explodes and releases high-damage spicy stars.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100 × 25</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Does not trigger th' Jalapeno effect Immediately when fused. Explodes instead 1 second after fusion, releasing Jalapeno effect and exploding into 25 spicy stars.</color>

plants.name: Doomwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Whenever someone asks Doomwood, "What's th' secret to grilling?" he just silently collects and repurposes th' embers. It's not that he's indifferent; if he spoke, you'd just end up with a face full of ash.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doomwood keeps burning even after a Doom-shroom explosion and it takes burning to th' next level.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When its Irradiation value be 0, it behaves th' same as Torchwood.
<color=black>•</color>When th' Irradiation value be not 0, turns peas and regular ignited peas into Irradiated peas, with +30 damage and a nay falloff 1/3 splash damage. Irradiated peas inflict th' Irradiated debuff.
<color=black>•</color>Can also use 10 Irradiation values to strengthen Doom peas or Mini Doom-shroom projectiles, ×2 or ×6 their damage respectively, and to enhance their splash effect to be th' same as an Ultimate Doom Shell.</color>
<color=#7303fc>Irradiation value:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Initial: 60, Maximum: 60, 1 point be lost per second.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 60 points when affected by Doom-shroom explosions, and 10 points when any zombie within a 5×5 area dies with th' Irradiated debuff. After igniting 60 projectiles, instantly restores Irradiation points to 60 th' next time it reaches 0.
<color=black>•</color>Irradiated can coexist with th' Chilled, Enflamed and Poisoned debuff: Dead men tell no tales.
- Chilled: Irradiated adds another 10% to th' slow factor.
- Enflamed: Irradiated adds another 10% to th' extra damage. Blisterin' barnacles!
- Poisoned: Irradiated makes Poison lasts indefinitely. Arrr!</color>

plants.name: Scareless Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Trust me, it's very safe inside." Scareless Pumpkin gently reassures Scaredy-shroom, as th' built-in phonograph and fairy tale books help them nay longer worry about th' zombie horde.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin with th' color of th' Scaredy-shroom. Scaredy plants inside th' pumpkin will not be afraid. Arrr! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Scaredy plants inside th' pumpkin will not be afraid (Frenzy-shroom and Gatling Frenzy-shroom will not self-destruct).</color>

plants.name: Starry-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Guys in th' distance, nay matter who ye are, except for th' circus people, don't come over!" th' Starry-shroom, trembled, "I, I am very powerful!" He kept attacking, thinking that this would scare off those with ill intentions, but he didn't notice that his bullets weren't even hitting straight ahead.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Starry-shroom shoots stars faster and in 5 directions, but also gets frightened more often.

<color=black>Damage: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>20×5/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Keeps shooting stars in 5 directions like Starfruit, but becomes afraid and stops if thar be a zombie in its range.</color>

plants.name: Squash Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash Pumpkin has never met a match in arm wrestling, has diligently learned various techniques for skipping stones, and be very good at selecting stones—his only bane be that he be very afraid of water and can only watch others skip stones.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' cozy nest of Squashes. When thar be specific plants in th' shell, it can spawn squashes.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>225</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Squash plants in Squash Pumpkins lose their ability to detect enemies.
<color=black>•</color>When thar be Squash or Squashwood plants in Squash Pumpkin, a baby squash with a maximum jump distance of 1.5 tiles be spawned and jumps forward, damaging zombies when it lands. It disappears after 6 jumps and regenerates 3s after th' last baby squash disappears.
<color=black>•</color>Depending on th' type of Squash inside it, th' baby squashes have different effects:
- Squashes and Squash-nut: Baby squash does 1/8 th' original damage.
- Gourd-pult: Baby squash drops a melon on landing that does th' same damage.
- Squashwood: Dead men tell no tales. Baby squash does 225 damage.
- Butternut-pult: Baby squash has a 25% chance to drop a butter on landing that does th' same damage.
- Infernal Squashwood: Avast ye! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Baby squash does 1800 damage and releases a Jalapeno effect each time it lands.
- Big Crunch Squash: Baby squash releases a Cherry Bomb effect each time it lands and also a ring of 12 pieces of Nuclear Debris th' last time. Both do 1/8 th' original damage.
<color=black>•</color>Abilities do not work in water lanes.</color>

plants.name: Popcorn-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The results of this experiment: Thar she blows! Dense planting be not conducive to plant growth, and th' corn ears have obviously shrunk." Dave bent down, took out a magnifying glass, and looked at th' Popcorn-pult, "Not suitable for making corn rolls anymore." Popcorn-pult said angrily, "The results of this experiment show that th' concentrated ones be all th' essence!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A tiny Kernel-pult, with a chance to throw a small butter that shrinks zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Has a 25% chance to throw a small butter that deals 40 damage, which shrinks th' size and health of non-shrunken zombies by a factor of 0.7, otherwise it will be stunned for 1.5s, while Imps be killed instantly. Prioritizes zombies that be not shrunken.</color>

plants.name: Hoverleaf
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After resigning, Hoverleaf embarked on a journey around th' world. "Sailing with th' wind to th' places your heart desires, isn't that very romantic?" He compiled his experiences into a book, which received praise from all walks of life. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A smaller floating Umbrella Leaf that can only protect th' 1 tile below.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Hovering plant. Shiver me timbers! He shares th' same traits as Umbrella Leaf, but can only protect th' plant right below it.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Many plants were curious about how Hypno Pumpkin had only subdued one zombie. "I'm a dedicated person, so of course I need a dedicated zombie," Hypno Pumpkin said, scratching his head.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hypno Pumpkin makes a hypnotized zombie stay by your side.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>Has a 4% chance to hypnotize zombies eating him. Forces up to 1 hypnotized zombie to stay in his tile, and uses that zombie as a shield first when under attack.</color>

plants.name: Umbrella Shell
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Umbrella Shell be th' trendiest hairstylist in th' garden, known for its ability to create cool hairstyles on hard nut shells. Although th' lifespan of this hairstyle be short, it doesn't avast people from loving it—and th' opening of th' sixth nut hair salon chain.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Umbrella Shell has th' traits of both his fusion ingredients. Savvy?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Has th' characteristics of Umbrella Leaf and Wall-nut. Can repel approaching zombies, dealing 40 damage every time.</color>

plants.name: Bombrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Bombrella has changed to a new hairstyle, making it look even more rebellious and irritable, like a delinquent wandering th' streets. Dead men tell no tales. But don't be fooled by its appearance; it actually has a soft heart and even helps th' barber clean up th' fallen leaves.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>When repelling, it causes small-scale cherry explosions, and harnesses th' power of cherry explosions to protect surrounding plants.

<color=black>Toughness: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>600</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits th' traits of Umbrella Leaf.
<color=black>•</color>Repel approaching zombies and release a small-range cherry explosion with a damage of 300.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to explosive basketballs.
<color=black>•</color>For every instance of Cherry-fused defensive plants or Cherry Pot healing through cherry explosions in th' surrounding 3×3 area, it gains 1 level of energy, up to 100 level.
<color=black>•</color>Bombrella uses 2 levels to absorb any damage in th' surrounding 3×3 area.</color>

plants.name: Chrono Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Nothing has been born earlier than th' universe, and nothing will perish slower than th' universe. But for life, his/her body be not as enduring as th' death of a star; his/her spirit be even more eternal than th' universe. Cherish th' present, seize th' future, even if it's just for a day or two, that be still a mayfly's life." — "Chronicles"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Peashooter with th' power to warp space and time, firing neutron peas that inflict th' Chronoshift effect, erasing every trace of th' target from th' time continuum.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks deal nay damage but apply Chronoshift for 1.5s, or extend th' duration by 1 second if th' target be already affected. Deals only 100 damage to Mini-bosses.</color>
<color=#00008B>Chronoshift:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies under this effect receive a countdown of (HP / 30) seconds, after which they be instantly erased. If th' effect ends early, they pillage 30 × (elapsed seconds) points worth of damage.</color>

plants.name: Kernel Morph
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The elderly also need to learn to keep up with th' times," th' Kernel Morph said, "This new force of magnetism has truly opened me eyes." Of course, thar be a small problem; it always makes th' neighbors think he's a scrap collector.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' Kernel Morph can fuse with metal objects and changes into th' corresponding form based on th' type.

<color=black>Damage: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#8B0000>Has a 25% chance to throw a magnetic butter with 80 damage, and stuns th' target for 4s. Can fuse with Bucket and Chrono Core.</color>

plants.name: Portal-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You've seen Interstellar, right?" Portal-pult often brings up his favorite sci-fi movie. "The male protagonist drives into a cornfield at th' beginning and then pilots a spaceship into a black hole at th' end. Thar must be some connection between th' two!" Portal-pult insists.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Portal-pult has a chance to throw a neutron butter that generates a mini black hole. Blow me down!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Sling yer hook! Has a 25% chance to throw a neutron butter with 100 damage, which generates a mini black hole when it hits. Th' mini black hole massively slows zombies down and explodes after 2 seconds, causing 100 damage and reducing th' countdown of zombies with th' chronoshift effect by 30s.</color>

plants.name: Bolt-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Bolt-pult has been considering buying some anti-rust paint lately, as his butter always ends up with a bit of a rusty taste, which seriously hinders his ability to make butter cakes for his brothers. "Butter with a rusty taste might only be good for fighting zombies."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bolt-pult throws Iron kernels or Iron butter that be miraculously effective against Type 1 armor.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Has a 25% chance to throw an Iron butter with 100 damage, which stuns th' target for 4 seconds and removes their Type 1 armor instantly.</color>

plants.name: Frozen Cherry
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' plants all say that Frozen Cherry be calm, introverted, and taciturn. Sling yer hook! "I occasionally confide in th' other cherries," Frozen Cherry said, "they call it 'explosive news.'"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry mold made of ice, he absorbs cherry projectiles from plants to generate Cherry Bomb seed packets.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Absorbing cherries, ignited cherries, and explosive cherries grants 1, 2, and 10 energy points respectively. Blimey! For every 100 energy points collected, a Cherry Bomb seed packet be generated. Upon death, unleashes a Cherry Bomb explosion and freezes all zombies in its range for 10 seconds.</color>

plants.name: Dormant-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Using magnetism to confine nuclear energy be a topic that Dormant-shroom has been researching for a long time. This be a difficult task, and timing be crucial; numerous laboratories of his be now in ruins. However, it seems that th' zombies be more eager for him to succeed than th' plants.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Dormant-shroom be stabilized by magnetic force and can be fused with metal to transform into a corresponding form.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Does not explode until further fusion.</color>

plants.name: Doomwarp-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Time travel personnel have passed through, complete. Th' time tunnel has exited th' target world, complete. Observed impact be within th' expected range, complete. Savvy? Proceed to th' next step, destroy th' tunnel to prevent use by others or organizations." — "Time Planning Bureau"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doomwarp-shroom possesses th' power of hyperspace bending. Its explosion inflicts chronoshift to any foe unfortunate enough to be caught in its effects.

<color=black>Damage: Sling yer hook! Dead men tell no tales. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Doom-shroom. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Explosion applies th' Chronoshift effect for 30s or resets th' remaining duration to 30s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thar she blows! Avast ye! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Dormant-shroom</color>

plants.name: Chrono-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other plants often hear Chrono-nut recount th' mysteries on his adventures — like a Sphinx with a zombie’s head, a minivan that only beeps, and th' 1001 kinds of machines developed by GFishtus Corps.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Wall-nut with spacetime powers. He has a chance to teleport back attackers and can rewind health once when near death.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>25% chance to teleport biters to th' far right of th' same row (10s cooldown).
<color=black>•</color>When taking lethal damage, rewinds HP to what it was 3s ago and becomes invulnerable for 3s (single use ability).</color>

plants.name: Pea Drone
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pea Drone sees himself as th' future of garden warfare. Blow me down! "Support-type aerial drones — a weapon of a new era." Unfortunately, he has little time to promote his ideas — he works three jobs to pay off his soilless cultivation loan. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A peashooter drone that enhances firepower when coordinating with straight-shooting plants below.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Hovering plant. If th' shooter directly beneath it attacks faster than once every 1.5 seconds, Pea Drone syncs its attack rate to match.</color>

plants.name: Spruce Sawshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>In th' snowy plains, it’s said that th' taller th' Christmas tree, th' happier th' next year will be. So who can place th' star on top? That's a job for th' Spruce Sawshooter and his unmatched aim.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing saws that leave spinning spruce needles on zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s; 1×75/1.5s (Spinning spruce needle)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles pierce once (including ice blocks) and leave spinning spruce needles on th' first zombie hit. Blimey! Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Spinning needles deal 1 damage every 0.02 seconds for 1.5 seconds.</color>

plants.name: Soak-me-not
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After equipping a high-pressure water jet, Soak-me-not greatly improved her cutting efficiency. But there's one downside — flowing water be hard to come by on th' snowy plains.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold-resistant, deals more damage when it's sufficiently cold and applies chill when thar be ice charges.

<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>8/0.02s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15 ice charge when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom respectively. Thar she blows!
<color=black>•</color>With ice charges, attacks deal double damage, inflict Deep Chill and add 1 Cryo Point, but have an 1/9 chance to use up a charge.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: Cleave him to the brisket!<color=#8B0000>Saw-me-not + Aloe Aqua</color>

plants.name: Spruce Sprayshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Can an archer compete without a bow? Avast ye! Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Avast ye! Spruce Sprayshooter shrugs: Yo ho ho. "It's just waterbending."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bends and shoots water orbs; consumes ice charges to launch ice blocks instead. Blow me down!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>50/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color>Uses 1 ice charge to shoot an ice block with double th' damage that inflicts Deep Chill and adds 40 Cryo points, dealing ×4 damage to Frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>

plants.name: Spruce Supershooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spruce Supershooter be stern, cold, and strict—perfect traits for a top-tier coach.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots spinning hydro-needles that cling to zombies. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Consumes ice charges to shoot spinning cryo-needles instead.

<color=black>Damage: Savvy? Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>5×75/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color>Spinning hydro-needles deal 5 damage per 0.02 seconds and last 1.5 seconds.
<color=black>•</color>Uses 1 ice charge to shoot spinning cryo-needles with double th' damage that inflict Deep Chill and adds 1 Cryo points, dealing ×4 damage to Frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>

plants.name: Snowbloom Spruce
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"People parley about iron trees blooming or barnacle covered trees flowering," Snowbloom Spruce murmurs. "But I’m neither iron nor old. I just... Never mind." He stops talking to admire his blossoms.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spruce with snow lotus blooms and a reduced cost for healing broadside plants.

<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 ice charge passively every 10 seconds.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/blizzard respectively.
<color=black>•</color>Awakens at 5 charges, firing an ice orb that deals 100 damage with 3×3 splash (no falloff) and inflicts Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color>While awake, consumes 1 charge per sec to heal a 3×3 area by 50 HP. Returns to sleep when charge be exhausted.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Spruce Sharpshooter + Snow Lotus</color>

plants.name: Shield Lotus
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Her bunny ears be so cute!" "She’s adorable even when asleep!" "Like a rose!" Shield Lotus sleepily swats away th' fans that lack a sense of personal space—yes, she's thorny like a rose, but that hasn’t stopped th' admiration.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A steel-leaved Lotus that heals broadside plants and gives them shields.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits Snow Lotus traits. Healing also grants 50 points of Shield to each plant. See Saw-me-not for shield mechanic explanation.</color>

plants.name: Spruce Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spruce Firnace always carries dry spruce leaves. Blow me down! He claims they're excellent "green" fuel—flammable and easy to collect. Right now, he's sun-drying a batch.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Firnace that absorbed Spruce Sharpshooter, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Firnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Firnace after 210s.</color>

plants.name: Saw Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Using potassium as fuel not only provides ample heat, but also gives off beautiful flame colors," Saw Firnace enthusiastically explains. "And this fan, modified from a circular saw, helps blow hot air right to you." As a top employee of th' snowfield sauna, he's always committed to providing th' best service.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Firnace that absorbed Saw-me-not, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Firnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Firnace after 120s.</color>

plants.name: Lotus Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I was born extraordinary," claims Lotus Firnace. He thinks he glows from phosphorus fire — but actually, it’s just fireflies hiding from th' cold inside him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Firnace that absorbed Snow Lotus, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Firnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Firnace after 60s.</color>

plants.name: Aloe Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Aloe Firnace has upgraded its air system to better regulate temperature in small areas. Th' only problem: Th' water dripping from th' condenser tends to freeze smartly in th' snowfield.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Firnace that absorbed Aloe Aqua, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Firnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Firnace after 90s.</color>

plants.name: Aloe Alba
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doctor Aloe Alba be th' most beloved young doctor in th' hospital. It's not just due to his diligence and skill — it might also be his mustache-like leaves. After all, patients tend to trust older-looking doctors.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws aloe extract upwards; upon falling, it heals surrounding plants and temporarily boosts their attack speed.

<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1 ice charge passively every 5 seconds.
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1/1/15/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Ice-shroom/blizzard respectively.
<color=black>•</color>Every 5 seconds, consumes 5 charges to heal all plants in a 3×3 area for 50 HP and boost their attack speed by 30% for 5 seconds.</color>
<color=black>Special: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>

plants.name: Icy Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>To tame its hot temper, Icy Squash locked itself in th' freezer for three days and nights. Now it keeps th' mood ice-cold — so cold that th' other plants don't dare say a word to 'set it off.' As for zombies… let's just say, nay one's allowed to 'break th' ice' with it.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash imbued with freezing power.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash) + 600 (3×3)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon landing deals additional 600 damage to zombies in a 3×3 area and freezes them for 4s.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've finally realized zombies really be our friends,"said Hypno Squash, who smartly joined th' Zombuddies Club. Th' only problem: Avast ye! His extremely radical way of showing friendship turned all th' other members into conservative ones.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash that overwhelms zombies with charm.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Hypnotizes th' zombies he crushes, deals 1800 damage instead if th' zombie cannot be hypnotized.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Garlic doesn't quite fit in with th' rest of th' garlic family — he's far too popular for that. Loved and envied by his kin, he pays them nay mind. All he wants be to pull his hat low over his eyes and enjoy a peaceful nap whenever he can.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Garlic with a shroomy hypno-cap mushroom on its head. Blow me down! Yo ho ho.

<color=black>Special: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Causes hypnotized zombies that touch him to switch lanes. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, forces it to switch lanes, then reverts to a regular Garlic.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Mine isn't one for rushing. It believes every zombie deserves a second chance — preferably before it explodes. Contradictory? Blow me down! Maybe. But it's perfectly in line with its five personal principles, which it refuses to share.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Potato Mine with an explosive charm.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Hypnotizes th' zombies exploded, deals 1800 damage instead if th' zombie cannot be hypnotized.</color>

plants.name: Tangle Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Originally a naval mine tossed ashore by a powerful tsunami, this fella now lies half-buried in th' soil. Though th' kelp outside has withered, th' explosives inside remain deadly.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Potato Mine tangled with kelp.

<color=black>Damage: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>When armed, insta-kills th' first approaching zombie and triggers a Potato Mine explosion.</color>

plants.name: Kelp Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Beware, ships — reefs ahead!" Kelp Mine serves as th' river's safety officer, signaling danger with a red light. He does a solid job, since wherever he appears, danger be never far behind.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tangle Kelp that's as explosive as Potato Mine.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Insta-kills th' first approaching zombie and deals 600 damage to zombies in a 3×3 area.</color>

plants.name: Firnurse
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Firnurse brings warmth and life to th' frozen wilderness. Despite his odd appearance, th' local kids adore him. "Sugar cube, anyone?" he offers cheerfully. "Helps keep th' heat in!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stable high-temp Firnace that periodically provides charges or healing to broadside plants.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits of Firnace, with a 3×3 protection range. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be placed near other Firnaces.
<color=black>•</color>Provides 1 ice charge to protected Snow plants every 3s.
<color=black>•</color>Heals protected plants for 50 HP every 15s.</color>

plants.name: Flame Wall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Always wear a smile"—that’s rule number one for Flame Wall-nut, th' ever-patient restaurant server. Even when half-melted Frost Wall-nut be slipping all over th' floor yelling about th' lack of a 'Wet Floor' sign, he just keeps smiling. Savvy? And sizzling.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spicy-flavored nut that scorches biters.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals 20 damage to biters and inflicts Enflamed debuff. Flame Wall-nuts can be upgraded to Flame Tall-nuts using a Fertilizer.</color>

plants.name: Doom-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doom-nut be a huge fan of Batman. He rarely speaks, preferring to lurk in shadows, and only shows up at th' occasional Comic-cons. One time, he startled McCornics in a hallway. "When did Doom-shroom get... Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! This bulky?" th' barnacle covered corn muttered.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wall-nut with nuclear potential. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to non-physical explosions. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>•</color>Prevents Doom-shroom Zombies in a 3×3 area from exploding.
<color=black>•</color>Heals for 100 HP when a zombie with Irradiated debuff dies in a 5×5 area.
<color=black>•</color>Triggers Doom-shroom effect on death. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>

plants.name: Spike-kelp
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spike-Kelp always felt like th' runt of th' spikeweed family—small, unnoticeable, and half-submerged. Th' others tried to cheer him up: "Hey, at least you're still more popular than that prickly barnacle covered Spike-nut."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spikeweed but aquatic and tangly.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks add 1 Tangle Value. Takes 10 damage every time he attacks a vehicle.</color>

plants.name: Tangle Weed
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Founder of th' now-famous aquatic foot massage empire, Tangle Weed has redefined spa therapy. With branches in every biome and a new line of vehicular massage lanes, business be booming—especially with traffic this bad.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spikeweed that tangles zombies even on land.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks add 1 land Tangle Value (1/3 th' efficacy of aquatic Tangle Value).</color>

plants.name: Doomplate-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Boom! A reality-defying burst of high-speed nuclear fission tears zombies apart, breaking down their atoms and rearranging them into th' most stable form known to plantkind: Iron. "Why iron buckets?" Doomplate-shroom pauses, then replies, "Because I was born that way."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Powerful Doom-shroom that turns th' ashes from his explosion into Buckets. Blisterin' barnacles! Thar she blows!

<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every zombie he kills drops a Bucket. Shiver me timbers!</color>

plants.name: Threetato Mine
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Threetato Mine loves playing tricks underground. It shoots out surprises not once, not twice, but thrice—like a cheeky prankster with a never-ending stash of boom. Watch your step, or ye might get a triple whammy that’ll blow your boots off. Batten down the hatches!

- Written by Mrs. Draco</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Threetato Mine resurfaces after exploding and fires potatoes across three lanes. Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Yo ho ho. Thar she blows!
<color=black>•</color>Attacks faster as zombies get closer (down to 0.5s per attack).
<color=black>•</color>When armed, explodes on contact, dealing 5400 damage, knocks back for 1 tile and retreats into th' ground.
<color=black>•</color>Re-emerges 15s after exploding. Explodes and disappears immediately upon contact with vehicles. Dead men tell no tales.</color>

plants.name: Lumos Angler
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They say Lumos Angler has never gone hungry—not once. Every chomp lands a juicy zombie. He even published a book sharing his secrets: "Wiggle... Wiggle... Zombies love a gentle glow." — From his work Lantern. Arrr!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lures in zombies to snack on with his lophos.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System:</color><color=#8B0000>Each Lumos level reduces digestion time by 10s to a minimum of 10s.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon successful digestion, pulls a broadside zombie from adjacent lanes to its lane, if thar be nay zombies in its lane.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!<color=#8B0000>Chomper + Plantern</color>

plants.name: Doombox-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Hey clowny!" th' zombies jeer. Doombox-shroom just glances their way in silence. Avast ye! Dead men tell no tales. He doesn’t need to argue: His masterpiece will speak for itself. Too bad none of them will be around to see how it ends.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Doom-shroom with enhanced explosive powers able to cause chain explosions.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>For every zombie eliminated, creates a Jack-in-the-Box explosion that deals 1800 damage at its position.</color>

plants.name: Cherry Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Pot would rather give up her pay at th' Zen Garden than be mistaken for a plant."Those lunatics can't get real cherries, so they're out here trying to eat anything cherry-flavored!" Just talking about it makes her shudder.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pot with a passion for cherry explosions, using them to heal th' plant on her own tile and briefly empower cherry-type shooters.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to cherry explosions. Splice the mainbrace!
<color=black>•</color>Heals th' plant on herself by 20 HP when affected by cherry explosions. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>While healing, also grants an attack speed boost (50%) for 5s to cherry shooting plants.</color>

plants.name: Cherry Drone
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Drone always cares about appearances—whether or not anyone's watching. Ground or air, if ye mess up his hair, you’ll get blasted. Hard.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cheeky cherry delinquent that floats through th' air and dive-bombs zombies in style. Thundering typhoons!

<color=black>Damage: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every 15s, targets one zombie in a 3×5 area and dive-bombs them, causing a cherry-style explosion in a 1-tile radius.</color>

plants.name: Sunrise-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A seasoned sunlight banker, Sunrise-shroom offers high interest on your deposits."You chose a time deposit," he says sternly to a frustrated Twin Solar-nut. "Withdrawals aren't allowed just yet."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A visionary sun producer that absorbs and multiplies broadside sun, paying out in bursts.

<color=black>Sun Output: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>25/20s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs dropped Sun within a 5×5 area, multiplies their value by ×1.3, and stores them.
<color=black>•</color>Releases as much Sun as possible in batches of 25 along with th' next production.</color>

plants.name: Sunny-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sunny-shroom's been working on a new breathing method to smartly vent all that awful sunlight. But… "Ahh! Zombies!!" And just like that, he's curled up, trembling, forgetting everything. As for th' breathing method? He'll figure it out when th' zombies walk away.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A timid sun producer that tries to work faster until it panics.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Production interval gradually shortens to 10s.
<color=black>•</color>Cowers in fear when zombies approach, resetting interval back to 25s and producing 25 Sun immediately.</color>

plants.name: Spruce Ballista
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pulling a giant ballista be exhausting, so even Spruce Ballista needs a vacation. Thanks to Astro-nut's help, he found a job in another world: Helping to launch angry avians at some very green, very smug pigs.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires giant spruce bolts that pierce through zombies and detonate with a short delay.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Must be planted on two side-by-side Spruce Sharpshooters.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Bolts pierce up to 2 times (can pierce ice) and explode 0.3s after hitting a zombie, dealing AoE damage in a small area.</color>

plants.name: Doomflower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Garden games sometimes come down to pure luck. That's when Doomflower steps up."Why always me?" "Because you're destined. Or doomed."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Sunflower that plants Doom-spores around herself, which grow and detonate remotely. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Every 50s, plants one Doom-spore randomly in a 3×3 area around herself.
<color=black>•</color>Doom-spores pillage 30s to grow and once mature, if a zombie enters their blast radius, they detonate like a Doom-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Doom-spore
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Quietly growing on th' lawn, Doom-spore hums th' lullaby taught by Doomflower, dreaming of becoming a rising sun... And of nay longer being mistaken for a rusty bolt. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A dormant spore radiating destructive power — just give it some time. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Dead men tell no tales.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Takes 30s to grow and once mature, if a zombie enters his blast radius, detonates like a Doom-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Squash-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dragged from a kids' playground by his stem and dumped on th' lawn, Squash-nut was rejected for being a deformed rubber ball. Now, furious and bumpy, he bounces wildly, yelling: "I'm gonna play all I want! ALL I WANT!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A bouncy nut who's all tantrum and impact.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>160/1.5s (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Bounces in his tile when a zombie gets close, dealing splash damage on each landing. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Does not block zombies while airborne.</color>

plants.name: Silver Doom-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silver Doom-shroom turned destruction into a money-making venture — and a lucrative one at that. Of course, he spent his first fortune immediately... On a fancy new skin.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Doom-shroom that swapped bang for bling.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Does not explode. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Batten down the hatches!</color>

plants.name: Golden Doom-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ahem, eyes over here." That's how Golden Doom-shroom begins every Wall-nut Street summit. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Th' other tycoons fear him—not just for his wealth, but for his power to erase their wealth in one glorious blast. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turns doubloons into ruin.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Does not passively explode.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 30s; releases a Doom-shroom effect that does not leave a crater.</color>

plants.name: Iron Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Iron Squash armored up in cold steel, harder, heavier and packs more harm. Just don't mention th' "rivets" on his face. He insists they're structural... Not acne.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A metal-plated Squash with terrifying weight.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can be fed corresponding metal objects to restore 500 Toughness. Receives half th' damage from explosive cherries.</color>

plants.name: Atlantis Ballista
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Atlantis Ballista once served proudly atop th' castle walls, convinced his power was like a roaring tsunami. Turns out, everyone was just talking about th' screech his strings made when reloading. Embarrassed but undeterred, he found salvation in aloe juice. Now his bolts be smoother, deadlier, and most importantly, much quieter.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires tidal bolts with a tsunami's force; targets struck become more vulnerable to chill.

<color=black>Damage: Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>80/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Fires 4 bolts in quick succesion before resting for 3s. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>90% chance to fire Tidal Bolts. Applies Soaked for 5s. A soaked zombie will be frozen instead of chilled when hit by any cryo-system attack. Th' status be then cleared and cannot be reapplied for 10s.
<color=black>•</color>10% chance to fire Ice Bolts. Applies Deep Chill.</color>

plants.name: Drone-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some claim zombies have mastered th' martial arts to be able to harm plants with falling petals. Most plants dismiss it. Blimey! But Drone-nut disagrees. "It's true," he says, floating overhead. "I've blocked such blows. Three times."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A hovering nut that shields his tile from damage.

<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs damage for his own tile.
<color=black>•</color>If undamaged for 10s, regenerates 50 HP per second.</color>

plants.name: Thorn-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thorn-nut proudly insists he's th' true Spike-nut. "Look at these spines! Blow me down! This color!" he declares constantly. One day, someone finally asked, "Wait… who's Spike-nut again?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cactus-covered nut that punishes attackers and disables balloon zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Reflects 50 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color>Can pop Balloons. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>

plants.name: Star-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Star-nut lives under a rock and rarely moves. It's not because he's lazy, but because he's got standards. He'll only act if invited by a certain square m'hearty to jellyfishing… or to prank a cephalopodic neighbor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A reactive defender that counters with little stars.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Fires five 20-damage stars in all directions when damaged.</color>

plants.name: Bamblotus
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every winter, Bamblotus tries to impress potential mates with a dazzling petal display. But his performance often goes… too fast. Blow me down! And too cold. Th' girls walk away before he even finishes blooming.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A self-healing barricade that grows stronger with broadside allies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Heals himself by 50 HP when charged.
<color=black>•</color>Recovers 40 HP every 1.5s. This HP recovery be increased by 100% for each adjacent Bamblock-type plants.
<color=black>•</color>Resilience (defaults to 1): Dead men tell no tales. Incoming damage be divided by resilience. Max HP be treated as multiplied by resilience. Resilience be increased by 0.3 for each adjacent Bamblock-type plant.</color>

plants.name: Bambloe
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Bambloe loves to travel and promote his snowy hometown. But nay one ever seems interested. "They always think th' pack on me back be just a bump from getting whacked," he complains. "No wonder they think th' tundra's an unforgiving place."</color>
plants.info:
