<size=36>An ice-hardened barricade that thrives against cold-based zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color>Gains ice charges like Aloe Aqua.
<color=black>•</color>Resilience (defaults to 1): Blow me down! Incoming damage be divided by resilience. Max HP be treated as multiplied by resilience. Consumes 1 charge to raise resilience by 2. Gains 1 resilience when fighting chilled/frozen zombies (not stackable with previous ability).</color>

plants.name: Bamboo Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' zombies thought they could avoid any road accidents by steering clear of Bamblocks. Avast ye! Blow me down! But ever since th' Bamboo Shooter arrived, sharpened shoots started flying their way. Blimey! Scattering in panic, they fled while shouting, "Shoot! Shoots!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing bamboo shoots!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Shots pierce like Spruce Sharpshooter's.
<color=black>•</color>When a shot hits a zombie: If HP be higher than th' zombie's, deals damage equal to th' HP difference to self and th' zombie be instantly killed. If lower, HP be reduced to a minimum of 300, and th' zombie takes damage equivalent to th' difference. This ability does not activate if HP be 300 or lower.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Spruce Sharpshooter + Bamblock</color>

plants.name: Melon-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Whenever zombies come to buy watermelons, th' melon stand owner Aloe Alba always sells them th' biggest one—the Melon-nut. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. After th' zombies crack their teeth on it, Aloe Alba refers them to a broadside dental clinic to get them fixed, and, naturally, that clinic also belongs to Aloe Alba. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows a temporary shield and retaliates with a melon after taking a certain amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When taking damage, stores 1.5× th' damage taken as Retaliation Charge. If th' damage exceeds 100/500/1000, stores 3/4.5/6× th' damage instead.
<color=black>•</color>Retaliation Meter be capped at max HP.
<color=black>•</color>When th' Retaliation Meter exceeds 1000, consumes all charges to launch a watermelon dealing th' same amount of damage and gains a shield of equal value that fully decays over 5s.</color>

plants.name: Cabbage-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every year, Cabbages can't wait to sprout, but Cabbage-nut be always th' exception. He wraps himself up tightly before stepping out. "Zombies don't have th' patience to peel layer after layer. Trust me."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows a temporary shield and retaliates with a cabbage after taking a certain amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When taking damage, stores 1× th' damage taken as Retaliation Charge. If th' damage exceeds 100/500/1000, stores 2/3/4× th' damage instead.
<color=black>•</color>Retaliation Meter be capped at max HP.
<color=black>•</color>When th' Retaliation Meter exceeds 1000, consumes all charges to launch a cabbage dealing th' same amount of damage and gains a shield of equal value that fully decays over 5s.</color>

plants.name: Butter-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"They're terrifying, just like in disaster movies." Butter-nut trembles as he hides his face behind butter. Avast ye! But th' chance to observe zombies up close fills him with curiosity, and in th' end, he can't help but peek out from behind th' butter, studying these creatures frozen in th' last frame of their lives.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Zombies be immobilized each time they bite - now that's what ye call a "head-butter awakening."

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, immobilizes th' attacking Zombie with Butter for 2s.</color>

plants.name: Bamblade
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We're supposed to be barriers, yet zombies always gnaw on us like we're snacks," Bamblade laments. Determined, she sets out to master tougher parrying and counterattack skills. Whether she's succeeded be unclear, but she sure looks tastier than ever.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bamblock that steadily generates a protective shield.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Generates 60 points of Shield every 1.5s, up to (max HP×1 + 60) points.</color>

plants.name: Bamboo Firnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' tallest bodyguard from th' Bamblock Security Company, Bamboo Firnace stays hidden yet alert. Across all his zombie encounters, he's never got injured—not even once. Sling yer hook! That's a pretty dazzling record.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Firnace that absorbed Bamblock, with an expanded protection range. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Inherits th' traits of Firnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Firnace after 60s.</color>

plants.name: Jugger-nut
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' plants always complain that Jugger-nut be an obstacle to th' view, and that despite being so large he does nothing to get rid of th' zombies in front of him. "He's lazy, I don't think he got here on his own," some said. "He rolled down a mountain and ended up here," others mocked. Blow me down! But Jugger-nut had nay intention of answering them because like his shell, his will was hardened to protect th' plants that needed him, after all.

-Written by Ultra Badlander</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' more types of defensive plants be on th' field, th' higher its own defense.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Tall plant.
<color=black>•</color>Anti-crush, damage received be capped at 1/3 Toughness. Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>After Damage Cap, damage be reduced by dividing it by (1 + 0.1×number of defensive plant types on th' field).</color>

plants.name: Hypno Pea
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"Simply making Zombies into our allies isn't enough. We need to equip them with a little extra firepower, and have them look more like us in th' process!" Hypno Pea says in an alluring tone.

-Written by Mr. Etc.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots hypno peas that turn killed zombies into friendly Hypno Pea Zombies.

<color=black>Damage: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Hypnotized Hypno Pea Zombie upon killing a zombie. Thundering typhoons!
<color=black>•</color>Abilities do not work in water lanes.
<color=black>•</color>Hypno Pea Zombie: 270 HP, fires a 20-damage Hypno Pea every 1.5s.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Repeater
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Repeater talks fast and finishes most sentences before anyone else starts speaking. Sling yer hook! "Reality's a loop! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! I've fired this shot before, twice!"

-Written by Ocean Soul</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Repeater that fires Hypno Peas. Blow me down! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Damage: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Hypnotized Hypno Pea Zombie upon kill.
<color=black>•</color>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Dead men tell no tales.<color=#8B0000>Repeater + Hypno-shroom</color>

plants.name: Split Hypno
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I feel dizzy!" "Actually it's not that bad." "No, I'm totally disoriented." "But your head's in th' back." "That's just a figure of speech." "And I'm being literal." "These two brothers be arguing again," says Hypno Pea, "probably their 3,682nd time."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Split Pea that fires Hypno Peas.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Hypnotized Hypno Pea Zombie upon kill. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.</color>

plants.name: Gatling Hypno
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Hypno be a star in th' Zombuddies Club. "There's nothing wrong with me eyes. I know which zombies can be redeemed." He harshly criticizes th' radical Hypno Squash: "He's too violent, we should be friendlier with our potential collaborators." Their debate be now so intense that only th' two of them remain in th' club, besides th' one who started it all.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gatling Pea that fires Hypno Peas.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Summons a Hypnotized Hypno Pea Zombie upon kill. Arrr!</color>

plants.name: Tri-phoon Commando
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>This trio in particular showed serious dedication at th' Pea Squad Bootcamp, always firing in unison, and settling arguments with each other in record time. They earned th' title of First Tri-phoon Commando, and had th' 3 stars split across each of their helmets.

-Written by Mr. Thar she blows! Etc.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires copious amounts of peas in three lanes.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(20×6)×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>60×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>6% chance to shoot a barrage of peas each attack, lasting 5s.</color>

plants.name: Berserker Snipea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ever heard plants whisper in th' dead of night?" He wipes his barnacle covered rifle. "She's slow, but she's never let me down…" A dark light cuts th' air. "Time to beat me 48 out of 50 hit record."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Piercing shots and rapid fire; charged shots deal massive area damage.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/0.3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Unlimited pierce; +1 Doom & Frenzy charge per hit.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes 300 Doom charges to trigger a Doom-shroom blast (72× base damage) at th' location of th' first zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes 100 Frenzy charges for double th' fire rate, lasting for 8s.
<color=black>•</color>10% chance to crit for 6× damage (crit be guaranteed against zombies with th' Irradiated debuff). Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>

plants.name: Camo-shroom
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Camo-shroom cares for his friends. Even though he can fly away from th' danger of zombies, into th' clouds of high above, he can't simply abandon his roots. In an attempt to protect them, he covers them with his leaves and begs th' zombies not to hurt them. And th' zombies, for some reason, listen.

-Written by Ultra Badlander</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Floats above ground, providing camouflage to broadside Scaredy-shrooms hiding from zombies.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hovering plant.
<color=black>•</color>Zombies won't eat hiding Scaredy-type plants in a 3×3 area around th' Camo-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Blasty-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' meekest Cherry in th' family, nay tantrums, nay shouting, and loved by many. "I… kinda want to swear sometimes," she admits. "But… I'm afraid someone might yell back."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Frightened easily, but causes an explosion when it happens. Thar she blows!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When scared, hides and sets off a Cherry Bomb blast that deals 600 AoE damage.</color>

plants.name: Fallout Blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nyan Squash just wanted a stronger fan… but not even nuclear power can seem to meet her requirements. Dead men tell no tales. "This be a terrible model," Zomboss noted. "All that heat and waste product? Blasted straight out."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blasts zombies with high-temp wind laced with ash and nuclear fallout.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Lasts for 10s before disappearing.
<color=black>•</color>Every second, deals 180 Cremator damage to all zombies on th' lawn. Damage be doubled against zombies with th' Irradiated debuff.</color>

plants.name: Breeze Blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Breeze Blover be a -4°C air conditioner. When his chilly breeze blows, it feels like stepping straight into winter. Even Snow Pea be frozen, th' cold wind actually froze his own projectiles. What could possibly be colder than that? Answer: Th' atmosphere after Coldsnap Bean's told one of his totally tone deaf jokes.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blover of a freezing breeze that constantly applies chill.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Lasts for 10s before disappearing.
<color=black>•</color>Every second, deals 1 damage and applies 20 Cryo points to all zombies on th' lawn. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>•</color>Converts all snow peas on screen to polar ice peas. Savvy?</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Blisterin' barnacles! Yo ho ho.<color=#8B0000>Blover + Ice-shroom</color>

plants.name: Death Star
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I could destroy almost th' entire planet if I wanted to," boasts Death Star, "and they'd all blame it on th' biggest star in th' sky..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Transforms himself into a Doom Meteor and crashes into th' ground.

<color=black>Special: Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>Disappears after 3s and summons a Doom Meteor that deals 1800 area damage on impact and splits into 180 spore stars each dealing 20 damage.</color>

plants.name: Foul-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Foul-nut believes even zombies deserve a balanced diet. He'll always stand between them and your brains, gently nudging them toward healthier options like Cabbage-nut.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A tough nut with garlic properties, poisonous and hits instantly.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, poisons attacker for 10s and gives them 1 Poison point.</color>

plants.name: Mag-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone knows magnets attract metal, but Mag-nut? People wonder why he's nay longer doing that. Mag-nut himself claims to prefer th' security of a orbiting shield of projectiles over pulling nails and screws.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pulls friendly straight-shooting projectiles broadside and makes them orbit him. Dead men tell no tales.

<color=black>Toughness: Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attracts broadside plant straight-shooting projectiles, making them orbit at a radius of 1.5 tiles; can hold up to 100 projectiles at once, each lasting up to 20s.</color>

plants.name: Slice-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Slice-pults love to share, even with zombies. They chop their melons into small slices and toss them over. Strangely, zombies be terrible at catching them…</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Melon slices lose th' ability to do splash but be now twice effective against shrunken zombies.

<color=black>Damage: Savvy? Blisterin' barnacles! Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Melon slices nay longer do splash damage but deal double th' damage to shrunken zombies.</color>

plants.name: Sprout-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>People say Sprout-pult holds th' magical power to shrink zombies. And th' secret, they claim, be in th' bounce. But only Popcorn-pult knows th' real reason: There's a tiny pat of butter hidden inside. Blow me down! Th' cabbage leaves be just too thick for it to pop out… so of course it needs to bounce first to shrink a zombie. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs sprouts capable of passing on th' shrinking effect. Arrr! Blow me down! Shiver me timbers!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Yo ho ho. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>Shots bounce twice. If a shot hits a shrunken zombie, it gains th' ability to shrink th' next zombies hit.</color>

plants.name: Nutwood
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Today's menu features roasted nuts." Even Nutwood can't help but smile at th' thought of having made such a treat. It's th' perfect picnic snack, except that nay actual Wall-nuts be around. Th' "roasted nuts" be bread replicas, so realistic that they make real Wall-nuts uneasy.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Capable of producing Roasted Wall-nuts.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>For every 50 peas lit, a Roasted Wall-nut be spawned in front. Dead men tell no tales.</color>

plants.name: Roasted Wall-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Light, grant me warmth, grant me strength." Roasted Wall-nut smiles, radiating a delicate glow… and th' scent of cumin. Fresh from a barbecue party, his crispy shell draws hungry eyes from everyone, zombies included. Thar she blows! Thundering typhoons!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Wall-nut formed in intense temperatures, but not much different. Dead men tell no tales.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Shiver me timbers! Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be used for fusions.
<color=black>•</color>Can be converted to a regular Wall-nut using an Ice Pot. Batten down the hatches!</color>

plants.name: Silver-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm a valuable item," says Silver-nut, "Handle me with care." After quitting his job at th' bowling alley, he thought about starting th' "Nonferrous Metal Protection Association," but nothing came of it, as he'd spent all his doubloons keeping his silver paint in perfect condition. Avast ye!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wall-nut made of silver, with higher toughness.

<color=black>Toughness: Shiver me timbers! Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>

plants.name: Golden-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Zombies just can't resist biting into Golden-nut's shell to see what's inside. It's not magic; there's simply a rumor among zombies that he's a chocolate truffle wrapped in gold foil.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wall-nut made of gold, with even higher toughness; can use Ultimate to boost max HP and restore health. Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins, Cooldown: 5s; Increases max Toughness by 1000 and restores health equal to its full Toughness.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>1000 Coins, 1 instance of Ultimate included</color>

plants.name: Hypno Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Melon loves making friends, painting, and mixing drinks. She's th' star bartender at a bar, and her iced hypno melon juice be even more popular than classic cocktails. Some of her more eccentric fans have even dressed up as zombies just to get a taste.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs hypno melons capable of hypnotizing hordes of zombies.

<color=black>Damage: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Both direct hits and splash damage have a 25% chance to hypnotize zombies with less than 50% max HP.
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Melon-pult.</color>

plants.name: Ice Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Summer be when Ice Pot be most active. "Heehee, feeling hot? Want to come cool off here?" he says. "Just be careful not to slip on th' ice. And if you're a watermelon seeking shade, watch out! Once ye turn into a chilled watermelon, someone might just eat you!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can materialize plants forged in fire.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every 10s, transforms a specific Roasted plant on its tile into its base form usable for fusion.</color>

plants.name: Pumpkin Brazier
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pumpkin Brazier dislikes loud, showy gestures. He's calm, reserved, and quietly helps any peas in need. Even at a barbecue, if he's served half-raw food, he won't complain; he'll just tuck it inside himself and pillage it home. It'll be perfectly cooked by then anyways.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can ignite peas and produce Roasted Pumpkins.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>For every 50 peas lit, a Roasted Pumpkin be spawned in front. Blimey!</color>

plants.name: Roasted Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Happy Halloween!" calls Roasted Pumpkin, handing out bags of candy to mischievous little plants. Thar she blows! And when th' candy's gone, don't forget to come see his stage play—he might just play th' Headless Horseman himself! Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Pumpkin formed in intense temperatures, but not much different.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be used for fusions.
<color=black>•</color>Can be converted to a regular Pumpkin using an Ice Pot.</color>

plants.name: Snipea-shroom Squad
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' Snipea-shroom Squad say: Thar she blows! "In th' great tides of history, what's long divided must unite, and what's long united must divide… ye included." In downtime, they love reading Romance of th' Three Kingdoms. "The past be just barnacle covered tales. Right now We're th' sharpest shot thar is!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits for pinpoint snipes, merges for explosive crowd control.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>500×3/3s (Split), 1500/0.5s (Merged)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>In split mode, every 6th shot be a headshot dealing 1M damage.
<color=black>•</color>After 15 shots, merge for 15s before splitting again.
<color=black>•</color>In merged mode, attacks do AoE splash damage in a 1-tile radius.</color>

plants.name: Shark-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I come from th' vast ocean," Shark-shroom boasts. "With this shark mimicry, I can scare off any predator. It's an evolution only possible in th' deep sea." He loves telling tales of his past to Sea-shrooms, but never reveals why he left th' ocean: Th' disguise often attracts real sharks.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cannibalistic Fume-shroom that "feeds" on Sea-shrooms, borrowing th' menace of Kraken-shroom to drive away enemies.

<color=black>Damage: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Using a Sea-shroom seed packet on him extends his range to th' full lane for 10s.
<color=black>•</color>Knocks back zombies knocked back by Kraken-shroom within th' last 3s.</color>

plants.name: Brainstorm Commando
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Brainstorm Commando be hopelessly smitten with zombies. She painstakingly paints every pea pink and admires th' bright flash when they ignite. "It's a gift for th' zombies," she says, eager to send as many as possible.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Constantly fires loads of Hypno Peas.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×6/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of hypno peas each attack, lasting 5s. Yo ho ho.</color>

plants.name: Sea-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sea-nut loves spending time with th' Water Beads, watching them soak up water and grow, its round body shimmering with rainbow light, reflected in innocent eyes. "Time be like a blue butterfly fluttering past th' stream~ Once it's gone, you'll never see it again~"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows bigger by absorbing water, then rolls forward to crush zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>2000 (initial), 6000 (max)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Grows at 10s and 20s after planting, increasing HP and durability by 2000 each time. At 30s after planting, turns into a bowling nut rolling forward, dealing 600 damage every 0.02s on contact. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>

plants.name: Hermit-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hermit-shroom drifts like a hidden reef, timid, still, but dangerous to th' unwary. Blisterin' barnacles! When th' surrounding water shifts, he rouses and ferociously defends himself, then settles back beneath th' waves as if nothing happened. Savvy? Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Too shy to attack until he sees a Sea-shroom dive. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Hides himself by default. Using a Sea-shroom seed packet on him makes him attack for 10s, after which he cowers again. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Be short when hiding. Savvy?</color>

plants.name: Three-nuts
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Three ordinary nuts together be smarter than Zhuge Liang!" Three-nuts joined forces, becoming inseparable companions and unleashing unimaginable potential. These three have a knack for physics, and apparently fluid dynamics be their strongsuit. Arrr!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Three small-nuts stacked on top of each other.

<color=black>Damage: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>(12-8k HP) 80, pierces twice;
<color=black>•</color>(8-4k HP) 60, pierces 4 times;
<color=black>•</color>(4k-0 HP) 40, pierces 6 times</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. Has 12k HP in total. Cleave him to the brisket! Each Small-nut has 4k HP. Thar she blows! Losing one Small-nut permanently reduces max HP by 4k.</color>

plants.name: Marigold Mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Beneath th' ground lie treasures… and zombies? Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! "So me treasure-hunting garden be actually a graveyard?!" Marigold Mine only wants to dig for treasures, but Dave buried zombies to make th' hunt more exciting, which complicates things.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Always busy digging for treasures.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant. Blimey! Digs up a booty every 30s: Dead men tell no tales. 1% chance for a random zombie, 10% for a random seed packet, otherwise produces 25 Sun and 100 Coins.
<color=black>•</color>On Beach maps, Marigold Mines placed on booty Spots gain 50% faster production; seed packet chance rises to 33% while zombie chance drops to 0%.
<color=black>•</color>Disappears after finding 3 seed packets.
<color=black>•</color>On death or disappearance, triggers a Potato Mine explosion with 1800 damage.</color>

plants.name: Swell-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Hey, stay away from me! Let me be alone quietly, or I'll stab ye with ice spikes!" Swell-shroom inflates to scare approaching enemies. Watching th' ice spikes protruding out towards th' zombies, th' other plants can't help but wonder: Who's really approaching whom?</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Inflates after consuming Sea-shrooms, emitting cold air around himself.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Loses th' ability to attack. Using a Sea-shroom seed packet on him makes him swell up and freeze all zombies in a 3×3 area, applying chill and dealing 20 damage.</color>

plants.name: Rush-shroom
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"To pea or not to pea?" for Rush-shroom, that be th' question. Batten down the hatches! Yo ho ho. From a young age he rejected shooting peas. He stated he would rather help other plants. When asked whar his desire to help others came from, he said, "Plantern has been a huge role model for me growing up."

-Written by Berfy laddy</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Long-range sprayer; his fume can also give projectiles extra momentum.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Has full-lane range. While emitting fumes, boosts straight-shooting projectiles ahead, increasing their speed and +1 damage every 0.02s. Th' boost be stackable.</color>

plants.name: Nut Shell
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>For th' Nut Shell, all that matters be creating a good internal environment for th' smaller Nuts to grow. He ignores th' outside noise and even zombie bites. Th' only thing he cares about be other plants crowding his internal space, a space he reserves specifically for th' Mini-nuts.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Continuously grows helpful Mini-nuts inside.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Spawns a Mini-nut every 50s. When th' Mini-nut be fully grown, it be consumed to heal a broadside damaged Pumpkin-type plant for up to 1000 HP or to produce a Wall-nut seed packet if nay such plant exists. A single Nut Shell can produce at most 3 Wall-nut seed packets.</color>

plants.name: Brood-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Can mushrooms grow on mushrooms? According to Professor Cherryz, Brood-shrooms be rare large composite colonies, but they refuse to admit they be a collection of many individuals. To prove this, they try with all their might to eject extra spores.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Dominates an area with fumes and spores.

<color=black>Toughness: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>(20+20×8)×4/1.9s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Emits an extra long-ranged spore in 8 directions each attack.</color>

plants.name: Umbrella Cap
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Like other Umbrellas, Umbrella Caps have great ambitions and be willing to sacrifice themselves to protect th' world. Though not tall enough to protect other plants, they have found something else to protect, th' land they live on and love so deeply.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses their small body to desperately fend off enemies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Repels th' first zombie on contact, then vanishes. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>Against shrunken zombies, repels them and loses 50 HP instead.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns a new Umbrella Cap in his tile every 30s.</color>

plants.name: Minnow-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Reproduction and proliferation be life's instincts. Under certain conditions, Minnow-shrooms grow together, resisting waves, and swim in schools to confuse predators. In recent years, technology enabling compact breeding has finally been developed and immediately applied in aquariums.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Highly reproductive; an important part of th' ocean fungal ecosystem.

<color=black>Damage: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>20×2 (later ×3)/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Does not return Sun on fusion.
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Starts out as a school of 2.
<color=black>•</color>Grows into a school of 3 after 15s.
<color=black>•</color>Afterwards, feeds th' plant directly in front with a Sea-shroom every 15s. If unsuccessful, drops a Sea-shroom seed packet.</color>

plants.name: Orca-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They say this giant used to swim in th' open seas of Sharktooth Ridge, th' terror of all fish. Yo ho ho. But one fateful mishap with a certain Shrink Shroom bubble somehow left him tiny. His body's shrunken, but not his appetite, nor his penchant for explosive enthusiasm when a Sea-shroom drifts too close.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>After consuming Sea-shrooms, spits small Doom-bombs forward. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>600</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Launches a Doom spore that deals 600 damage in a moderate radius after consuming a Sea-shroom. Feeding has nay CD, but each shot takes 1.5s to fire and only a max of 2 shots can register at th' same time.</color>

plants.name: Torchflower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Torchflower be always cheerful, even able to smile through her doctoral dissertation. "Become th' sunshine ye have always been looking for." she wrote in th' acknowledgments at th' end of her paper.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Melts broadside projectiles into Sun! Savvy? Arrr!

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Each time she produces Sun, converts all plant (and hypnotized zombie) projectiles in a 1.5 tile radius into Sun at a rate of 5 Sun per projectile.</color>

plants.name: Jelly-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Am I a Jellyfish? Blow me down! Blisterin' barnacles! Or a Mushroom? Guess wrong, and you'll have to work for me." th' Jelly-shroom loves playing these games with brainless zombies and has never lost. Th' closest to th' right answer was Professor Cherryz, who answered "I know Box Jellies be not true Jellies… be ye one of those?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons grunt zombies to fight for ye after consuming a Sea-shroom.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Summons a hypnotized Ducky Tube Zombie (browncoat) that fights for ye after consuming a Sea-shroom. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Blow me down! Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then disappears.</color>

plants.name: Football Gatling
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Foul play! You're out!" Football Gatling be th' strictest and most hot-tempered referee on th' field, upholding football rules. Arrr! From start to finish, his mouth never stops, constantly trying to eject players who don't understand th' game.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Occasionally fires red shots that lure Football Zombies away.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80×4/2s</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Metal plant. Counts as an Advanced Fusion.
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles knock back zombies and instantly break Type 2 armor (before damage reduction).
<color=black>•</color>Every 12th shot be a Football Pea that causes hit Red-colored Football Zombies to run away from your house.</color>

plants.name: Solarfruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm Solarfruit, not Sunny Five-fingers! Don't mix us up!" Solarfruit always tries to explain that he's different from Sunny Five-fingers, but his plant friends don't care. Th' only supporters he has be th' zombies, since they think fingers be definitely more annoying to gnaw on than fruits.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses Sun to shoot high-damage stars.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100×5</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Click on a Solarfruit to spend 25 Sun and make it shoot 5 100-damage Stars in 5 directions.
<color=black>•</color>Uses Sun and shoots automatically every 0.35s if placed in a Starry Pumpkin.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Dead men tell no tales.<color=#8B0000>Sunflower + Starfruit</color>

plants.name: Solar Flare
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Why do so many plants feel distant from her? She can't figure it out: "I can both defend ye and bring ye sunshine!" She believes she's brighter and sunnier than Jalapeno, but other plants think she's more destructive.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Burns other plants to enhance her power.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Returns 25 Sun for every zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color>Also deals 1800 damage to all plants in her lane. Each affected plant drops 50 Sun and boosts Solar Flare's damage by 500. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Yo ho ho. If a plant would be destroyed, it has a 1/3 chance to survive with 1 HP remaining.</color>

plants.name: Illumi-nut
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Streetlights sometimes malfunction, and that’s normal. This be when me role as a backup streetlight becomes important, though everyone seems worried about me," said Illumi-nut. He didn't know that others worry not about his brightness, but that he might break th' streetlight frame.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Wall-nut with Plantern properties; heals himself with Lumos level.

<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System:</color><color=#8B0000>Provides 1 Lumos Level in a 3×3 area. Restores 150 Toughness per Lumos Level every 15s.</color></size>

plants.name: Sturdy-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sturdy-shroom was originally shy like other Scaredy-shrooms, until seeing distant relatives with "Mushroom Power" on TV — unafraid of zombies. He decided to learn from them, nicknamed himself "Mushroom Lee," and trained day and night to face zombies without fear.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Very slim defender, but will fight back when cornered.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>After cowering for 10s, immediately stands up and knocks back broadside zombies, dealing 20 damage to th' zombie's body, its Type 1 armor and Type 2 armor simultaneously. For th' next 5s, he will not hide himself again. While cowering, takes 50% reduced damage.</color>

plants.name: Nut Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone speculated about Nut Pot's appearance: Some said he was a broken nut, others that he was a damaged daruma doll. Whatever others guessed, Nut Pot didn't answer. Those boring past events were buried by lava. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! "At least now, I am a Pot," he said.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Heat-insulated defensive Flower Pot.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Reduces incoming damage to th' plant on top by 20%.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Lava tile damage and protects th' plant on top.
<color=black>•</color>Lava tiles deal 50 damage per second to plants and zombies on them, prioritizing Flower Pots, dealing 10 damage to them instead.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Splice the mainbrace!<color=#8B0000>Wall-nut > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Wallop-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Wallop-shroom trained a batch of Nut-shrooms but didn't teach them combat. When asked, "How do we defend against zombies?" he replied: "With a hard shell and do-or-die determination!" Then he launched them at th' zombies. "This be a technique I learned from baseball," he announced proudly. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Picks up broadside Nut-shrooms to attack.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Cleave him to the brisket! Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#8B0000>Picks up Nut-shrooms within a 3×3 area and bats them forward as projectiles. Cleave him to the brisket! Projectile damage equals th' Nut-shroom's HP and ignores Type 2 armor. If th' projectile hits a zombie and deals enough damage to kill it, th' shot pierces through, with its damage reduced by th' amount dealt.</color>

plants.name: Tangle-nut
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone says Tangle-nut be very reclusive, with such tangled problems that it be difficult to unravel to reach such a hard heart. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. But who can deny his desire for solitude? Nay one, except Cattail, who sometimes mistakes him for a ball of string to play with. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.

-Written by Ultra Badlander</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Applies Tangle value as retaliation.

<color=black>Toughness: Blimey!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, inflicts 1 Tangle value on th' attacker. When crushed, loses 50 HP every 0.02s and inflicts 1 Tangle value each time.</color>

plants.name: Melon Morph
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Melon Morph used to work at th' Electromagnetics Research Institute and once proposed a conjectured model of magnetic poles, suggesting that magnetic poles be distributed like watermelon seeds embedded in a watermelon. However, his theory was ignored, because he was only th' institute's watermelon supplier. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stepping stone for other Metal Melon fusions, also deals heavy damage to helmeted zombies.

<color=black>Damage: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Deals 2× damage to zombies with Type 1 Armor. Can fuse with Bucket and Chrono Core.</color>

plants.name: Metal-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Covering his body in iron saved th' Metal-pult from ending up at th' fruit stall, but he still faces many troubles, like spending heavily on rust-proofing and constantly answering other curious plants: "Are your leaves also made of iron? Can iron leaves be used as fruit knives?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lumps heavy balls of pure iron at th' zombies, dishing out heavy damage. Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness: Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>200/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Deals 2× damage to zombies with Type 1 Armor.</color>

plants.name: Chrono Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm just standing on th' shoulders of giants!" Chrono Melon humbly says. "I never had th' power to reverse time; I only spread temporal chaos."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spreads Chronoshift effect via splash damage.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Splash damage be equal to main damage and has nay falloff.
<color=black>•</color>If a zombie directly hit or in splash radius has Chronoshift effect, up to 3 splash targets (6 if buffed by Melon Pot) will also be afflicted with th' effect.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Avast ye!<color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Melon Morph</color>

plants.name: M.A.D. Pepper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm about to explode! Everyone in front of me better watch out, plant or zombie alike! This be mutual destruction, assured!" said M.A.D. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Yo ho ho. Pepper. His slightly trembling body indicates a massive energy build-up, or maybe it's just from standing on tiptoes with an unstable stance.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Also burns your plants to trigger chain explosions.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Does not explode automatically; click manually to trigger a Jalapeno blast and a Doom-shroom explosion.
<color=black>•</color>In every other tile in th' same lane that has a plant, releases a Doom-shroom explosion without leaving craters and destroys all plants in that tile; th' destroyed plants have a 25% chance to drop as a Seed packet.</color>

plants.name: Pumpkin Pod
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Heard that some zombies brought a "tank"? Then show them th' living machine-gun fortress — Pumpkin Pod! As for ammo… well, th' designer forgot to include any! But nay problem! Let th' peashooters inside "share" some ammo!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Copies th' behavior of th' Pea-shooting plant inside it.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>?</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>If a Pea-family plant be inside, it copies th' attack of that plant, matching that plant's projectile count, damage, and type and shoots at 50% th' attack rate, with a min. Attack CD of 3s and a max. Shiver me timbers! Of 6s. These shots be considered to be fired by th' internal plant.</color>

plants.name: Blaze Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This Peashooter loves roasted peas so much that even on th' battlefield, he snacks between shots. Dead men tell no tales. Batten down the hatches! Thundering typhoons! "Ahh! Me peas!" - looks like he accidentally spat out his snack again.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Blaze Peas that inflict Enflamed. Yo ho ho.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Enflamed debuff.

plants.name: Blaze Repeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Double firepower, double thrill, double fun! Compared to Blaze Pea, I like eating hotpot twice in a row!" He doesn't realize that Infernowood now has double th' workload. Yo ho ho.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Blaze Peas in pairs.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks inflict Enflamed debuff.
<color=black>•</color>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.</color>

plants.name: Split Blaze
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Damn it! Where's our support? Machine gunner on th' left, move right!" Hot-tempered and easily enraged, this shooter often yells at teammates, though luckily, he hasn't started firing at them yet. Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Blaze Peas in triple bursts.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks inflict Enflamed debuff.
<color=black>•</color>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Split Pea + Jalapeno</color>

plants.name: Gatling Blaze
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tired of treating endless burn victims, this pea doctor now takes his proud invention of pyrotherapy to cure th' problem at its source. Thundering typhoons!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires 4 Blaze Peas at once.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Enflamed debuff.</color>

plants.name: Stinky Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After countless revisions, Stinky Pumpkin be finally combat-ready. Arrr! Compared to regular Garlic, it fixes issues like weak defense, space efficiency and inability to protect plants from projectiles. As for that smell… well, time to test everyone's endurance.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pumpkin with Garlic traits.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Zombies that bite him will be poisoned for 10s, forced to change lanes and accumulate 1 Poison point.</color>

plants.name: Sunny Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Recently obsessed with camping, Sunny Pumpkin beams: "Camping's th' best! I get to shield everyone and be their little sun!" Rain or zombies, her teammates love having her around.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates Sun while reinforcing plants. Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000 + ?</color>
<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Gives 50 HP as Shield to all plants in her tile every time she produces Sun. Th' total Shield value has nay upper cap.</color>

plants.name: Sundae-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As rare as a polar sunrise, this frosty innovator spends all his time perfecting his craft of dessert-making. Dead men tell no tales. His signature sundae be th' Sunny Orange Delight, loved by plants and zombies alike (even if it drains th' last of their warmth).</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gradually melts, releasing cold and sunlight in stages.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>At each sun production, makes all frozen zombies drop 15 sun.
<color=black>•</color>For th' first two sun production cycles, triggers Ice-shroom effects that inflict chill but don't freeze. On th' third cycle, triggers full Ice-shroom effect, then disappears.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>Sunflower + Ice-shroom</color>

plants.name: Comet-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every year, she joins th' garden darting contest - hitting zombies flying, snorkling, hypnotized, or even hypnotized with her sun-shaped darts. Despite her flawless precision, she never wins… th' judges can never find her.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces Sun; upon being bitten, releases a Solar Comet that ricochets among zombies.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker and summons a Solar Comet.
<color=black>•</color>Th' Solar Comet seeks out zombies (prioritizing hypnotized ones) and bounces between them, up to 10 times. When it hits a hypnotized zombie, it deals 200 damage and drops 25 Sun. When it hits a non-hypnotized zombie, it deals 100 damage and drops 15 Sun.
<color=black>•</color>After th' Comet completes its bounces or disappears, it drops an additional 25 Sun.</color>

plants.name: Chompkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Chompkin opened a gym for Chompers, meant to help them digest better, burn fat, and stay in shape. It became wildly popular, but he's not happy. "They're not training, they're eating! Me gym’s become a buffet!" he vents.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides digestive aids for Chomper-type plants inside his shell to speed up digestion.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Periodically uses a reserve Digestive Sac to help th' Chomper plant in th' same tile to instantly finish digesting (or to instantly recharge th' Devour abilities of Chompzillas and its fusions).
<color=black>•</color>Generates 1 Digestive Sac every 40s, up to a maximum of 3 at th' same time. First Digestive Sac takes 7.5s to generate.</color>

plants.name: Stench-spreader
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ugh, your taste stinks! I hate ye two!" cries th' third head. Zombies think he's crying from his fellows' smell, but actually, it's just because of their terrible taste in music. "We don't even have noses," th' first head explains.

-Written by silver fool</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots Poison peas; makes poisoned zombies release toxic clouds on hit.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles add 1 Poison value to zombies on hit.
<color=black>•</color>If th' zombie hit be already in a Poisoned state, creates a Toxic Cloud at th' zombie's feet that lasts for 6s, applying 1 Poison value and dealing damage equal to 20× th' total projectiles fired in one volley by all Poison-system straight-shooting plants in this lane per second to all zombies caught within. Thar can be up to 1 active Toxic Cloud per lane.</color>

plants.name: Plaguebringer Snipea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>She doesn't actually carry viruses, but everyone avoids her - that heave-ho garlic smell be enough. "The smell actually prevents viruses," she insists. Th' zombies don't buy it.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Snipes targets to spread an Infectious Cloud that multiplies like a virus.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>500/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Creates an Infectious Cloud at th' target's location. Headshots create a Virulent Cloud instead.</color>
<color=#5E1675>Infectious Clouds: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Moves randomly across th' lawn. Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>Lasts 15s. Every second, inflicts Garlic Butter and 1 Garlic Point to zombies inside (Virulent Clouds have doubled radius and tick rate).
<color=black>•</color>When inflicting Garlic Points, deal (20×Garlic Points) damage. Blow me down! If th' target be immune to poison, deals 300 damage instead. Cleave him to the brisket! Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Targets that have lost their heads (HP below threshold) die instantly, spawning a new Infectious Cloud at their position.
<color=black>•</color>If 30 Infectious Clouds already exist, new ones won't spawn and instead expand th' nearest Cloud's radius and increase its damage by 10%.</color>

plants.name: Cherry-spreader
plants.introduce: "Delicious cherries!" "Fresh cherries!" "Cheap cherries!" Cherry-spreader's three mouths shout tirelessly, yet their cherry business never seems to pillage off. Those who have tried them say these cherries be justTooSticky.
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires half-ripe cherries across three lanes. They stick to zombies and mature after a short delay, then explode.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles attach to targets and explode after 6s with a 1-tile splash radius. Each zombie can only have one half-ripe cherry attached.
<color=black>•</color>While attached, half-ripe cherries absorb 25% of all cherry-type projectile and cherry explosion damage th' zombie takes, adding that to its final explosion damage.</color>

plants.name: Dynamite Commando
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At th' 5th Annual Garden Quickdraw Championship, Dynamite Commando shared his secret to victory: "I use specially crafted cherry rounds. Their small size means I can store plenty, and th' stickiness helps them cluster together for rapid bursts. Yo ho ho. Of course, keeping th' barrel well-lubricated be absolutely essential."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots half-ripe cherries at zombies, with a small chance of shooting a massive barrage!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Batten down the hatches! Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×6/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of half-ripe cherries each attack, lasting 5s. These explode instantly and attach a half-ripe cherry to all zombies in th' damage radius. Arrr!</color>

plants.name: Black Cherry
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You can't host a party in th' garden without a permit." Black Cherry casually tells th' unregistered zombies off. "The first time's just a warning. Arrr! If they still don't leave after that, I'll pillage action. Well, some can't even handle th' warning."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a Cherry Bomb blast, then uses th' resulting ash to trigger an even stronger Doom-shroom explosion.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Triggers a Cherry Bomb explosion on fusion, and explodes like a Doom-shroom after 1.5s.
<color=black>•</color>Th' Doom-shroom blast deals 1800 base Cremator damage, increasing by a factor of (# of zombies hit by th' initial Cherry bomb explosion) × 1/6. (For reference, if one zombie be hit by th' initial cherry explosion, th' cremator damage will be 7/6 times th' original damage).</color>

plants.name: Catalyst-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Catalyst-shroom was nearly expelled from th' Zombuddies Club. Th' zombies she hypnotized always turned furious and destructive, which th' club considered contrary to its peaceful values. She defended herself with a single sentence: "I'm merely helping me zombie friends vent their frustration toward Dr. Edgar."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' catalyst for making zombies more explosive.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon being bitten, turns th' zombie into a Hypnotized Explode-o-shooter Zombie and disappears. Savvy?</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Thar she blows!<color=#8B0000>Cherry Bomb + Hypno-shroom</color>

plants.name: Sea-shell
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once a star performer at th' World Marine Life Festival and th' pride of th' Sea-shroom colony, Sea-shell can nay longer float on water. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Everything changed after that dreadful Halloween party. He wore a pumpkin head for th' perfect performance, only to find he could never pillage it off again.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Regenerates itself using Sea-shroom seed packets.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Land plant. Can be fed Sea-shroom seed packets to heal by 1/3 max HP.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Chomper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Chomper looks down on his fellow Chompers. He thinks they're rude, picky eaters, and lazy freeloaders who produce nothing for th' garden, unlike him, with his dazzling, radiant skin. Blisterin' barnacles!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Devours hypnotized zombies and converts them into Hypno-shrooms. Splice the mainbrace!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Also targets Hypnotized zombies and drops a Hypno-shroom seed packet on a successful devour of a Hypnotized zombie, then digests for 10s.
<color=black>•</color>When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker, then reverts to a Chomper.</color>

plants.name: Hypno Pepper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm actually very harmless," said Hypno Pepper, adjusting his hat. Blisterin' barnacles! "I help zombies find their hidden fragility, guiding them to drop their pretense and become open, honest friends." As for th' blazing flames? "That's just th' hypnotium doing its magic. Cleave him to the brisket! It doesn't really hurt th' fragile zombies."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Explodes with fiery charm, causing zombies to switch sides.

<color=black>Special: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Hypnotizes all zombies with less than 900 HP in its lane. Deals 1800 Cremator damage to all other zombies in its lane.</color>

plants.name: Butterweed
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Unlike other Spikeweeds, Butterweed be exceptionally gentle. It has nay sharp spikes, dislikes violent sports, and just wants zombies to try a slice of its homemade butter cake. Unfortunately, with his poor eyesight, he always offers th' butter to th' wrong spot. Sling yer hook!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sticky, buttery slow trap that doesn't deal damage.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>0</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Slows down all non-flying zombies that walk over it and Butters them for 1s every 3s. Shiver me timbers!
<color=black>•</color>Nay longer pops tires and be ignored by vehicles.</color>

plants.name: Aurora Plantern
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Winter be th' season for meditation. Th' cold sharpens th' mind. Splice the mainbrace! With gnawing winds and silent nights, such a perfect time for reflection should not be wasted. For days on end, th' night-watching Aurora Plantern has been pondering what he should be thinking about. Oh wait, that's it! Thinking about what to think about!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Freezes zombies with a cold aura and enables lasers to gain chilling effects.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Plantern traits.
<color=black>•</color>Once per second, deals 20 damage and applies Chill to zombies in within a 1.1-tile radius, and prolongs th' Freeze duration of th' zombies already frozen by 1s (cannot be reapplied to th' same zombie).
<color=black>•</color>Anti-ground Lasers from Lumos Cactus/Ray-shroom turn cyan and gain th' ability to apply Chill after passing through.</color>

plants.name: Land-mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After lying in wait for a long time, Land-mine has drawn sufficient strength from sunlight and moisture, gaining power comparable to a Cherry Bomb. "Spudow!" he shouted, but th' zombies were only surprised.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can grow twice. Blisterin' barnacles! Sling yer hook! Splice the mainbrace!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>900 (Initial)</color>
<color=black>Special: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Starts in an armed state. Grows 30s after appearance, doubling its damage.
<color=black>•</color>After another 30s, grows again and increases explosion radius to 1.5 tiles across lanes.</color>

plants.name: Sea-mine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' moment he enters th' pool, Sea-mine absorbs water like a little water baby, convinced this will greatly amplify his explosive power. While this does turn out to be true, he still cannot understand how it all works, just as he cannot understand why th' pool be never completely filled with dead zombies either.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Aquatic and can grow twice.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>900 (Initial)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Starts in an armed state. Grows 30s after appearance, doubling its damage.
<color=black>•</color>After another 30s, grows again and increases explosion radius to 1.5 tiles across lanes.</color>

plants.name: Blacklight Plantern
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Blacklight Plantern doesn't consume darkness to create light. Their light be fueled by their contempt for th' Zombies, and a couple grams of plutonium. Sling yer hook! "My light burns with rage. Pray ye don't find it pointed at you."

-Written by Goober</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>His UV light be radioactive and grants lasers explosive effects.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Plantern traits.
<color=black>•</color>Every 3s, supplies Doomwoods in a 3×3 area with 3 Irradiation value. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>Anti-ground Lasers from Lumos Cactus/Ray-shroom turn purple and gain th' ability to trigger a 1-tile explosion dealing 10 damage on hit after passing through.</color>

plants.name: Cab-barrage
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With a thunderous boom, bright-green shells soar into th' sky. "A farewell gift," says Cab-barrage with a nod. "May their last meal be filling, even if it be not brains. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Everyone gets a serving."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bombards a wide area ahead with cabbages. Batten down the hatches!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Special: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When attacking, lobs one cabbage at each zombie in th' forward area of his lane and th' 2 adjacent lanes.
<color=black>•</color>Umbrella Kale or Midas Umbrella in front in of his lane can also intercept cabbages that would have been thrown to adjacent lanes and boost them. Yo ho ho. Blow me down!</color>

plants.name: Gourd-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash be heavy, but too soft. Cleave him to the brisket! Melons be heavy too, but too fragile. Now those problems be solved. Or possibly combined.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Projectiles crush zombies like a Squash, then shatter like a Melon, dealing splash damage.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>120 (Squash)/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles deal area crush damage on landing, then break shortly after, dealing splash damage with fall-off similar to Melon-pult.</color>

plants.name: Cherry Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Even among Squashes, Cherry Squash be famously short-tempered and quick to explode. "Try carrying something that heavy on your back," he grumbles. Other Squashes be less concerned about th' temper, and more curious how he could jump so high and so far with th' thing on his back.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A very explosive Squash.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash) + 1800 (3×3, Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>2 tiles to th' left; 3 tiles to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon landing, triggers a Cherry Bomb explosion.</color>

plants.name: Doom Squash
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Doom Squash rarely speaks to anyone on th' lawn. It silently moves from place to place, leaving craters behind. Rumor has it that it was originally supposed to be deployed under "dire circumstances" but somehow escaped containment.

- Edited by cassidy</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An extremely explosive Squash, and prone to causing collateral damage.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash) + 1800 (5×5, Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>2 tiles to th' left; 3 tiles to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Upon landing, triggers a Doom-shroom explosion that leaves a crater on th' landing spot; destroying all plants on that tile.</color>

plants.name: Blubber-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Come on, have a taste of me fresh butter!" Blubber-shroom says proudly, showing off his new recipe. Sling yer hook! Dead men tell no tales. "If ye don't like it, just shake your head," he adds. Everyone seems to be diggin' it, or at least they be completely motionless.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays butter from th' top of its cap onto broadside zombies.

<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>An area within a 2.2-tile radius</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Does not actively target zombies. When damaged or manually tapped and if thar be zombies within attack range, it performs an attack.
<color=black>•</color>When attacking, loses 30 max HP (and current HP), throwing one pat of Butter at every zombie in range, dealing 40 damage and immobilizing them for 4s</color>

plants.name: Multipeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You two have already taken turns for three whole minutes, now it's me turn!" th' three heads of th' Multipeater have been competing for shared items since childhood, from marbles, to comic books, to a limited-edition commando badge carved from peas.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can switch between three attack modes, allowing flexible allocation of firepower.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×6(or n)/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Has three attack modes that can be switched by tapping on it; targeting behavior changes accordingly:
<color=black>•</color>1. Arrr! Standard Mode: Fires 2 peas each into his own lane and th' 2 adjacent lanes;
<color=black>•</color>2. Spread Mode: Fires 1 peas each into every lane (if th' map has fewer than 6 lanes, th' damage from missing shots be evenly redistributed among th' remaining shots);
<color=black>•</color>3. Focus Mode: Fires 6 peas each into his own lane.</color>

plants.name: Solar Blover
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Solar Blover always wears a gentle smile, often saying, "Clear skies and a spring breeze filled with sunshine - how pleasant!" Sadly, zombies don't understand this beauty. What she blows out isn't a soft spring wind, it's pure solar wind.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Capable of blowing out a large number of Sun shots.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10×72</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Spins its leaves and fires two spirals totaling 72 Sun Shots. Each shot drops 5 Sun upon hitting a target and can be buffed by Infernowood to deal 40 damage and drop 15 Sun instead.</color>

plants.name: Puff-kin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' three Puff-shroom Pumpkin brothers be well-loved, well-behaved kids: Quiet, orderly, and never quarrelsome. Their only hobby be trying to piece together th' pumpkin puzzle on top of their heads, though unfortunately, they have never quite succeeded.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' more Puff-shrooms in th' Puff-kin, th' stronger th' protection! Avast ye! Avast ye!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Restores 50 HP every 3s. Starts out at 1/4 max HP.
<color=black>•</color>At 1/3 max HP or more, gains a 50% incoming damage reduction.
<color=black>•</color>At 2/3 max HP or more, absorbs damage for th' plant inside.</color>

plants.name: Fumy Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I can attack in both forward and backward directions," says Fumy Pumpkin confidently. "I'm a bidirectional Fume-shroom." However, he doesn't appear to have noticed that he's facing a different direction from everyone else.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can attack like a Fume-shroom… though th' direction seems a little off.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>Targets from his own tile, up to 3 tiles both above and below</color>

plants.name: Solar Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Solar Squash's favorite thing to do be gently pat th' petals on his head with his leaf, then boast proudly to other Squashes: "This be what Sun-powered shampoo does. Blow me down! Just look how smooth me hair is." Luckily for him, th' other Squashes be all very serious and never tease him, so he still doesn't know he's sporting a classic receding hairline.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can consume Sun to remain on th' lawn after squashing.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special: Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>Upon landing or dying, consumes 50 + 25 * (Number of previous revivals) Sun to remain on th' tile of th' landing spot/revive. If this fails, 50 Sun be refunded.</color>

plants.name: Melon Shell
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ha ha! Guess whar me eyebrows are!" Melon Pumpkin laughs at th' audience. A famous rooftop magician, he excels at all kinds of tricks, including making half of his eyes disappear. Thar she blows! Of course, his proudest illusion be th' Great Melon Transformation. To this day, nay one has ever seen how he hides a watermelon inside a Melon-pult's bucket.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws bonus watermelons when protecting a catapult-type plant.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/?s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Each time th' catapult plant inside attacks, it simultaneously launches an additional watermelon.</color>

plants.name: Potato Masher
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>You've seen Squashes growing on vines, but have ye ever seen one sprouting from th' ground itself? Don't be fooled, as Potato Masher be simply mashed potatoes shaped like a Squash. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! But don't ye dare laugh at how short he is. If he hears you, he'll make ye even shorter than he is.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces Potato Mashes that can squash zombies. Thar she blows!

<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Starts out armed by default. Yo ho ho. Generates a Potato Mash on th' spot when a zombie enters his targeting range, then burrows underground for 15s to arm again.
<color=black>•</color>Potato Mash has th' same effect and damage as Squash, but with a larger targeting range.</color>

plants.name: Potato Mash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Don't let his small size fool ye - his ambitions be anything but small. "I won't live under th' Masher's protection forever. I'm jumping out to find me own life." With that, he leaps forward and crushes th' zombie in his way. Maybe one day, he too will find a pit of his own, just like th' Masher did. Thar she blows!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Similar to Squash, but much easier to trigger.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>1.5 tiles to th' left; 2.5 tiles to th' right</color>

plants.name: Doom Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At one Zombie Garlic-Eating Championship, Doom Garlic was served as th' final course. Th' result: Three of th' ten contestants withdrew, five were rushed to th' hospital, and th' remaining two exploded on th' spot. With nay remaining competitors, Doom Garlic himself was declared th' champion of that year's event.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Causes th' zombies that bit it to explode upon death. Blimey! Thundering typhoons! Blimey!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>Inflicts Irradiated debuff on zombies that bite it and curses them. Cursed zombies explode on death in a 1.5-tile radius for 300 damage.
<color=black>•</color>Inflicts Poison debuff and 1 Poison point on zombies that bite it.
<color=black>•</color>When Irradiated debuff and Poison debuff be active simultaneously on a zombie, th' Poison duration becomes infinite.</color>

plants.name: Starburst-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When Starburst-shroom's star-shaped cap hits a zombie, it releases star projectiles, greatly improving projectile efficiency. "Actually, if th' backward-fired star were optimized as well, th' efficiency could be even higher." One of his comrades commented while dodging th' returning projectile.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing star caps that split into five stars on contact.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>0 + 20×5×(0-3)/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Th' Star cap itself deals nay damage and can pierce twice. Arrr! Each time it contacts a zombie, it releases 1 star projectile in each of 5 directions, each dealing 20 damage. Shiver me timbers! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Cleave him to the brisket!</color>

plants.name: Scaredy Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At school, Scaredy Flower Pot always curls up and avoids interacting with others. Because th' mushrooms he grows be fewer than those of his classmates, he believes he be inferior. What his fear prevents him from noticing be that his classmates be actually envious - th' mushrooms he grows be th' most delicious of all.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Give boosts based on th' value of th' plant placed on top.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Grants th' plant placed on top an attack damage bonus equal to [0.04 × (that plant's Sun cost)]%, up to 20%.
<color=black>•</color>If th' plant on top be a Scaredy-type mushroom, th' attack bonus becomes 2×(base bonus + 10%), up to 60%.
<color=black>•</color>Becomes frightened when zombies be present within a 3×3 area and stops providing attack bonus while frightened. After leaving th' frightened state, th' attack bonus gradually recovers over 3s.</color>

plants.name: Ray-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Every plant I see be wearing sunglasses," Ray-shroom grumbles. "It's ridiculous, so pretentious!" In th' end, Ray-shroom chalks it up to some inexplicable trend, while th' other plants agree that staring directly at an ultra-high-power laser emitter be obviously bad for your eyesight…</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires a piercing laser ray. Damage falls off with distance and increases with Lumos.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Fires across th' entire lane with unlimited pierce.
