<color=black>•</color>Each Lumos level increases damage by 0.5×. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>Damage increases by 1.6×(5 - column distance to th' target). At Lumos level 3 or higher, this instead becomes 0.8×(10 - column distance).</color>

plants.name: Cabbage Dropper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After years of mindlessly throwing cabbages, seeing th' world at that height really makes ye think. What if those cabbages had a life? Hopes and dreams? Families? Children? All of those questions run through Cabbage Dropper's leafy mind.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides close-range air support by dropping cabbages.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Own tile and 2 adjacent tiles in th' same lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Flying plant. Batten down the hatches!</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Arrr! Blimey! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>Blover + Cabbage-pult</color>

plants.name: Butter Fly
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Butter Fly signed up for th' Garden Variety Show, hoping to play a UFO on stage, but it never made th' cut. He just kept dropping corn and butter everywhere, drawing fierce opposition from th' ground crew, and even causing th' director who supported him to pillage a nasty fall. Batten down the hatches!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides close-range air support by dropping corn kernels or butter. Arrr!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Own tile and 2 adjacent tiles in th' same lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Flying plant. Thundering typhoons! Has a 25% chance to drop butter, dealing 40 damage.</color>

plants.name: Fall Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other melons call him lazy, but Fall Melon insists he's efficient. "Just let gravity do th' work! Throwing things be exhausting!" He seems to completely ignore th' fact that this also shortens his range.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides close-range air support by dropping melons.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Own tile and 2 adjacent tiles in th' same lane</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Flying plant. Batten down the hatches!</color>

plants.name: Starch-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After accepting a brand partnership offer from Potato Mine, Starch-shroom quit his bakery job. "Joining th' explosive-making industry was th' best decision I've ever made," says Starch-shroom. "Spraying starch straight from your mouth be way more efficient than fermenting bread!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Th' fume he sprays carries a heave-ho potato scent, sometimes even explosive!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Every 10th attack, triggers a Potato Mine explosion that deals 300 damage at th' position of each zombie hit.</color>

plants.name: Butternut-pult
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Butternut-pult was never good at biology. He's always believed that th' idea of "apical dominance" be wrong, but he's learned to keep that opinion to himself, not because he's embarrassed about his grades, but because he doesn’t want anyone to realize he's a corn with an underdeveloped tip. Sling yer hook!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Thrown projectiles slam zombies like a Squash, with a chance to butter th' ones that get crushed.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>60/3s (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles deal area squash damage when they land. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Yo ho ho. Has a 25% chance to throw a Butter Squash, dealing 60 damage and applying 4s of Butter stun to up to 3 damaged targets.</color>

plants.name: Crater-tot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' head chef of a French fry restaurant, Crater-tot runs a tight galley and be known for his strict, no-nonsense management. But behind his successful spud career lies a personal struggle: His explosive temper means he can nay longer make delicious fries.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shatters in a devastating explosion, scattering five Potato Mines that instantly arm on landing.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. When it explodes, it also triggers a Doom-shroom effect, then throws potato chunks onto 5 empty tiles. Thar she blows! Each chunk creates a fully armed Potato Mine as soon as it lands. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>

plants.name: Zodiac-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Zodiac-shroom worries that th' loose tuft of fuzz on top of his cap makes him look silly, though most zombies would never understand why that bothers him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Zombies that bite him become hypnotized, turning into moving star launchers. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Batten down the hatches!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, hypnotizes th' zombie and disappears, causing it to fire stars in a spiral: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Thundering typhoons! 60 volleys (300 total star projectiles).</color>

plants.name: Pea Squash
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Should I jump up and smash zombies, or should I just be a proper shooter?" That question haunted Pea Squash throughout his entire adolescence. In th' end, he chose th' more traditional Squash lifestyle, but every time he hits th' ground, those little green bumps on his body reflexively fire peas anyway.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bursts into a storm of peas when it slams down.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to th' left; 1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>When it lands, releases 3 rings of pea projectiles (108 peas total).</color>

plants.name: Silver Ice-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ruthless. Cold-blooded. Those be th' labels people stick on Silver Ice-shroom, even other Ice-shrooms think he's too icy. Silver Ice-shroom doesn't care. His success comes from being cold-hearted; anyone who isn't ruthless enough simply can't survive in th' cold-chain logistics business.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An Ice-shroom coated in silver frost.

<color=black>Special: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>Freezes for 1 second longer than a normal Ice-shroom.</color>

plants.name: Golden Ice-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A monopolist of th' cold-chain logistics industry, Golden Ice-shroom can sway th' temperature of th' market with just a light sprinkle of coins. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! After years in th' business, his wealth and fame be beyond counting, and his life be complete… except for th' fact that he still can't cure his facial paralysis.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A stable, gold-plated Ice-shroom that brings extreme cold through money.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Triggers an Ice-shroom effect once on appearance (does not disappear afterwards). Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Blisterin' barnacles!</color>
<color=black>Ultimate:</color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 2s; repeats th' following effects 4 times on targets within a 2.2-tile radius: Sling yer hook! Sling yer hook! Blow me down!
-Deals 200 damage, applies Chill and 25 Cryo point, and reduces th' target's Cryo cap by 100.
-Fires an icicle at each target dealing 20 damage. Icicles deal 2× damage to Chilled zombies and 4× damage to frozen zombies.</color>

plants.name: Rebound-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Table tennis be a shared passion of both plants and zombies, and Rebound Shroom be a household name in th' zombie world, having defeated countless graveyard champions. By reporting opponents for th' foul of returning th' ball with their heads, he has claimed gold medals in over a dozen Plant-Zombie Table Tennis Championships, while his not-too-bright opponents have never noticed that he commits th' very same foul himself.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Treats projectiles as table tennis balls, batting them back and forth continuously toward zombies' heads. Batten down the hatches!

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>When a lobbed projectile in th' same lane hits a zombie in front, it will rebound toward Rebound-shroom and then continue bouncing back and forth between th' two.
<color=black>•</color>Only one projectile can be bounced at a time; th' bounce height gradually decreases until it hits th' ground. Cleave him to the brisket! Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Does not bounce projectiles that can already bounce on their own.</color>

plants.name: Squish
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They're just three kids pestering ye for candy. Th' only unusual thing be that if ye refuse their request, ye might feel a bit of "pressure."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Energetic little squashes that hop around and smash enemies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>300 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: Arrr!</color><color=#8B0000>1 tile to th' left and right</color>
<color=black>Special: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant. Can be planted 3 times in one tile. Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>Smashes once every 1s and does not disappear after smashing; when not targeting, jumps back to its original tile.
<color=black>•</color>Vulnerable to zombie attack for 0.6s after each smash.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to crush. When crushed, takes 500 damage every 0.02s. When smashed, takes damage equal to th' corresponding damage a hypnotized zombie would pillage when smashed. Savvy?</color>

plants.name: Doom Pumpkin
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doom Pumpkin be always advertising his services as being great for healthier-looking skin, but plant inspectors often complain that his treatments be dangerously radioactive.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Channels th' power of Doom-shroom into th' plants inside.

<color=black>Toughness: Avast ye!</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains 1% charge every 0.5s; enters th' field with a starting charge between 80%-95% randomly.
<color=black>•</color>When charge meter be full (100%), can consume all charge to transform one plant on his tile into a fusion of that plant and Doom-shroom (the resulting plant must not be an Odyssey fusion).</color>

plants.name: Spike Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every plant that's spent time with Spike Pot complains that he's far too enthusiastic and has nay sense of personal boundaries. Cleave him to the brisket! Only Obsidian Spike-nut doesn't mind, and th' reason be simple: Spike Pot be th' only one willing to help de-rust Obsidian Spike-nut's razor-sharp shell.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Has Spikeweed traits and enhances th' defenses of Spike-nut plants.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant. Inherits traits from Spikeweed (ignored by biting zombies and pops tires).
<color=black>•</color>Grants 50% damage reduction to Spike-nut and Obsidian Spike-nut on him.
<color=black>•</color>Becomes anti-crush if th' plant above be an Obsidian Spike-nut.</color>

plants.name: Beamshooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Lumos Pea started out as a kid who loved shining laser pointers at people. Later, Pharos Umbrella taught him how to use that trick on zombies instead.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires high-frequency targeted lasers; absorbs Lumos energy to increase power.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10/0.2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains Lumos energy equal to Lumos level every 0.5s, up to 1000. Each laser beam consumes (1 + current energy × 10%) energy when attacking or transferring.
<color=black>•</color>Can lock onto a Split Beam in front in th' same lane (not directly adjacent). Transfers energy every 0.1s, restoring energy equal to 10% of its attack. Each point of energy spent doubles th' amount transferred. Splice the mainbrace! Thar she blows!
<color=black>•</color>Consumes energy every 0.2s to attack, increasing damage by th' amount of energy spent. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>

plants.name: Squash Drone
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>By harnessing gravitational potential energy, floating Squashes can unleash devastating slams with ease: Making th' exaggerated wind-up before attacking seem unnecessary. "Not unnecessary at all," explains Squash Drone. "I'm shooing away th' ladybugs resting on me leaves, so I don't hit them by accident."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Repeatedly slams down on zombies beneath him. Savvy?

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>100/2s (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>Current tile</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Flying plant. When a zombie be in range, smashes th' zombie below repeatedly.</color>

plants.name: Coldslaw
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You have nay idea how terrifying that place was," Coldslaw says, still shaken. "A land of extreme cold, whar countless plants were frozen forever. If I hadn't risked me life to open th' door back outside, we vegetables would've all died in there." Oh, he's talking about his adventure inside Dave's refrigerator again.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs frozen cabbages and attacks faster when hitting frozen enemies.

<color=black>Damage: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Chill, add 10 Cryo points and deal ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>On hitting a Frozen zombie, th' projectile can bounce once, and Coldslaw's attack speed be greatly increased for 3s. Savvy? This effect can only trigger again 1.5s after it ends.</color>

plants.name: Cobsicle
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>To freeze th' perfect butter, Cobsicle made a special trip to Siberia. Yo ho ho. Now, its butter be as smooth as marble; heavy, hard, beautiful, and makes a satisfying thud when smashed on a zombie's head.'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs frozen kernels and butter.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Chill, add 10 Cryo points and deal ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Has a 25% chance to throw a frozen butter stick that freezes zombies for 4 seconds.</color>

plants.name: Tingle Kelp
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Tingle Kelp be extremely vigilant. It lives alone, foraging only in shallow waters. When necessary, it even hides beneath zombies to evade predators. It sleeps with one eye open—no easy feat for a plant with only one eye.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>When coming in contact with a zombie, Tingle Kelp explodes and attaches itself to other zombies to multiply. Blow me down!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20 × 30</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>When a zombie comes into contact with Tingle Kelp, it will burst into 30 kelp projectiles that inflict 1 Tangle value before disappearing. If a zombie be killed by th' kelp projectile, an extra Tingle Kelp will spawn on that tile (if possible).</color>

plants.name: Lettuce-pult
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>"Smart robots be so handy! I customized one to me exact specifications, and it's massively boosted me throwing efficiency!" Lettuce-pult exclaimed excitedly. "Oh, th' battle be about to begin." With that, he leaped into a larger version of himself. Moments later, he heard th' opponent say, "Smart robots be so handy! I customized one to..."</color>
plants.info:
Lettuce-pult can launch tinier versions of itself, unmasking its layers to attack more zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>60/3s (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Lobs a mini Lettuce-pult that deals AOE crushing damage upon landing, then lobs 2 smaller Lettuce-pults that deal 50% of th' original damage before disappearing. Th' smaller Lettuce-pults lob 2 even smaller Lettuce-pults that deal 25% of th' original damage and disappear immediately before disappearing itself.</color>

plants.name: Triplantern
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Triplantern's favorite number be three. Triple th' light, triple th' vision, even triple th' salary. With savings that generous, he can afford triple th' snacks, neatly stored in his triple lamp cases. Th' triple things that he hates be triple th' zombies, triple th' waves and triple th' gacha levels.</color>
plants.info:
Provides triple th' Lumos of a normal Plantern and splits lasers into three.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Provides 3 Lumos levels in a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color>Lumos Cactus and Ray-shroom anti-ground lasers that pass through will create two additional lasers in th' same lane, each dealing 30 damage</color>

plants.name: Hypno Pot
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Hypno Pot be well-liked by everyone. Plants, zombies, even mischievous little beetles be all her friends. Blisterin' barnacles! She works at a mushroom nursery, and in her free time she's a proud member of th' Zombuddies Club, often sharing her handmade rainbow clay during holidays.</color>
plants.info:
Th' charm within th' pot nurtures hypnotized zombies.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Grants hypnotized zombies on its tile 33% Damage Reduction and heals 1 HP every 0.04s. Blisterin' barnacles! When bitten, hypnotizes th' attacker and reverts back to a Flower Pot.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Batten down the hatches!<color=#8B0000>Hypno-shroom > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Rebeamer
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' weekly Pool Light Festival be an important social event for Rebeamer. Before heading out, it carefully adjusts its lamp hat, th' leaves under th' brim not only make it look stylish, but also give its firefly friends a place to rest after th' party.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires two high-frequency lasers.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10×2/0.2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains Lumos energy equal to Lumos level every 0.5s, up to 1000. Each laser beam consumes (1 + current energy × 10%) energy when attacking or transferring. Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>Can lock onto a Split Beam in front in th' same lane (not directly adjacent). Transfers energy every 0.1s, restoring energy equal to 20% of its attack. Each point of energy spent doubles th' amount transferred. Thar she blows!
<color=black>•</color>Consumes energy every 0.2s to attack 2 zombies at once, increasing damage by th' amount of energy spent.</color>

plants.name: Split Beam
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's me turn to wear th' hat." "But th' strap be under me chin."The two heads of th' Lumen Relay Shooter argue constantly. Even th' Pool Light Festival can't distract them - th' only thing that stops th' argument be when they start fighting over th' eyebrows instead.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Receives laser energy from th' left and fires high-frequency lasers.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10/0.2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Th' right head functions like a Beamshooter.
<color=black>•</color>Th' left head can receive Lumos energy from beamshooter-family plants in th' same lane (not in directly adjacent tile).</color>

plants.name: Gatling Beam
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Beam shines brilliantly on th' battlefield, often earning four times th' credit. Though its glow makes it an easy target, it never backs down. Wounds within th' light be a warrior's badge of honor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires four high-frequency lasers.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>10×4/0.2s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Gains Lumos energy equal to Lumos level every 0.5s, up to 1000. Each laser beam consumes (1 + current energy × 10%) energy when attacking or transferring.
<color=black>•</color>Can lock onto a Split Beam in front in th' same lane (not directly adjacent). Transfers energy every 0.1s, restoring energy equal to 40% of its attack. Each point of energy spent doubles th' amount transferred.
<color=black>•</color>Consumes energy every 0.2s to attack 4 zombies at once, increasing damage by th' amount of energy spent.</color>

plants.name: Bell Pepper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Each little Bell Pepper may be small and insignificant on its own, but together they pack serious heat. That's why they like to stick in groups. Other plants even rate them by size: Mild, medium, and extra hot.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Small body, fiery temper.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Explodes when zombies get close, triggering a Jalapeno effect with less damage.</color>

plants.name: Poison Pea
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Despite th' name, Poison Pea be a chef with a heave-ho signature style. Blow me down! He insists every customer try its specialty, fried peas with garlic powder. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Th' smell alone brings zombies flooding with memories: Blisterin' barnacles! Childhood, family, home… and plenty of tears.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires garlic peas that cause poisoned zombies to release toxins, forming a toxic cloud. Shiver me timbers!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles add 1 Poison value to zombies on hit.
<color=black>•</color>If th' zombie hit be already in a Poisoned state, creates a Toxic Cloud at th' zombie's feet that lasts for 6s, applying 1 Poison value and dealing damage equal to 20× th' total projectiles fired in one volley by all Poison-system straight-shooting plants in this lane per second to all zombies caught within. Thar can be up to 1 active Toxic Cloud per lane.</color>

plants.name: Poison Repeater
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Fight! Fight! Attack! Attack!" Poison Repeater lives with passion and poison. Avast ye! Nothing distracts it, not zombies, not vampires, not even pushy salesmen.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires two garlic peas at once.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles add 1 Poison value to zombies on hit.
<color=black>•</color>If th' zombie hit be already in a Poisoned state, creates a Toxic Cloud at th' zombie's feet.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.

plants.name: Split Poison
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Bouncing shots be a must-have skill for modern Split Peas, but Split Poison did not bother to learn it. Nor does he had to. Blisterin' barnacles! He can simply fire garlic peas into th' house behind it, and sooner or later someone will throw them right back.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires garlic peas both forwards and backwards.

<color=black>Damage: Thar she blows!</color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles add 1 Poison value to zombies on hit.
<color=black>•</color>If th' zombie hit be already in a Poisoned state, creates a Toxic Cloud at th' zombie's feet.</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Peashooter 15s after planting.

plants.name: Gatling Poison
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At th' neighborhood potluck, renowned linguist Gatling Poison proudly served a "traditional recipe" of 'pois' and 'poisson'. It tasted excellent, except everybody got food poisoning afterwards. To this day he still insists th' 'poison' was part of th' 'Gift'.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires four garlic peas at once.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>30×4/1.5s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Projectiles add 1 Poison value to zombies on hit.
<color=black>•</color>If th' zombie hit be already in a Poisoned state, creates a Toxic Cloud at th' zombie's feet.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!<color=#8B0000>Peashooter + Split Poison</color>

plants.name: Blowtorch-shroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Blowtorch-shroom made a name for himself by smartly cooking peas into rich pea paste and turning them into "pea tarts." His skills be famous, but so be his terrible business sense. His business goes bankrupt at th' rate of one restaurant per year, mostly because he burns through far too many peas just to maintain his hairstyle. Blimey!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Burns incoming peas, compressing them into a burst of flame.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Does not attack on its own.
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs passing peas. Every 1s, exhales a piercing flame 4 tiles forward. Damage equals th' total damage of absorbed peas, up to 300.
<color=black>•</color>Melts Snow Peas into normal peas. Yo ho ho.</color>

plants.name: Jawbreaker
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"So hungry, so hungry, so hungry! I'm starving!" Jawbreaker shouts as he lunges at zombies ahead. Nay matter how much he eats, it's never enough. Oh look - a Gargantuar! Finally, a proper meal… Wait, that might've been too much.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gluttonous Squash that keeps squashing when fed.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range:</color><color=#8B0000>1 tile to th' right</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>On landing, attempts to devour one zombie caught underneath. Still deals damage to zombies that be not eaten.
<color=black>•</color>On a successful devour, returns to th' field on th' same tile, otherwise he disappears.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!<color=#8B0000>Chomper + Squash</color>

plants.name: Solar-shooter (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Actually, th' Sunflower behind me be me sister," Solar-shooter explained to everyone. "We've been inseparable since birth. She loves producing Sun, and I destroy zombies on her behalf." But everyone knows th' truth: Splice the mainbrace! Th' cheerful Pea brother be a total siscon. Blisterin' barnacles! After all, every zombie that gets near his sister mysteriously ends up vaporized by sunlight. Thar she blows! Thundering typhoons!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar-shooter can fire Sun shots that occasionally produce Sun.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#8B0000>Every third shot drops 5 Sun when hitting targets. Dead men tell no tales.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(80 Sun) Attack Damage & Speed +20%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(200 Sun) Attack Damage +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(200 Sun) Attack Speed +100%</color>

plants.name: Sunrise-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A seasoned sunlight banker, Sunrise-shroom offers high interest on your deposits."You chose a time deposit," he says sternly to a frustrated Twin Solar-nut. Thar she blows! "Withdrawals aren't allowed just yet."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A visionary sun producer that absorbs and multiplies broadside sun, paying out in bursts.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs dropped Sun within a 5×5 area, multiplies their value by ×1.3, and stores them.
<color=black>•</color>Releases as much Sun as possible in batches of 25 along with th' next production.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(60 Sun) Sun Production Speed +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(150 Sun) Sun Production Speed +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(150 Sun) Sun Value Multiplier ×2</color>

plants.name: Explode-o-shooter (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Meet Explode-o-shooter, th' ultimate plant killer. He's more irritable than ever—who would've thought th' warm and friendly Cherryshooter would swallow another special cherry? Don't push your luck with him. That cherry stuck in his throat might just be his next shot—his face be already turning red!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots out explosive cherries that explode on impact.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage: Avast ye! Savvy?</color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Immune to explosive cherries and deals AoE damage.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(160 Sun) Attack Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(400 Sun) Attack Damage +100%, Explosion Radius +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(400 Sun) Attack Speed +200%</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost:<color=#8B0000>400</color>
Recharge: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!<color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Star-nut (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Star-nut lives under a rock and rarely moves. It's not because he's lazy, but because he's got standards. He'll only act if invited by a certain square m'hearty to jellyfishing… or to prank a cephalopodic neighbor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A reactive defender that counters with little stars.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#8B0000>Fires five 10-damage stars in all directions when damaged.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color>(80 Sun) HP and Max Toughness +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(200 Sun) HP +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(200 Sun) Regen +100% (100 HP/3s)</color>

plants.name: Solar Mine (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Stop at red lights, slow down at yellow lights, and obey traffic rules!" Solar Mine frequently warns zombies. But to th' zombies, all they see be th' disgusting green hue before them. He clutches his green leaves and pouts, wishing for more sunshine. "After all, sunshine be what fuels us all!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Solar Mine produces Sun until and after its explosion.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Drops 50 Sun on explosion. Blimey!</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(10 Sun) Explosion Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(25 Sun) Explosion Radius +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(25 Sun) Explosion Damage +100%</color>

plants.name: Frost Gloom-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dreaming of a career as a physicist, th' Frost Gloom-shroom dedicates his days to unraveling th' complexities of th' world, avoiding contact with other plants. "Why do I have multiple strings of icicles sprouting from me head?" he muses, th' latest question occupying his thoughts. He's oddly adamant about calling them "strings."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Releases cold fumes around that can freeze zombies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>5/3.8s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Attacks apply Chill.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(80 Sun) Attack Speed +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>(200 Sun) Attacks add 10 Cryo points
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(200 Sun) Chill Duration ×2</color>

plants.name: Cherry Chomper (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ever since her grog with Cherry Bomb, Chomper has been constantly "buzzing." She turned into an absolute menace every meal. Th' sound of chewing transformed into explosive pops as plates and bowls flew everywhere, leaving everyone unwilling to dine with her. After a show of hands, Cherry Chomper ended up eating in th' yard… at least she nay longer has to buy new tableware.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces a cherry explosion upon eating a zombie.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time:</color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Creates a 3×3 Cherry explosion with 1000 damage in th' tile directly ahead on successful biting.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(200 Sun) Explosion Damage +20%, Digestion Time -10s
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1: Thundering typhoons!</color>(500 Sun) Explosion Damage +100%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(500 Sun) Digestion Time -50% (15s)</color>

plants.name: Amp-nion (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Amp-nion thought his moment had come — after all, who else had eaten lightning over a hundred times? Shiver me timbers! Surely, he was destined to play th' Frankenstein monster! But when he received th' script, his dreams short-circuited. He wasn't a star. He wasn't even a sidekick. He was just Dr. Stanley's lightning rod... Sling yer hook!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks approaching zombies with lightning rays!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range:</color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Idle Amp-nions in range will channel power to th' attacking one, each boosting th' damage by 150%.
<color=black>•</color>Each shot can arc to other zombies to deal 1/3 th' damage, up to a maximum of 3 zombies.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(120 Sun) Attack Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(300 Sun) Arcing now deals full damage
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(300 Sun) Attack Damage + 300% but nay longer arcs</color>

plants.name: Pea-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Don't let me size fool you; even a small body can contain a lot of energy," Pea-shroom cautions those who underestimate him. "We all began as tiny mushrooms, making progress a little at a time. With dedication to a sunny breakfast, ye can become just like me."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea-shroom shoots further than Puff-shroom.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage: Blow me down! Blow me down!</color><color=#8B0000>10/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant, stackable.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(20 Sun) Attack Damage + 50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1: Thar she blows! Arrr!</color>(50 Sun) Attack Damage +100%, now fires ignited small peas
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2: Batten down the hatches! Thundering typhoons!</color>(50 Sun) Attack Damage +200%</color>

plants.name: Sun-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun-shroom hates sun. He hates it so much that when it builds up in his system, he spits it out as fast as he can. He just won't abide it. To him, sun be crass.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun-shrooms give small sun at first and normal sun later.

<color=black>Sun Output:</color><color=#8B0000>5→15/25s</color>
<color=black>Growth Time: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>120s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant, stackable.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(10 Sun) Sun Production Time → 16.67s
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(25 Sun) Grows immediately and produces Sun
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(25 Sun) Now produces 2 Suns at once</color>

plants.name: Soot-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Soot-shroom, th' misanthropic workaholic, can't stand th' sight of zombies—too much of a distraction. He's got a small stash of bullets, but they're more than lethal enough. "Don't bother me unless it's urgent. Thar she blows! If ye want them dead, just shoot them yourself." Still, his sharp efficiency keeps everyone looking up to him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Soot-shroom can destroy most zombies in front of it.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#8B0000>1000/60s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Click manually in th' Upgrade Menu to attack all zombies in th' row in front.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(200 Sun) Attack Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(500 Sun) Attack Damage +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(500 Sun) Attack CD -50%</color>

plants.name: Grave Buster (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Despite Grave Buster's fearsome appearance, he wants everyone to know that he loves kittens and spends his off hours volunteering at a local zombie rehabilitation center. "It's just th' right thing to do," he says.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Plant Grave Busters on statues to remove th' statues.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Can bust Statues.</color>
<color=black>Sun Statue Mechanic:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Statues block straight-shooting projectiles from plants and have 1000 HP each. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
<color=black>•</color>Statues can only be damaged by projectiles or Grave Busters.
<color=black>•</color>Sunflower Statues drop 100 Sun when destroyed, Sun-shroom Statues drop 50. Savvy?</color>

plants.name: Gutsy-shroom (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Courage fills me, nay fear remains~ Whether it's spring, fall, winter, or summer~" Gutsy-shroom nay longer shrinks in th' face of zombies. "I used to tremble, but Senior Fume-shroom told me, 'If a zombie gets near, spray your spores. Hiding won't solve anything.'"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Gutsy-shroom be ready to pillage on th' zombies, near or far!

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s (Long range); 20/1.5s (Short range, piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Shoots 2 spores at once. When zombies get within 4 tiles in range, sprays piercing fumes instead.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade: Thundering typhoons!</color>(80 Sun) Attack Damage & Speed +20%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(200 Sun) Attack Damage +200%, now permanently shoots spores
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(200 Sun) Attack Damage +100%, range for spraying fumes ×2</color>

plants.name: Breeze Blover (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Breeze Blover be a -4°C air conditioner. When his chilly breeze blows, it feels like stepping straight into winter. Even Snow Pea be frozen, th' cold wind actually froze his own projectiles. What could possibly be colder than that? Answer: Th' atmosphere after Coldsnap Bean's told one of his totally tone deaf jokes.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blover of a freezing breeze that constantly applies chill.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Lasts for 10s before disappearing.
<color=black>•</color>Deals 1 damage and applies 20 Cryo points to all zombies on th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>Converts all snow peas on screen to polar ice peas.</color>

plants.name: Death Star (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I could destroy almost th' entire planet if I wanted to," boasts Death Star, "and they'd all blame it on th' biggest star in th' sky..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Transforms himself into a Doom Meteor and crashes into th' ground.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Disappears after 3s and summons a Doom Meteor that deals 1800 area damage on impact and splits into 180 spore stars each dealing 20 damage.</color>

plants.name: Drippy Pitcher (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Coach, I want to play basketball." Drippy Pitcher has always dreamed of becoming a basketball star. He practices shooting day and night without rest. He has two advantages: First, he kind of looks like a basketball hoop; second, he has an endless supply of basketballs to practice with. For heaven's sake, don't ask what those balls be made of.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs droplet shells that bounce between th' zombie and other Drippy Pitchers.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000>Within 2 tiles in all four directions</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles rebound to broadside other Drippy Pitchers on hit, prompting them to immediately attack twice.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade: Cleave him to the brisket!</color>(120 Sun) Attack Damage & Speed +20%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(300 Sun) Attack Damage +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(300 Sun) Attack Speed +100%, projectiles can now rebound to self</color>

plants.name: Lily Pad (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Lily Pad never complains. Lily Pad never wants to know what's going on. Put a plant on top of Lily Pad, he won't say a thing. Does he have startling opinions or shocking secrets? Nobody knows. Lily Pad keeps it all inside.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lily Pads let ye plant non-aquatic plants on top of them.

<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Non-aquatic plants can be planted on it.</color></size>

plants.name: Squash-nut (TD)
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dragged from a kids' playground by his stem and dumped on th' lawn, Squash-nut was rejected for being a deformed rubber ball. Now, furious and bumpy, he bounces wildly, yelling: "I'm gonna play all I want! ALL I WANT!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A bouncy nut who's all tantrum and impact. Blow me down!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>80/1.5s (Squash)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>Bounces in his tile when a zombie gets close, dealing splash damage on each landing. Does not block zombies while airborne. Shiver me timbers!</color>
<color=black>Upgrades:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>(30 Sun) Attack Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(75 Sun) Heals 50% of damage dealt
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(75 Sun) Each target hit grants +50% extra damage</color>

plants.name: Threetato Mine (TD)
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Threetato Mine loves playing tricks underground. Blimey! It shoots out surprises not once, not twice, but thrice—like a cheeky prankster with a never-ending stash of boom. Watch your step, or ye might get a triple whammy that’ll blow your boots off.

- Written by Mrs. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Draco</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Threetato Mine resurfaces after exploding and fires potatoes across three lanes.

<color=blue>Reversible by pressing R</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color>When armed, explodes on contact, dealing 3600 damage, knocks back for 1 tile and retreats into th' ground.
<color=black>•</color>Re-emerges 15s after exploding. Explodes and disappears immediately upon contact with vehicles.</color>
<color=black>Upgrades: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>• Basic Upgrade:</color>(160 Sun) Projectile Damage +50%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 1:</color>(400 Sun) Projectile Damage +200%
<color=black>• Elite Upgrade Path 2:</color>(400 Sun) Now unleashes an Ultimate move every 60s, firing 250 shots straight ahead over 5s, plus 500 more in a 0-45° spread</color>
